name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: [You’re Invited!] Weekly Event Roundup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| 🗣️ trainings, trainings, get your trainings here!
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..cbULJTDQelbX0vRZ8eKfGKNbEifgpJ2xAf57VltIRHw)
Peter — This week is _stacked_ with exciting live trainings — and you’re invited to all of them! **_Keep reading to learn more and RSVP now!_** ➜ **First up is**[**Why Volunteers are Important for GOTV**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..m9lWMNAsrSXYA-RgIAdYEIGDGk4lIU59BOs5RZzMHYE)**TOMORROW, August 10 at 8 pm ET.** Volunteers are the cornerstone of Get Out the Vote (GOTV) efforts, and knowing how to manage your volunteers’ needs, roles, and capacity is _crucial._ [**Join us tomorrow to learn strategies for maximizing volunteer impact during GOTV!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..QrUuQLRI96EAqE_LWzu7hGgpb1Vz-ZFwBL-T25gCE0g) | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..A0CIZGU2DqQ2R0rcAAQUHaiGfdhJW1l67EE1lNU_55M)
---
➜ **Next is**[**Non-Electoral Organizing for Your Campaign**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pAenN1bZK86VLGUAyaeBYa-ZfZzDOboOntAC2JyKimM)**on Thursday, August 12 at 1 pm ET.**
Want to know why campaign-based organizing works, how to develop local campaigns, and how to transform local Democratic infrastructure?
[**Then stop by Thursday’s training to learn how YOU can master year-round organizing!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GQGhB0WoqsPCjqhLKr4vRKWbz9WCUNT8G-ZnTqK4dyY)
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..0MCz60uZj34EDXicYI49jyzDJBBpA7SRevo_Li8EucE)
---
➜ **Last but not least is**[**How Your Local Democratic Party Can Prepare for GOTV**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..lEGfeNR8vwfSzuRZdjWKQxCR9x3G9JlcVsYQsuauMhA)**on Friday, August 13 at 1 pm ET.**
How do you hit your GOTV strategy out of the park? Prepare, prepare, prepare! Friday’s training is dedicated to helping your community do _just that._
[**Register now to make sure your local Democratic Party has the GOTV skills and expertise you need!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..I9YVc4q5wotbBeeUSvSvgqlWTdOI-v5FucbVO4mf_nY)
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tBFA3zhL71M0syBG6z-xoOHcM89HOi1oGIEOO5AQcQI)
---

See you there!
— The NDTC Team

This is how liberal Big Tech treats anyone who disagrees with them. This isn’t the first time and, unfortunately, won’t be the last. [**So I need your help to fight against the CENSORSHIP of Big Tech!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9897ef7e343d460bac7f3dfb8d8c0053&_e=mrY4mVUV13iATa6JP2FZ3vRHQpqB3jKyF4afL9PGSEu3OSUeAXOcPJtQc2uf-Emjhy_Yfc6ZcjQrROPEICf00tQPf-XEahCDAH_rvF7Gr5kbK-rbQ-U5KYQtBfBAD18yeEX_qjOHeShzJPni7zdeTmMTOydCOCYoaadDLfW9juknJTEY1PpHhT9LoFGbvZKa9Oe4ObVLJ2S9g9krpfukMm93XvxzI9ZG-JyHiZV3PsizgHVLilIG3EY7_Wlw8rJESUee4SiWxvh5gBWGcR2NOwgar_KhAH20ZvCqkstRNgVH52s1BfRahQ1kCqE7Vs0dYprReP8AGZZaMDchc7fCjZBLVzafbiBViACyB2dNHLzdc2Bp7VP1TmwPT16j4eLjc_YsohvQGs1wwHe6_DyrbVXc_8Hj5Onu3h55zM4KmtBkB5tCS2gJOAmWdTewVgvt5dJefqgMWdDfH_h5h0AJTZ-Zjav6C9mdgC2yRGzkY5M%3D)

**Right now, Ilhan Omar can go on live television and be anti-Semitic while promoting Black Lives Matter as they commit acts of violence. But, if a Black conservative woman points out the violent statistics in a city that Ilhan Omar is supposed to represent, that’s considered “Sensitive Material” according to Big Tech.**

[** DON’T LET BIG TECH CENSOR A BLACK CONSERVATIVE **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9897ef7e343d460bac7f3dfb8d8c0053&_e=mrY4mVUV13iATa6JP2FZ3vRHQpqB3jKyF4afL9PGSEu3OSUeAXOcPJtQc2uf-Emjhy_Yfc6ZcjQrROPEICf00tQPf-XEahCDAH_rvF7Gr5kbK-rbQ-U5KYQtBfBAD18yeEX_qjOHeShzJPni7zdeTmMTOydCOCYoaadDLfW9juknJTEY1PpHhT9LoFGbvZKa9Oe4ObVLJ2S9g9krpfukMm93XvxzI9ZG-JyHiZV3PsizgHVLilIG3EY7_Wlw8rJESUee4SiWxvh5gBWGcR2NO1iv2xqluPTO2iOUC6K3PcpHzp0RKwJNAMyya1DX4F6WirD2gZPoII3Z-WWf6R2U1sHf4LbdDU3D-k-6uyqL8-RaIiytzNH-lxbkTIM6fj6zg7pcgS8w3vkGPVdFyQQrcgM-9PNNUM020dJhlPWzzaz4XDIw9N7I8Yhb2vtr9vzqYXMtMFMoRWdQT5o71iQk7WvKN6ZuZQ3pzwZ3j2OJj5o%3D)
We can’t allow Ilhan Omar to spend any more time in Congress trying to be a celebrity, while ignoring the violence and chaos that is destroying cities all over this country.

If you’re serious about making an impact and kicking radicals like Omar and Pelosi out of office, [**then please support my campaign right now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9897ef7e343d460bac7f3dfb8d8c0053&_e=mrY4mVUV13iATa6JP2FZ3vRHQpqB3jKyF4afL9PGSEu3OSUeAXOcPJtQc2uf-Emjhy_Yfc6ZcjQrROPEICf00tQPf-XEahCDAH_rvF7Gr5kbK-rbQ-U5KYQtBfBAD18yeEX_qjOHeShzJPni7zdeTmMTOydCOCYoaadDLfW9juknJTEY1PpHhT9LoFGbvZKa9Oe4ObVLJ2S9g9krpfukMm93XvxzI9ZG-JyHiZV3PsizgHVLilIG3EY7_Wlw8rJESUee4SiWxvh5gBWGcR2NO4gUvpKTCbHOh5hbWOFK9zi1WgmqdgYqeYJlK1Zp8BP5dP0Z36OhvDn7XPJipYf0uwu-mSd1nCbMKEwr2VxLmJGbMmIihcPsXMsWJMFZY5TS7EPu0SePq8uZEqmhJW7bOq6vkllFz-z97mwNAwxbrPyM2FOfcjd0uKeGdw8bxTurUnQ5QtixCNpE4C94cUIe1U0vrFPwLqAgqjadabawJ6Q%3D)

The longer we wait to go on the offensive means more time Omar has to build up her war chest. **Don’t give her the chance to keep cheating your fellow Americans out of the American Dream,** [**help me put an end to her reign.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9897ef7e343d460bac7f3dfb8d8c0053&_e=mrY4mVUV13iATa6JP2FZ3vRHQpqB3jKyF4afL9PGSEu3OSUeAXOcPJtQc2uf-Emjhy_Yfc6ZcjQrROPEICf00tQPf-XEahCDAH_rvF7Gr5kbK-rbQ-U5KYQtBfBAD18yeEX_qjOHeShzJPni7zdeTmMTOydCOCYoaadDLfW9juknJTEY1PpHhT9LoFGbvZKa9Oe4ObVLJ2S9g9krpfukMm93XvxzI9ZG-JyHiZV3PsizgHVLilIG3EY7_Wlw8rJESUee4SiWxvh5gBWGcR2NO9B7E8mdy7R5JNvS-eBYeS7EuVPIbiwVmCouYUdMdtHrdERhjVM_T-S2zEFQ5JgVRJN02Ntg0FasSxo6j2Ww5Pvfxlh8JlpoAHcjjj8rBsz615SNhEOaIeZADunZ7HCotULSxussPz2lz7avvq28lQnfLuVm-ZYhrIfm0p5z_9kJWag37zNd-IZyKnY8T4ocVKXwLMqyq4ep3hS2Yiwl01A%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9897ef7e343d460bac7f3dfb8d8c0053&_e=mrY4mVUV13iATa6JP2FZ3vRHQpqB3jKyF4afL9PGSEu3OSUeAXOcPJtQc2uf-Emjhy_Yfc6ZcjQrROPEICf00tQPf-XEahCDAH_rvF7Gr5kbK-rbQ-U5KYQtBfBAD18yeEX_qjOHeShzJPni7zdeTmMTOydCOCYoaadDLfW9juknJTEY1PpHhT9LoFGbvZKa9Oe4ObVLJ2S9g9krpfukMm93XvxzI9ZG-JyHiZV3PsizgHVLilIG3EY7_Wlw8rJESUee4SiWxvh5gBWGcR2NOzjec5Vw2KZRN6-Y-9OXa2WERXbA5gZrcGFVcduPzHFz7MDpmlsPddJUyxEVBccAMjop3O4V4fae1VleJ7TNjJAgJfv570eSZhur8tm2rjQjLAQ0o3sglTQtQDFrzwqknzI5sxr2qdDNF-JexSlmccSRNPu1ogMyiNq0JklJLAiiaJZxY-KKd1TUWT10b6hq6S2DB6hdesCrhjRsmeAF2a8%3D)

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FlBhIDqMExrUQpu6ytAEQ2wH0jTvhamT1GSYuuk3MLQXbqmW6s9uMSR9Da3n4TIcvCedyz_FRjxfc3SvfedIoBqq2t7O6Mq8eUfZ3-MN36EzxiHeotIsuNygtwSUn_p1p06N6WwBxIVkGIJoAbDAn_9Cl5rIZBJzXlTfTBfAR_fGUOA4s2QlrfcxkKD6mSIelKdrJXi30x9pGbsBZrKxCUamsyd6BFSmhgN7VEWUr5NXXIHG8QbWnktoSIWQCwBHsg/3ec/AYgkgbSUSNK8OdY_sIohOQ/h0/lGSsWclHjbrB4biLvikP-ScGm1J7AP80Qn5f32GCAbk)
Derek — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but Common Good VA said we could reach out because you might want to see this. CNN released an article titled **"The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022"** ....and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race: _“Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.”_ We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now we need your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans. This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we're reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us. **** [**This is where you come in, Derek: If you are able, will you split a $15 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good? Articles like this make us a top target of Mitch McConnell and we need your help to prepare for the next wave of attack ads.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FlBhIDqMExrUQpu6ytAEQ2wh3DezoDHKFlyk1XT1iPs2EkV3CBLIjpypTrYqpAoQzQ-S0M1C-QGkfg-AT_PGx3ITNZKmgsky231DdDdEF1q533ZGPigVEywAxs7-G_zdaAnOM9eKjcF_IGK0JKEWiMGwUJP4367WBHy6P8TOEunUv3x409OpgvJLFN38S8huVuzgzgFo2AKy5vmR70dc60Oz66d5Tq2F6i1UztA1pJg35BrhWcMtY1x_Mrczoj_-Jw/3ec/AYgkgbSUSNK8OdY_sIohOQ/h1/NHAMGeFYw3fHhsS3kcCltK7inSvnLH-tfZWdd1abfGQ) You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against Mark Kelly by National Republicans because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate. However, with your help we can run another successful campaign in 2022 and hold this Arizona seat. So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark's back. Team Kelly

name: OFFICIAL JOE BIDEN POLL (via DCCC)
subject: counting on your immediate feedback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you approve of President Biden's leadership? | | | **_BREAKING NEWS: United States adds nearly 1 MILLION new jobs in July_ **

---
| **YOUR RESPONSE NEEDED:**

We're thrilled!!

Thanks to the work of President Biden and our Democrats, our economy added nearly **1 MILLION** new jobs in July -- and now the unemployment rate is at its lowest since the pandemic began!

But we have so much more work to do, and we need to make sure our top grassroots Democrats are still behind us.

**So we need to know: Do you approve of President Biden 's leadership?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcXWpj7s_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs39KyeS_)
---|---|---

_**Responses Due by 11:59pm**_

We're thrilled!!

**We just learned our economy added nearly 1 MILLION new jobs in July --_and now the unemployment rate is at its lowest point since the pandemic began!_**

We're so proud of everything President Biden and our Democratic Majorities have done so far to get our country back on track, like:

\-- building an economic recovery for **EVERYONE.**
\-- providing COVID relief for**MILLIONS** of Americans.
\-- and fighting for **STRONGER** voting rights across the country.

But we still have so much more work to do, and we need to make sure our top grassroots Democrats are still behind us.

So please, we're counting on you to give us your input before our poll closes for good at midnight.
**Let us know: Do you approve of President Biden 's leadership?**
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcXWpj7s_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs39KyeS_)
---|---|---

_**We 'll be reviewing responses at our strategy session tomorrow morning, so it's crucial you get your response in before 11:59pm.**_

Thanks,

Democratic HQ
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45433239&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MjA1NjcwNwS2&l=13870087&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45433239&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MjA1NjcwNwS2&l=13870087&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Freedom Caucus Chairman
subject: [ALERT] 900% COVID surge at the Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58102900:Jh_8BSleN:m:1:3103520637:19D905D6BF9CE62E6BA8DC91433BF738:r "Video") Peter, Joe Biden is wasting billions of taxpayer dollars to STOP the construction of President Trump's Border Wall. To add insult to injury, illegal aliens are flooding our southern border, and COVID-19 rates have surged 900% in the Rio Grande Valley! Does Biden want to erase our southern border? **America First conservatives like you and me must slam the brakes on this out-of-control administration and fight to fund and finish President Trump 's Border Wall!** **[As Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus, I'm leading the charge and asking patriotic Americans like you to stand with me - before it's too late - by making your immediate and generous contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, $25, or whatever you can afford. I'm mounting an all-out offense against Joe Biden's reckless spending package and dangerous immigration crisis, and I need you on my team!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58102901:Jh_8BSleN:m:1:3103520637:19D905D6BF9CE62E6BA8DC91433BF738:r "As Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus, I’m leading the
charge and asking patriotic Americans like you to stand with me – before it’s too late – by making your immediate and generous
contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, $25, or whatever you can afford. I’m mounting an all-out offense against Joe Biden’s
reckless spending package and dangerous immigration crisis, and I need you on my team!")** **Joe Biden stopped construction of President Trump 's Border Wall [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58102900:Jh_8BSleN:m:1:3103520637:19D905D6BF9CE62E6BA8DC91433BF738:r "Headline")and turned up the spigot to allow hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens to flood across our southern border. As Democrats in Congress and across the country consider another round of lockdowns, _they 're cheering the superspreaders of COVID-19 crisis at our border_.** Welcoming hordes of illegal aliens into our country has driven up COVID-19 rates in border communities. While the Democrats are wagging their finger at us and telling us to cower under our blanket, they are opening the border for anyone who wants to come into our communities with ZERO health screenings. **The top priority of the federal government should be securing our borders and preserving our sovereignty._President Trump 's Border Wall should be the FIRST project funded in the infrastructure package_!** **[If you want to fund the Border Wall fully, stop the illegal alien invasion, and derail Big Government spending in Washington, chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 toward my campaign today!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58102902:Jh_8BSleN:m:1:3103520637:19D905D6BF9CE62E6BA8DC91433BF738:r "If you want to fund the Border Wall fully,
stop the illegal alien invasion, and derail Big Government spending in Washington, chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 toward my
campaign today!")** You and I can't afford to wait for Joe Biden and the Big Government Democrats to back off their radical agenda. **[We must stop them!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58102902:Jh_8BSleN:m:1:3103520637:19D905D6BF9CE62E6BA8DC91433BF738:r "We must stop them!")** God bless you and God bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58102900:Jh_8BSleN:m:1:3103520637:19D905D6BF9CE62E6BA8DC91433BF738:r "Andy Biggs") Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5)
Chairman, House Freedom Caucus P.S. **[Support fully funding the Border Wall and help me stop Joe Biden's radical agenda by chipping in what you can today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58102900:Jh_8BSleN:m:1:3103520637:19D905D6BF9CE62E6BA8DC91433BF738:r "Support fully funding the Border Wall and help me stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda by chipping in what you can today.")** Thank you.

name: Burt Jones for Georgia
subject: BURT JONES LAUNCHES CAMPAIGN FOR LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR OF GEORGIA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, AUGUST 10, 2021
BURT JONES LAUNCHES CAMPAIGN FOR LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR Vows to Create Jobs, Boost Public Safety, Invest in Education, Strengthen Election Integrity, and Champion the America First Agenda
JACKSON - Today, Georgia State Senator Burt Jones launched his campaign for Lieutenant Governor. A sixth-generation native of Jackson, Burt has spent decades in the private sector, where he has created thousands of jobs and opportunities for Georgia families. He was the first elected official in Georgia to endorse President Trump and has been on the frontlines fighting for election integrity and transparency in the State Senate. Burt Jones is a proven business leader, consistent conservative, and champion for Georgia families.
"Georgians deserve a proven business leader, consistent conservative, and champion for Georgia families with the courage stand up and make our state a better place, and I'm running for Lieutenant Governor to do just that," said Burt Jones. "I'll fight for the future of every Georgian by creating high-quality jobs and cutting taxes, reining in the cost of higher education and investing in more educational opportunities for our children, strengthening election integrity and restoring voter confidence, and standing with our men and women of law enforcement to keep our communities safe. As the first elected official in Georgia to endorse President Trump, I will also proudly keep fighting for his America First Agenda. I look forward to sharing my conservative vision with folks all across the state as we build a statewide grassroots movement and secure a strong win for the people of Georgia as their next Lieutenant Governor."
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xpjv_ZNXkdPesAs2J832N8dvXFwGuiVb7NBl6Ooi0BqmPsFNDcG8cS7t8q88hiW_waKm9Tq0WMP_1FLCojgo0R2y_EBLNKDPySy5JKACXx4uZJlkd37_kNlnHsrz2L-D1Lz5uF0e_IYFKO2nGWzjxPCwUMdx7rVw-XiZhZ5QebIinMs4d7-1OQ==&c=zVwu9Q3rpu1WRx8b_okWnG3Xc9uSUA3b3A-XHRLr4PEbONiqCxAzUg==&ch=-hIdaSqfRVwu3iBc8cKng7penLfDXT8KAT0iAauF7NBq-V8xvD0uKQ==) or the image below to view Burt's official launch video:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xpjv_ZNXkdPesAs2J832N8dvXFwGuiVb7NBl6Ooi0BqmPsFNDcG8cS7t8q88hiW_waKm9Tq0WMP_1FLCojgo0R2y_EBLNKDPySy5JKACXx4uZJlkd37_kNlnHsrz2L-D1Lz5uF0e_IYFKO2nGWzjxPCwUMdx7rVw-XiZhZ5QebIinMs4d7-1OQ==&c=zVwu9Q3rpu1WRx8b_okWnG3Xc9uSUA3b3A-XHRLr4PEbONiqCxAzUg==&ch=-hIdaSqfRVwu3iBc8cKng7penLfDXT8KAT0iAauF7NBq-V8xvD0uKQ==)
---
| As Lieutenant Governor, Burt Jones will:

* Boost our economy by reducing burdensome regulations, cutting the state income tax, prioritizing vocational and technical training, and empowering small businesses across our state to succeed.

* Create safer communities by cracking down on violent crime, supporting local and state law enforcement officers, and increasing funding and resources for first responders

* Restore voter confidence by securing our elections, increasing transparency and accountability, and investigating any and all instances of voter fraud.

* Create a world class K-12 and Higher Education System in Georgia by investing in teachers and students, empowering parents to make educational choices, boosting vocational and technical education, and lowering the cost of post-secondary degrees.

* Enforce a legal immigration system that puts the lives and livelihoods of hardworking Georgians first.

Burt Jones is a lifelong conservative who has a proven record of creating jobs, growing a successful business, and fighting for Georgia values. A sixth-generation Jackson native, Burt works with his family's business, Jones Petroleum, where he has served as an integral part of growing the diverse, multi-faceted company, employing nearly 2,000 Georgians. Burt also founded JP Capital & Insurance, Inc., a risk-management company specializing in retail insurance brokerage. Through hard work and dedication, Burt built this start-up agency into an established insurance brokerage house founded on professionalism and client service that now employs over 900 people.
Answering a call to service, Burt was elected to the State Senate for Georgia's 25th District in 2012. Over his time in office, Burt has been instrumental in the district's economic development by attracting new businesses and creating thousands of jobs and opportunities for Middle Georgia. Importantly, Burt led the fight to restore confidence and accountability to our elections process after the disastrous 2020 cycle. In fact, Burt played an integral role in the passage of the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202) and has been recognized nationally as a leader for election integrity, including by President Donald J. Trump. He was also asked by the Trump Administration to join the Foreign and Domestic Trade Council.
Before his business career, Burt was a student-athlete and a four-year letterman for the University of Georgia football team. As a former walk-on, Senator Jones was elected permanent team captain for the 2002 season, helping to steer the team to its first SEC Championship in 20 years. In 2014, UGA named Burt a Distinguished Alumni and named him to its "40 Under 40" list.
Burt lives with his wife, Jan, and their two children, Stella and Banks, in Butts County. Burt and his family are active members of Rock Springs Church in Milner.
To learn more about Burt's vision for Georgia - and to stay updated, sign up to volunteer, or donate - visit [www.BurtJonesForGA.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xpjv_ZNXkdPesAs2J832N8dvXFwGuiVb7NBl6Ooi0BqmPsFNDcG8cS7t8q88hiW_ya3WkZNhPJumRnw03y_iILQq7I6IFQe70_dNFvVy5GGTW0G_zPaSgU9UzMc9qUCgduSOLyP0huaaB22cfezcIw==&c=zVwu9Q3rpu1WRx8b_okWnG3Xc9uSUA3b3A-XHRLr4PEbONiqCxAzUg==&ch=-hIdaSqfRVwu3iBc8cKng7penLfDXT8KAT0iAauF7NBq-V8xvD0uKQ==) and follow us on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xpjv_ZNXkdPesAs2J832N8dvXFwGuiVb7NBl6Ooi0BqmPsFNDcG8cS7t8q88hiW_tdftEMrnqAF_NIk0xUoIxNKn_DGFmhGPmFmp6o66eqyHViqVmHsP2K1ZB2DW85CUotB-N8MJSFzI8e9ZUVoIvjcvQ_vMlkufEHk3D0Pe0aM=&c=zVwu9Q3rpu1WRx8b_okWnG3Xc9uSUA3b3A-XHRLr4PEbONiqCxAzUg==&ch=-hIdaSqfRVwu3iBc8cKng7penLfDXT8KAT0iAauF7NBq-V8xvD0uKQ==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xpjv_ZNXkdPesAs2J832N8dvXFwGuiVb7NBl6Ooi0BqmPsFNDcG8cS7t8q88hiW_Ms23xmtcmLE2LJHlcCTNxAmhRHkyAu8Ni6qD5hKf52egOCyVkoHPKSboedHNdOkx1IKV9YO3tXFy7XYtqQhFt5wAQdjnbHA1&c=zVwu9Q3rpu1WRx8b_okWnG3Xc9uSUA3b3A-XHRLr4PEbONiqCxAzUg==&ch=-hIdaSqfRVwu3iBc8cKng7penLfDXT8KAT0iAauF7NBq-V8xvD0uKQ==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xpjv_ZNXkdPesAs2J832N8dvXFwGuiVb7NBl6Ooi0BqmPsFNDcG8cS7t8q88hiW_hrG_McAJ1l9_qubfa3Wnh4lNUz3bnIrfdKMIR-J0rG1VMpEWlAdglTgKvwEDT6UkfL9UcAVSdHAW4Wmdx2YlCv3iqCTvEHh9&c=zVwu9Q3rpu1WRx8b_okWnG3Xc9uSUA3b3A-XHRLr4PEbONiqCxAzUg==&ch=-hIdaSqfRVwu3iBc8cKng7penLfDXT8KAT0iAauF7NBq-V8xvD0uKQ==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, AUGUST 10, 2021 BURT JONES LAUNCHES CAMPAIGN FOR LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR Vows to Create Jobs, Boost Public Safety, Invest in Education, Strengthen Election Integrity, and Champion the America First Agenda JACKSON - Today, Georgia State Senator Burt Jones launched his campaign for Lieutenant Governor. A sixth-generation native of Jackson, Burt has spent decades in the private sector, where he has created thousands of jobs and opportunities for Georgia families. He was the first elected official in Georgia to endorse President Trump and has been on the frontlines fighting for election integrity and transparency in the State Senate. Burt Jones is a proven business leader, consistent conservative, and champion for Georgia families. "Georgians deserve a proven business leader, consistent conservative, and champion for Georgia families with the courage stand up and make our state a better place, and I'm running for Lieutenant Governor to do just that," said Burt Jones. "I'll fight for the future of every Georgian by creating high-quality jobs and cutting taxes, reining in the cost of higher education and investing in more educational opportunities for our children, strengthening election integrity and restoring voter confidence, and standing with our men and women of law enforcement to keep our communities safe. As the first elected official in Georgia to endorse President Trump, I will also proudly keep fighting for his America First Agenda. I look forward to sharing my conservative vision with folks all across the state as we build a statewide grassroots movement and secure a strong win for the people of Georgia as their next Lieutenant Governor." Click == or the image below to view Burt's official launch video: | == | As Lieutenant Governor, Burt Jones will: Boost our economy by reducing burdensome regulations, cutting the state income tax, prioritizing vocational and technical training, and empowering small businesses across our state to succeed. Create safer communities by cracking down on violent crime, supporting local and state law enforcement officers, and increasing funding and resources for first responders Restore voter confidence by securing our elections, increasing transparency and accountability, and investigating any and all instances of voter fraud. Create a world class K-12 and Higher Education System in Georgia by investing in teachers and students, empowering parents to make educational choices, boosting vocational and technical education, and lowering the cost of post-secondary degrees. * Enforce a legal immigration system that puts the lives and livelihoods of hardworking Georgians first. Burt Jones is a lifelong conservative who has a proven record of creating jobs, growing a successful business, and fighting for Georgia values. A sixth-generation Jackson native, Burt works with his family's business, Jones Petroleum, where he has served as an integral part of growing the diverse, multi-faceted company, employing nearly 2,000 Georgians. Burt also founded JP Capital & Insurance, Inc., a risk-management company specializing in retail insurance brokerage. Through hard work and dedication, Burt built this start-up agency into an established insurance brokerage house founded on professionalism and client service that now employs over 900 people. Answering a call to service, Burt was elected to the State Senate for Georgia's 25th District in 2012. Over his time in office, Burt has been instrumental in the district's economic development by attracting new businesses and creating thousands of jobs and opportunities for Middle Georgia. Importantly, Burt led the fight to restore confidence and accountability to our elections process after the disastrous 2020 cycle. In fact, Burt played an integral role in the passage of the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202) and has been recognized nationally as a leader for election integrity, including by President Donald J. Trump. He was also asked by the Trump Administration to join the Foreign and Domestic Trade Council. Before his business career, Burt was a student-athlete and a four-year letterman for the University of Georgia football team. As a former walk-on, Senator Jones was elected permanent team captain for the 2002 season, helping to steer the team to its first SEC Championship in 20 years. In 2014, UGA named Burt a Distinguished Alumni and named him to its "40 Under 40" list. Burt lives with his wife, Jan, and their two children, Stella and Banks, in Butts County. Burt and his family are active members of Rock Springs Church in Milner. To learn more about Burt's vision for Georgia - and to stay updated, sign up to volunteer, or donate - visit == and follow us on ==, ==, and ==. | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@burtjonesforga.com | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | == | == == == | | | == | PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA | | Burt Jones for Georgia | P.O. subject: Results are in - what matters to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Plus another chance to take our survey.
|

| | Happy Tuesday, Friend!

A few weeks ago, we sent along our official Crist for Governor Issues Survey -- and we appreciated the wonderful responses from our supporters!

If you took the time to fill out the survey, _thank you!_

**[But if you didn't get a chance, we've reopened the survey for a limited time only! It shouldn't take you more than a few minutes! Begin the survey now >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qi12PD7oLYCDQFnlltZEYg==/EASAObJ2YsT5UD5uPNckbg==)** **Here are some of the results from our survey so far ...**
* Most people listed _**climate change**_ as the issue they'd like to hear more about from us.
* Similarly, a majority of respondents said it's _**very important**_ to replace Gov. Ron DeSantis with someone (like Charlie!) who will make fighting climate change a priority.
* A majority of people also said it's _**very important**_ for Charlie Crist to defeat Ron DeSantis so we can get Florida back on the right track.

**[Friend, if you haven't shared your thoughts, please do so now -- before the issue survey closes for good!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qi12PD7oLYCDQFnlltZEYg==/EASAObJ2YsT5UD5uPNckbg==)**

Thanks,

name: Ted Cruz
subject: HELP ME END 120 years of Democrat dominance, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)
---
Peter,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left's game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we're seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what's on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)
[ THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKE
HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)

Will you please **[chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)** to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for?

I encouraged Monica to try again - a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. **[Monica has my endorsement, but she won 't be able to pull off a win for Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)**.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before June 30th, and I've pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a Latina Republican to Congress?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)**

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)
We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica 's race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I'm asking you to give generously](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)** - whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she'll make us all proud.

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)

Respectfully,
Senator Ted Cruz

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58105605:JfrHSSlNh:m:1:3253819041:633C28DE0B1C1E0D6446E92BC8037FAF:r)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress

Friend,

Did you see the latest report from the U.S. Customs and Border Patrol? _**In July, there were 210,000 encounters with migrants at the southern borde**_ r, which is **_up 400%_** from this time last year. **_This is the highest monthly number in 20 years!_**

Each month of Biden's failed border policies has seen an increase in the number of encounters along the southern border._**In the months of May and June of this year, there were 6,000 encounters a day. In July, there were nearly 7,000 daily encounters.**_

This Administration's "do-nothing" approach is a threat to our safety and national security. Joe Biden or Kamala Harris refuse to even visit the border. We need your help!

name: John Cranley
subject: I’m running for governor, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
I have an announcement to make. | Friend, Let me tell you something about Ohio: **We work hard. Our communities are strong. Our people are resilient.** But for years, we’ve been held back by the rigged political system in Columbus — where one party pushes an agenda that favors corporations and the wealthy few at the expense of the rest of us. Meanwhile, our communities are suffering with too few jobs and too much debt. The average Ohio worker makes 89 cents for every dollar an American worker makes. The future used to happen in Ohio. We used to export cars, steel, and presidents. Now, our infrastructure is crumbling, our economy is still in decline, and working families are struggling to make ends meet. **For all their hard work, strength, and resilience, Ohioans just can’t catch a break.** The GOP stranglehold on our government is jeopardizing our communities’ futures — and workers and their families are bearing the brunt of Republican mismanagement. Look, friend, I know that it’s easy to point out what’s wrong with Ohio. Talk is cheap. _It’s results that matter._ **That’s why I want you to be among the first to know that I’m running for governor, because together, we can create a better future for Ohio. Our people deserve nothing less.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33811761/300015358/-1406279976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTgyNjgyOS1kYmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uGP4yfB31_BJjVdW1hRrSCYTeaLWI-vh3VWkV8RQyKE=&emci=bba2347f-61f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f9826829-dbf9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289) **[ENDORSE JOHN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33811765/300015359/-1406279976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTgyNjgyOS1kYmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uGP4yfB31_BJjVdW1hRrSCYTeaLWI-vh3VWkV8RQyKE=&emci=bba2347f-61f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f9826829-dbf9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)** **For me, patriotism has always been about leaving this country a little better than I found it.** It’s about serving others and giving back to my community, because there is nothing more important than making sure every person has the opportunity they need to thrive. It’s about righting wrongs wherever possible — that’s why I started Ohio’s Innocence Project, working to end the unimaginable injustice of locking people up for something they didn’t do. It’s why my wife, Dena, is leading community vaccination efforts. It’s why we’re raising our son in a tradition of service. And it’s why I ran for mayor of Cincinnati, friend. **I’m proud to have already been a part of Cincinnati’s comeback story, and I’m proud of everything we’ve achieved to change our city for the better.** We brought jobs to the city, revitalized our neighborhoods, prioritized clean energy, and even grew our population. _Cincinnati is the first major Ohio city to see population growth after decades of decline._ **Now, Ohio needs a comeback. And Ohioans deserve a leader who has already led one.** As governor, I’ll bring our commonsense approach to Columbus so our state can make a comeback too. In the months ahead, we’ll be laying out detailed plans for rebuilding Ohio, but here’s where it all starts:
* Creating 30,000 new jobs
* Repairing our economy
* Expanding broadband access
* Funding public education
* Investing in a new energy economy
* Legalizing marijuana and using the revenue to rebuild our infrastructure

This is what it comes down to: We know what we need to do to brighten our communities’ futures, so it’s time to buckle down and _get to work._ The GOP has had thirty years to prove that they could create a better future for our state. Well, the verdict’s in. **They can’t.** All they’ve succeeded in doing is proving that corruption and cronyism lead to failures at every level. **It’s long past time for a change — and we can make it happen.** [**Today, I’m asking you to endorse our campaign for governor. clean_body: I have an announcement to make. | Friend, Let me tell you something about Ohio: We work hard. Our communities are strong. Our people are resilient. But for years, we’ve been held back by the rigged political system in Columbus — where one party pushes an agenda that favors corporations and the wealthy few at the expense of the rest of us. Meanwhile, our communities are suffering with too few jobs and too much debt. The average Ohio worker makes 89 cents for every dollar an American worker makes. The future used to happen in Ohio. We used to export cars, steel, and presidents. Now, our infrastructure is crumbling, our economy is still in decline, and working families are struggling to make ends meet. For all their hard work, strength, and resilience, Ohioans just can’t catch a break. The GOP stranglehold on our government is jeopardizing our communities’ futures — and workers and their families are bearing the brunt of Republican mismanagement. Look, friend, I know that it’s easy to point out what’s wrong with Ohio. Talk is cheap. It’s results that matter. That’s why I want you to be among the first to know that I’m running for governor, because together, we can create a better future for Ohio. Our people deserve nothing less. For me, patriotism has always been about leaving this country a little better than I found it. It’s about serving others and giving back to my community, because there is nothing more important than making sure every person has the opportunity they need to thrive. It’s about righting wrongs wherever possible — that’s why I started Ohio’s Innocence Project, working to end the unimaginable injustice of locking people up for something they didn’t do. It’s why my wife, Dena, is leading community vaccination efforts. It’s why we’re raising our son in a tradition of service. And it’s why I ran for mayor of Cincinnati, friend. I’m proud to have already been a part of Cincinnati’s comeback story, and I’m proud of everything we’ve achieved to change our city for the better. We brought jobs to the city, revitalized our neighborhoods, prioritized clean energy, and even grew our population. Cincinnati is the first major Ohio city to see population growth after decades of decline. Now, Ohio needs a comeback. And Ohioans deserve a leader who has already led one. As governor, I’ll bring our commonsense approach to Columbus so our state can make a comeback too. In the months ahead, we’ll be laying out detailed plans for rebuilding Ohio, but here’s where it all starts: Creating 30,000 new jobs Repairing our economy Expanding broadband access Funding public education Investing in a new energy economy Legalizing marijuana and using the revenue to rebuild our infrastructure This is what it comes down to: We know what we need to do to brighten our communities’ futures, so it’s time to buckle down and get to work. The GOP has had thirty years to prove that they could create a better future for our state. Well, the verdict’s in. They can’t. All they’ve succeeded in doing is proving that corruption and cronyism lead to failures at every level. It’s long past time for a change — and we can make it happen. With your help and a lot of hard work, we can write Ohio’s comeback story together, so that the future happens in Ohio again, and our kids and grandkids will do better than we did. Together, we can create the kind of government our people deserve. Let’s get to work, John = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. | | After a historic fundraising haul, Donald Trump recently announced his campaign has $102 million in the bank.

Trump doesn’t just plan to use all that money for another presidential run. He wants to help extremist Republicans win big races so he can tighten his grip over the Republican party.

But we do know that Glenn and Virginia are the cornerstones of Trump’s comeback strategy.

| | Friend, The time has never been more urgent for Americans to call their Senators and demand immediate action to protect the freedom to vote. This week, we’re turning the heat up on Congress to make it clear that we need both the For the People Act AND the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act in order to:
1. Fight back against the slate of anti-voter bills passed in state legislatures, and
2. Protect voters from future attacks on our freedom to vote.

Below are some key points to emphasize when calling your Senators about the For The People Act and the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act. _**What to Say To Your Senators**_ _It is imperative that Congress pass the**For the People Act** and the **John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act** before state legislatures and commissions begin to redraw districts. We need urgent federal action to secure fair districts, protect voters from partisan gerrymandering, and ensure their voices are heard._ **Want some more information?** Feel free to share the following with your Senators: _With the recent Supreme Court ruling in Brnovich v. DNC further weakening the protections of the Voting Rights Act, the urgent need for federal action to protect the freedom to vote is greater than ever._ _Americans across party lines support common sense national standards to protect the freedom to vote, and the U.S. Senate must continue to work together to reach a compromise._ _With the**For the People Act** and the **John R. clean_body: Fair Fight | | | Friend, The time has never been more urgent for Americans to call their Senators and demand immediate action to protect the freedom to vote. This week, we’re turning the heat up on Congress to make it clear that we need both the For the People Act AND the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act in order to: 1. Fight back against the slate of anti-voter bills passed in state legislatures, and 2. Protect voters from future attacks on our freedom to vote. Below are some key points to emphasize when calling your Senators about the For The People Act and the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act. What to Say To Your Senators It is imperative that Congress pass theFor the People Act and the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act before state legislatures and commissions begin to redraw districts. We need urgent federal action to secure fair districts, protect voters from partisan gerrymandering, and ensure their voices are heard. Want some more information? Feel free to share the following with your Senators: With the recent Supreme Court ruling in Brnovich v. DNC further weakening the protections of the Voting Rights Act, the urgent need for federal action to protect the freedom to vote is greater than ever. Americans across party lines support common sense national standards to protect the freedom to vote, and the U.S. Senate must continue to work together to reach a compromise. With theFor the People Act and the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act, Congress has a once-in-a-decade chance to protect voters from partisan gerrymandering and ensure our voices are heard. Thank you for your support and activism, Team Fair Fight Action | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Nikki Fried
subject: Friend, can you make your first contribution to our campaign?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Ron DeSantis raises millions of dollars every month from Republicans across the country who want him to run for President in 2024.

We’re doing things differently: in our first month, contributions of less than $100 made up more than 90% of our total. The overwhelming majority of our contributions came from Floridians.

So friend, when we say that your $5 makes a difference, we mean it. If you’re in a position to give, please click here to make your first contribution of any amount today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/desantis-gov-who?refcode=new]

I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t important. But right now, Floridians are living through the deadly consequences of Ron DeSantis’ leadership. He’s ignoring science on COVID-19, directly putting our children, our economic recovery, and our lives at risk. Meanwhile, he’s launching false, political attacks on the Biden administration as he prepares to run for President in 2024.

We need leaders who will listen to experts, communicate honestly, and put Floridians first. That’s exactly what I’m doing right now by giving daily briefings on the pandemic--even when DeSantis won’t--and it’s exactly what I’ll do as Governor.

But friends, I’m going to need your help to stop DeSantis and win next year. If you’re in a position to support our campaign, please click here to chip in for the first time today.

Thanks for standing with me on this. We’re going to get through this crisis and build a better future for everyone in our state.

Warmly,

Nikki
Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Val Demings
subject: Can I count on you, team?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Before midnight, I need to build a grassroots movement that can fight back | | | **Friend, not enough supporters have become Florida Defenders, and I'm facing an all too important midnight deadline in just hours.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33822126/300055741/298981188?refcode=20210810_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOThiNmI3My1lZWY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVU2ecLDLW9rdRXsXVz8KyHkuSZU4W5iagfTP-35S1I=) **I'll remind you of this number one more time: 10,033 votes (0.12%). That's what decided Florida's last Senate race.** If I don't hit this goal, I'm looking at a fundraising gap of $11,347. I can't have an under-resourced campaign when Marco Rubio just hauled in $4 million. Because if I don't have the resources, I won't be able to compete. And if I can't compete, I risk losing out on a meaningful win for Floridians and our country. _Plain and simple._ [**I know this team. I know what we're capable of. And I know we have what it takes to defeat Marco Rubio. So please, can I count on you to rush a split donation of $20 between my campaign and Seth Moulton's to activate your Florida Defenders membership? Every dollar you contribute will ensure we can defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate. I can't have an under-resourced campaign when Marco Rubio just hauled in $4 million. Because if I don't have the resources, I won't be able to compete. We have a chance to pick up a Democratic seat in the House! DeAngelo Jelks is running on the ballot on September 14th in a special election for TN House District 29.
DeAngelo is a father, husband, veteran of Operation Iraqi Freedom, and longtime resident of Hamilton County. Having seen how TN GOP’s Housemajority has abandoned Tennesseans and infringed upon their rights, DeAngelo is running to “protect people from politics.”

As a Democrat living in Taylor Greene’s district, I knew I couldn’t just sit back and watch. That’s why I’m running to defeat her at the ballot box next year. I know that, together, we can do this. But it’s going to take all of us working together to help send Marjorie Taylor Greene into early retirement. Thanks, Marcus | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . subject: Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Forwarding our last email to make sure you see. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33827723/300067876/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI2ZGYxYi1mNmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbQLhVZSFR8vfvolSiTkKzutAJkI1dNkDLeqZOx8Cec=&emci=bbb9b837-e9f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=da26df1b-f6f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)
Peter, There are no two ways about it: There’s simply nothing more critical to our democracy than ensuring that every one of us is able to vote. **But right now, GOP legislators across the country, including here in North Carolina, are doing everything they can to make it harder for some voters to access the ballot box.** In our state, Republicans want to restrict mail-in voting, which we all know is a safe, secure, and convenient way for North Carolinians to vote. I know we’ve emailed you about this before. But the fact is, I won’t stop talking about it until we’ve defeated the far right’s voter suppression tactics nationwide. This is just too important. **[If you haven’t had a chance yet, add your name to our petition telling North Carolina’s GOP legislators that you SUPPORT mail-in voting.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33827725/300067880/1516460377?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights2_081021_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI2ZGYxYi1mNmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbQLhVZSFR8vfvolSiTkKzutAJkI1dNkDLeqZOx8Cec=&emci=bbb9b837-e9f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=da26df1b-f6f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)** Thank you, Roy [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33827727/300067882/435245919?refcode=em_RC_PET_VotingRights2_081021_headshot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI2ZGYxYi1mNmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbQLhVZSFR8vfvolSiTkKzutAJkI1dNkDLeqZOx8Cec=) \-----Forwarded message-----
From: **Team Cooper**
Subject: They’re not being subtle.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Republican legislative leaders have just one strategy to maintain and expand their influence over North Carolina’s government**— and they’re not exactly being subtle about it.** Rather than promoting policies that will actually help the American people, the GOP plans to win elections by _picking_ which voters get to have a say. **Voter suppression is the name of their game.** Here in North Carolina, Senate Republicans passed a bill _restricting_ mail-in voting, and communities of color and young North Carolinians — _folks who on average are more likely to vote for Democrats_ — will be the most affected. **[Peter, Roy will do everything he can to defend mail-in voting, but he needs us with him. Sign our petition right now to say you support vote by mail in North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33827729/300067884/1516460377?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights2_081021_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI2ZGYxYi1mNmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbQLhVZSFR8vfvolSiTkKzutAJkI1dNkDLeqZOx8Cec=&emci=bbb9b837-e9f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=da26df1b-f6f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)** The fight against voter suppression is nothing new to North Carolina. Courageous activists have spent decades working to secure access to the ballot box for _all_ of us. **And we’ll keep fighting for as long as it takes.** Far-right politicians are relying on lies about election fraud to justify restricting access to the ballot box. **We need to tell them loud and clear that we see what they’re doing — and we won’t stand for it.** **[Sign our petition right now to join Roy and stand up to the GOP’s voter suppression tactics>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33827731/300067886/1516460377?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights2_081021_L3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI2ZGYxYi1mNmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbQLhVZSFR8vfvolSiTkKzutAJkI1dNkDLeqZOx8Cec=&emci=bbb9b837-e9f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=da26df1b-f6f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33827733/300067888/1516460377?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights2_081021_button1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI2ZGYxYi1mNmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CbQLhVZSFR8vfvolSiTkKzutAJkI1dNkDLeqZOx8Cec=&emci=bbb9b837-e9f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=da26df1b-f6f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)

name: Team Greitens
subject: US Senate Candidate Eric Greitens Slams "Infrastructure" Bill as "Product of the Swamp"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
No Republican Senator or Representative should support this sham, much less whip votes and lobby in its favor.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Former Missouri Governor & US Senate Candidate Eric Greitens Slams "Infrastructure" Bill as "Product of the Swamp"
---
| We all agree that America's infrastructure is in desperate need of updating and fixing. However, the so - called infrastructure bill making its way through Congress is a trillion-dollar boondoggle that doesn't address the core roadblocks to ensuring a better future for all Americans. The bill is a slush fund for corporate special interests which does not restore the popular Keystone XL pipeline, does not rein in unnecessary regulations that make it costly and difficult to build, does not reform labor laws that make many projects unaffordable, and it empowers climate extremists to litigate important projects into the ground.
No Republican Senator or Representative should support this sham, much less whip votes and lobby in its favor.
Only about $110 billion out of the entire $1 trillion dollar plan actually goes to fixing roads, bridges, ports, waterways and other necessary projects. Instead, liberal projects like the Green New Deal and a pilot program for a national per-mile user fee will be funded with massive amounts of taxpayers' money.
It is also vital to realize that this horrible piece of legislation will lead to other horrible pieces of legislation through the budget reconciliation process.
Congress had a real opportunity to pass a significant infrastructure bill when President Donald J. Trump was in office, but today's legislation is nothing more than appeasement to the Democrats' liberal agenda and special interest groups who will be the largest beneficiaries of this bill.
Republicans in Washington D.C. should know better than to be duped by Democrats' usual, pathetic games which do nothing but hurt America.
When I become the next Senator from Missouri, I will fight against business as usual, products of the swamp such as this "infrastructure" bill.

The bill is a slush fund for corporate special interests which does not restore the popular Keystone XL pipeline, does not rein in unnecessary regulations that make it costly and difficult to build, does not reform labor laws that make many projects unaffordable, and it empowers climate extremists to litigate important projects into the ground. name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106933:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106933:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106933:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106933:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106933:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106933:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106933:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106933:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106934:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106933:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58106935:JhnSgSlLN:m:1:3253819041:69CD93D748E2F89B865189EC59A54B40:r)

clean_body: Hi Peter, Bo Dietl here. You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like Goodfellas and T he Wolf of Wall Street. But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me. Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. That's when the two men sped away. Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|--- {{unsubscribeUrl}} This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. subject: Without child care, we will not get America back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33830000/300072563/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2Y3MTQwMy1mYmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAwY4bhmq5wlrG84J7PhLCt5-ZUCQD63d1_zBkIQiJk=&emci=1d89b1c4-14ef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=97f71403-fbf9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Across the country — including right here in Northwest Washington — most families have started receiving child tax credit payments. This $250 - $300 per child monthly amount is a critical investment in getting our economy back on track. After all, if families are unable to find child care, they are unable to get back to work. Consider this: _Before the pandemic_ , there were a half-million children in Washington state alone whose families could not find affordable, licensed child care. And it has gotten much, much worse over the last 18 months. That is why I am pushing Congress to make a sustained investment in child care. That means making the child tax credit permanent. It also means that we must cap out-of-pocket costs at 7% of a family's income, ensure that child care workers earn a living wage and benefits, reduce the barriers that keep low-income families and communities of color from accessing child care programs, and provide assistance to child care facilities that need to retrofit and expand their buildings to serve more families. **Bottom line? We must guarantee affordable, accessible child care for every family that needs it.** We have a lot of work to do to make sure that we are able to create and sustain jobs in the post-pandemic economy. This $250 - $300 per child monthly amount is a critical investment in getting our economy back on track. After all, if families are unable to find child care, they are unable to get back to work. Consider this: Before the pandemic , there were a half-million children in Washington state alone whose families could not find affordable, licensed child care. And it has gotten much, much worse over the last 18 months. That is why I am pushing Congress to make a sustained investment in child care. That means making the child tax credit permanent. It also means that we must cap out-of-pocket costs at 7% of a family's income, ensure that child care workers earn a living wage and benefits, reduce the barriers that keep low-income families and communities of color from accessing child care programs, and provide assistance to child care facilities that need to retrofit and expand their buildings to serve more families. Bottom line? We must guarantee affordable, accessible child care for every family that needs it. We have a lot of work to do to make sure that we are able to create and sustain jobs in the post-pandemic economy. And child care is right in the middle of it. subject: Here's the situation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
My fellow Nevada Senator Jacky Rosen said I could reach out with an important ask in this critical time.
#
Friends,
My fellow Nevada Senator Jacky Rosen said I could reach out with an important ask in this critical time. I wish I was reaching out with good news, but CNN has named me **one of the most vulnerable senators in the nation.**
GOP outside groups have _already_ spent nearly $1 million to flip this seat -- and The Cook Political Report just _downgraded_ my chances of winning Nevada's critical Senate race.
Let me be very clear: Senate control hinges on what happens in Nevada -- and I'm about to fall short of my urgent rapid-response goal as of 12 a.m. EST.
That's why I'm turning to you: I won by just 2 points in 2016, and I cannot afford to miss this goal or lose any ground. Races in Nevada are always tough, so I'm counting on you.
I wouldn't ask you personally like this if it weren't important. I need to raise another $6,275 by midnight -- and I can't miss this goal. **With Senate control on the line, every single dollar today could mean the difference between winning and losing tomorrow.**
**[Please, will you split a contribution of $5 right now between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33830011/300072577/-91831926?refcode=jr_em_nd_210810_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2Y3MTQwMy1mYmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N4uG6Le4eNlULlZgXfvhJzdfgdDmo6Lg_lZMJSeF-3c=)**
I can't thank you enough for chipping in at critical moments like this. Together, I know we can defend this seat -- and our Democratic Senate majority.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

name: Rob Ortt
subject: BREAKING NEWS: Governor Cuomo Resigns
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Statement From Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
| |
---
| STATEMENT FROM SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT ON GOVERNOR CUOMO'S RESIGNATION
Today marks one small step toward restoring honor, decency, and accountability to New York State government. I hope today also brings some measure of justice to the brave women who had the courage to come forward against a powerful and vindictive political figure.
Over the past year, Andrew Cuomo's credibility completely fell apart. Now, following his overdue resignation, it will never be repaired. The Governor's pervasive harassment and coverups cast a dark cloud over our State Capitol and took us away from the important work facing this state.
Andrew Cuomo broke the law, lied about it, and shamelessly smeared the women who came forward. His resignation is welcome, but it stops short of the justice his victims and the people of New York deserve. The FBI, the State Attorney General, and other proper authorities must also be allowed to continue their work investigating all of the possible crimes related to our state's nursing homes crisis and the Governor's questionable book deal. The Legislature must examine the Cuomo administration's many failings in public forums as soon as possible so that these abuses of power will never happen under another administration.
We must also acknowledge the fact that the Democrats in the Legislature failed to hold Andrew Cuomo or his administration accountable, despite our repeated calls to do so.
Well after the numerous credible allegations were made against Andrew Cuomo, Democrats in both the Senate and Assembly stood by him, normalizing his behavior and enabling him to cling to power. I hope those in the Legislature - and other powerful figures around the state - reflect on their own actions in response to Andrew Cuomo's disturbing behavior. The vocal support and the deafening silence of many helped keep Andrew Cuomo in power far longer than he deserved.
In 14 days we will have our first female Governor. I'd like to congratulate Lieutenant Governor Kathy Hochul, a fellow Western New Yorker, on becoming the first woman to assume leadership of this state. My fellow Senators and I look forward to working with Governor Hochul as we continue to tackle the issues of rising crime, our state's struggling economy, and the resurgence of the COVID-19 virus. ###

---
| | |
---
| | |
---

body:
We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before August 15th We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? Fellow Conservative,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=89b627633f65415d885c97e2a72c7dc1&_e=lVjYpDW1oeiqOOGLcB6CP1LH6RDQKaiRSfTa9E5WF3upK6O7GrxGxkETVI3EE4nTWSAD7mJP2uqOMkGHxxdOnvtb9KwAp3yWwD-sxZhlZVMC6UmwIch_psSGbW7UHb7q7WZa-fZcGt14G-izBUXjAZC9KF-hCuv_ATA1Vc1RnnWHKVwTy97JMhsODFA5f-SA99tISx4AC6g4_4Pw_YOEgxbWH6uVVx9ccJFEsDVI67sWoj6cXTZzmUhNgtlXuWdDZIWKJJN7OWSXjrlF-xnldHTsmGhIwBWcXDvS24ZhDoD_kPbXcXD8oHAGYLaw9NYUphBNF082jkbBYeads5j0PlcUieiYLqJoeDxg9wce96JL6awwCEwU98GawWhDeC-v94yic7KeZZz2tCIkeb38uYxWMB3uPRbRrUAlxraDogYgODg4swQ58Dr1-XVKq4MuVsoByYnR1bsTVlzgCgb_adZhLmxUR2C10jhlnXLnx_DtJDlm37uXJxl6GgJTaGV2d2h7N1r_0rf4RhSZeQAdkw%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

That's why before August 15th, **I’ve set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=89b627633f65415d885c97e2a72c7dc1&_e=lVjYpDW1oeiqOOGLcB6CP1LH6RDQKaiRSfTa9E5WF3upK6O7GrxGxkETVI3EE4nTWSAD7mJP2uqOMkGHxxdOnvtb9KwAp3yWwD-sxZhlZVMC6UmwIch_psSGbW7UHb7q7WZa-fZcGt14G-izBUXjAZC9KF-hCuv_ATA1Vc1RnnWHKVwTy97JMhsODFA5f-SA99tISx4AC6g4_4Pw_YOEgxbWH6uVVx9ccJFEsDVI67sWoj6cXTZzmUhNgtlXuWdDZIWKJJN7OWSXjrlF-xnldHTsmGhIwBWcXDvS24ZhDoD_kPbXcXD8oHAGYLaw9NYUhJwUQE563_b_J70-dO8lBSCiUAO34s2TiUB4jsMsNOOrL7oALToVK4G7C1gH1AtJ7lcMeh9WxFGFGLBeSZKwOI4WwY8qBKx5-XYReGGckmNsMI0uSfr1I6M8cdY5Vk6s-mvCzF0wK0ZKTYJj6S3Oiku27Yovdbpf29CBObO5qhyxEN8DxLmbpFkNzBTS4igCz1v3YtLYW2Wtl2W4zTEk2g%3D%3D) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have SIX days until August 15th and so far have collected just 59,000 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 6,833 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by August 15th **
