name: James Hartnett
subject: Fwd: How has he represented us?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw this email we sent out yesterday. I think it’s really important that we elect someone to represent our district who wants to actually pass legislation that will help us in our daily lives instead of propagating the Big Lie.
Rob Wittman hasn’t done that. He voted against certifying the 2020 election and then voted against the bipartisan commission to investigate the Capitol assault on January 6th. We deserve better. If you’re ready to help us flip this seat, chip in $20.22 to our campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn?refcode=210810-email&amount=20.22]
Thank you!
-- James

That means always putting what’s best for America ahead of what’s best for your party.
If you agree, chip in $10 to help Stewart fight for us in Congress. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn?refcode=210810-email&amount=10]
Unfortunately, our current representative’s priorities are out of step with what we need.
👎🏻 Wittman Voted AGAINST certifying the results of a free and fair election
👎🏻 He Voted AGAINST the bipartisan commission to investigate the assault on January 6th
👎🏻 He Voted AGAINST the Affordable Care Act
👎🏻 And he Voted AGAINST removing statues of Confederate leaders from the Capitol
Chip in $10 to Stewart Navarre’s campaign today to flip this seat! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn?refcode=210810-email&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We know we can flip this seat and elect someone who will always put his constituents first. But in order to do that, we have to DEFEAT Rob Wittman and elect Stewart to Congress!
Thank you.
-- Navarre for Congress HQ

name: Never Again PAC
subject: CNN: Trump’s $100 million threat to democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
New fundraising reports show that Donald Trump has raised more than $100 million for his political organization. After spending months pushing lies that the 2020 election was stolen, Trump's supporters have responded by pouring in money at an alarming rate to support his attacks on our democracy. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33832267/300080812/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyMjM3Zjk5LTAwZmEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-PI6IF581piw8TuO6vv7TRI5hy9EiixRGQfa01r2hb0=&emci=716054b5-f3f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=82237f99-00fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) **"Trump's $100 million threat to democracy"**
\-- _CNN_ Team,

New fundraising reports show that Donald Trump has raised more than **$100 million** for his political organization. After spending months pushing lies that the 2020 election was stolen, Trump's supporters have responded by pouring in money at an alarming rate to support his attacks on our democracy.

And it's no secret how this money will be spent. Trump will use the massive warchest he's building to elect candidates who support his election fraud lie and push his extremist agenda in Congress -- including re-electing the Treason Caucus.

Trump wants to buy the 2022 elections so he can maintain his power over our political system and undermine our democracy. We can't let him get away with it.

We might not have $100 million, but we have something better: this grassroots team. We can take on Trump's spending and defeat his candidates at the ballot box next year, but only if we all get to work right away.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more now to help ensure we have the resources needed to take on Trump's warchest and defeat the Treason Caucus next year?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33832268/300080813/654191739?gpsid=8_139_20016&refcode=em21_210810_100m_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210810_100m_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyMjM3Zjk5LTAwZmEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-PI6IF581piw8TuO6vv7TRI5hy9EiixRGQfa01r2hb0=)**

Thanks,

Never Again PAC Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33832269/300080814/654191739?gpsid=8_139_20016&refcode=em21_210810_100m_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210810_100m_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyMjM3Zjk5LTAwZmEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-PI6IF581piw8TuO6vv7TRI5hy9EiixRGQfa01r2hb0=)

name: Team Cheri Beasley
subject: How would you feel if we expanded our Senate majority?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We can make sure that Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans can’t obstruct our agenda.
#

With the way political pundits talk about the 2022 election, you’d think it’s just about Democrats defending the Senate majority. But we see it differently:
_It’s about expanding the Senate majority._
By electing more Democrats and expanding the majority, we can make sure Congress works for North Carolinians and actually gets things done. We can make sure that Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans can’t obstruct our agenda to protect voting rights, expand access to health care, and grow economic opportunity in our country.
That’s all possible. In fact, North Carolina is our best chance to do that. The Cook Political Report has rated this Senate race a toss up, and CNN is saying North Carolina is one of the states most likely to flip.
And Cheri Beasley is the one who can do it. She was the first African American woman ever elected statewide in North Carolina without first being appointed, and she’s the only candidate in this race — Democrat or Republican — who has won statewide twice.
**[If you’re ready to flip North Carolina and expand Democrats’ Senate majority, will you make a donation to our campaign today? Cheri is counting on a lot of grassroots support to bring new leadership to our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33832740/300082120/-1934872477?refcode2=e5319199-02fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210810-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTMxOTE5OS0wMmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xPcbozrQH-2s_0DQCkBlFJ68ZNuqnZWwfR-e2nfG9No=)**
We have the opportunity to make real progress and give all of our families a voice in Congress, but that starts with all of us doing our part to win this campaign.
\- Team Cheri Beasley

name: Nina Turner
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Friends —

No one person, not even the greatest candidate you can possibly imagine, ever runs for office by themselves.

It takes a team. And before we get too far from our election, I wanted to thank everyone who put themselves out there to endorse our campaign.

We united together on a mission to center the poor, the working poor and the barely middle class. We advanced policies that lift up families like Medicare for All, a $15 an hour minimum wage and the Green New Deal.

We know that no one election date erases the suffering of working families across this district or this nation — so the mission remains the same and we have more work to do.

Here’s a list.

Thank you. Your support meant the world to me.

Ohio Elected Officials
Senator Kenny Yuko, Ohio Senate Democratic Leader, District 25
Senator Nickie Antonio, Ohio Senate Assistant Minority Leader, District 23
Senator Sandra Williams, Ohio Senate District 21
Former Ohio Democratic Party Chair David Pepper

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: banned on Twitter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter -- Barack Obama hosts a maskless birthday bash with
Hollywood celebs. . .
Nancy Pelosi doesn't follow her own mask
mandates. . .
Fauci lied and people died. . .
But the moment I dare fight back on forced
vaccinations and mask mandates, Twitter suspends me for a week.

Twitter could suspend me permanently at any
moment.
And once that happens, the rest of the
Silicon Valley Cartel will come down swinging.
HELP MTG FIGHT BACK

EMERGENCY DONATE 17.76

Banning me on Twitter and Facebook is the
first step in their plot to defeat me. And it's exactly what they
did with President Trump.
You see, I reach tens of millions of people
through Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. . .
And once I lose those, I must only count on
expensive mediums like mail, email, text messaging, phone calls,
radio and TV ads, and rallies just to get my message out.
When you add all these up, defeating the
Democrats and defending my seat will get expensive.
Which is why I must ask you to chip in
17.76 right away to give me the resources to fight back.

HELP MTG FIGHT BACK

EMERGENCY DONATE 17.76

Democrats have already recruited several
candidates to defeat me.
One is even a DNC super delegate and Hillary
Clinton's top lieutenants in Georgia.

The Democrats, the Fake News Media, the
Silicon Valley Cartel are plotting to defeat me in 2022.
And shutting me down and silencing my voice
is the first step to make that happen.
So please, rush an emergency contribution
right away. Help me push back and get my message out.
Talk soon,
Marjorie Taylor Greene

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: RE: the IPCC’s latest report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

The United Nations Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) just released a report indicating that climate change has already done irreversible damage to our planet:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33834816/300089760/-1798932796?refcode2=330a80ab-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210810-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzBhODBhYi0wN2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQXzvej704c8WhMCxiT7vkJCjHui173RhxxmVxnchwo=&emci=320a80ab-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=330a80ab-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
**Now, let’s be clear: this didn’t have to happen.**
The IPCC has been sounding the alarm about the impact of CO2 emissions on climate change since 1990. In the over 30 years since, our leaders have kicked the can down the road on transformative climate action — all in the name of keeping corporations and billionaires happy.
We can’t go back and change those decisions, but we can still prevent the worst impacts of climate change if we act now. That’s why I’m reiterating my support for the Green New Deal, and my insistence that the reconciliation infrastructure bill being debated in Congress include climate action. I’m hoping you’ll join me:
[**Add your name if you agree that we need a Green New Deal now. We don’t have much time to act if we’re going to prevent the most catastrophic impacts of climate change.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33834817/300089761/-1798932796?refcode2=330a80ab-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210810-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzBhODBhYi0wN2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQXzvej704c8WhMCxiT7vkJCjHui173RhxxmVxnchwo=&emci=320a80ab-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=330a80ab-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
The incrementalism that’s defined our country’s approach to combating climate change over the past few decades simply isn’t going to cut it.
In the first six months of this year alone, the Interior Department has approved thousands of permits to drill for oil on public and tribal lands. Fracking causes water supply contamination that impacts millions of Americans each year. And while the White House is correct to promote electric vehicles as part of the way forward on climate policy, the solution is right in front of us: wholesale decarbonization.
We’ll continue to see severe droughts and wildfires, oil spills, major bodies of water on fire, and dangerous, unprecedented high temperatures if we don’t act now. Please, add your name to join me:
[**Sign on if you agree that we need a Green New Deal now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33834818/300089762/-1798932796?refcode2=330a80ab-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210810-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzBhODBhYi0wN2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQXzvej704c8WhMCxiT7vkJCjHui173RhxxmVxnchwo=&emci=320a80ab-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=330a80ab-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
I know that the news from the IPCC is discouraging, and it might even make you feel like giving up. But now is the time to fight back harder than ever against oil and fossil fuel executives — and the politicians who serve them — to secure a safe future for all.
Thank you, as always, for your support.
Mondaire

clean_body: The United Nations Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) just released a report indicating that climate change has already done irreversible damage to our planet: Now, let’s be clear: this didn’t have to happen. The IPCC has been sounding the alarm about the impact of CO2 emissions on climate change since 1990. In the over 30 years since, our leaders have kicked the can down the road on transformative climate action — all in the name of keeping corporations and billionaires happy. We can’t go back and change those decisions, but we can still prevent the worst impacts of climate change if we act now. That’s why I’m reiterating my support for the Green New Deal, and my insistence that the reconciliation infrastructure bill being debated in Congress include climate action. I’m hoping you’ll join me: The incrementalism that’s defined our country’s approach to combating climate change over the past few decades simply isn’t going to cut it. In the first six months of this year alone, the Interior Department has approved thousands of permits to drill for oil on public and tribal lands. Fracking causes water supply contamination that impacts millions of Americans each year. And while the White House is correct to promote electric vehicles as part of the way forward on climate policy, the solution is right in front of us: wholesale decarbonization. We’ll continue to see severe droughts and wildfires, oil spills, major bodies of water on fire, and dangerous, unprecedented high temperatures if we don’t act now. Please, add your name to join me: I know that the news from the IPCC is discouraging, and it might even make you feel like giving up. But now is the time to fight back harder than ever against oil and fossil fuel executives — and the politicians who serve them — to secure a safe future for all. Thank you, as always, for your support. Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. So, I guess that means I will have to shout a little louder. **Back in 2013, Joe and Hunter Biden flew on Air Force Two to China. Ten days later, Hunter Biden, a dropout with no business experience,_landed a $1.5 billion deal with a Communist Chinese Government 's Bank of China subsidiary._** Now, Biden is directing his administration to IGNORE the mounting evidence that COVID was engineered by China, who then KNOWINGLY released it on an unsuspecting world. The Biden crime family has used their political connections to strike corrupt business deals and then refusing to act to keep us safe. **[I have filed Articles of Impeachment against Joe Biden and I need your help to pressure Congress into taking the next steps for the sake of our nation.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/qvyDgTN0SW3ZNZZE1qLGsw/T3jml45qD9hX4IkK2ibIdw "I have filed Articles of Impeachment against Joe Biden and I need your help to pressure Congress into taking the next steps for the sake of our nation.")** **_I was recently on the Sebastian Gorka radio show to disclose the evidence of Joe Biden 's dereliction of duty. You can hear it all for yourself right here:_** [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/qvyDgTN0SW3ZNZZE1qLGsw/T3jml45qD9hX4IkK2ibIdw "Video") We now have a president in the Oval Office who is willing to cover up the documented truth about COVID if it allows his drug-addict son to make millions from his communist employers. **Biden is beholden to Beijing 's bribes, NOT the will of the American people.** **[We have the right to hold Beijing Biden accountable for his crimes against our nation and impeach him. If you support my efforts, please help me with your donation of $25, $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/25z4vQYmRIMS1mwtKtRH892g/T3jml45qD9hX4IkK2ibIdw "We have the right to hold Beijing Biden accountable for his crimes against our nation and impeach him. If you support my efforts, please help me with your donation of $25, $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!")** Unlike the false smears liberals used to attack President Trump, the facts about Joe Biden and his criminal family are well documented: Biden has a history of using his office to enrich his family at the expense of our nation. If we don't act now, Biden and his criminal family will continue to ENRICH themselves while America is destroyed by more Chinese bioweapons - while Joe fiddles in the Oval Office. **[Help me impeach Beijing Biden now with a donation of $45 or more today. Our country needs you.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/80YQRCrA0JWIB3FSfHSOqw/T3jml45qD9hX4IkK2ibIdw "Help me impeach Beijing Biden now with a donation of $45 or more today. Our country needs you.")** God Bless America, [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/qvyDgTN0SW3ZNZZE1qLGsw/T3jml45qD9hX4IkK2ibIdw "Marjorie Taylor Greene") Marjorie Taylor Greene

**It was startling to hear a LOUD BANG on my door at 6:00 in the morning -- and then to be greeted by 7 FBI agents, ready to raid my apartment.**
---
The agents proceeded to take seven or eight electronic devices from my home.
---
But there's one thing Biden's FBI agents refused to take: _Hunter Biden 's hard drive -- even though the warrant REQUIRED them to take it._
---
I'll tell you why they didn't take it...
---
...Because the hard drive contains EVIDENCE of the Biden Crime Family violating our country's laws for thirty years.
---
That's why liberal big tech corporations CENSORED me during the final weeks of the 2020 election every time I tried to expose incriminating evidence of the Biden Crime Family.
---
**And it 's also why the Deep State wants to throw me in jail.**
---
But, as you know, I'm a fighter just like President Trump.
---
_**Biden 's government goons can censor me, spy on me, and raid my apartment -- but I will NEVER stop fighting.**_
---
Now I hope you'll fight for my freedom.

---
While this fund I've set up is called the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, it's not only about __my_ freedom..._
---
...It's about YOURS.
---
We need to face the brutal fact that every single American citizen's rights hang in the balance in Biden's America.
---
If the federal government can get away with these police state tactics, then America as we know it is GONE.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for _OUR_ freedoms.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58107631:Jf0MTqlNi:m:1:3253819041:E280BEB4E0A8DF0D99BA3CB315303155:r)

Thank you,

| Peter,

The Senate officially passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill this morning, which is a huge win for all Americans, especially Wisconsinites. This infrastructure deal will create millions of good-paying jobs – jobs you can raise a middle-class family on.

We need an overhaul of our critical infrastructure in Wisconsin, and this bill will bring millions of dollars to fix roads and bridges, will help deliver clean drinking water and high speed internet to every household, and will create benefits in communities across the country for decades to come.

We’re building back better here, but to no surprise, **Ron Johnson voted _AGAINST_ the bipartisan bill which garnered strong support from both sides of the aisle.**

clean_body: And to no surprise, Ron Johnson voted against it. | | = | Peter, The Senate officially passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill this morning, which is a huge win for all Americans, especially Wisconsinites. This infrastructure deal will create millions of good-paying jobs – jobs you can raise a middle-class family on. We need an overhaul of our critical infrastructure in Wisconsin, and this bill will bring millions of dollars to fix roads and bridges, will help deliver clean drinking water and high speed internet to every household, and will create benefits in communities across the country for decades to come. We’re building back better here, but to no surprise, Ron Johnson voted AGAINST the bipartisan bill which garnered strong support from both sides of the aisle. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let’s celebrate this monumental bipartisan win, and keep pushing forward. -Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84c78f58f61149babcdffba34b9b4c1f&_e=zWVPsWN7IHMVJ7xPO1yYp8luxKufDAEq3N385ZgG5LIPg_LTB2KFvWupFsgWd9Ccxdiou6mfRqbr0fIRuy2hDuxAJ7LmfgIGrEwmtxYIKHEqDuZbXlIrDRmqiSSq_YY1WbZKt0JPQF1dmcPuPTxU5Sq8MDztdHD5Zo6-Y5O2MjVB6OA25B_lSMfsxaPBadKcx7fku-JWS3fg3HwSrNQ3_KY9j2M1NS7qwKG8SnthVPM736dUEMgbdktbcMG0YzbYacUcmHITyi2HzuKg89xmv6bjtefoyWUnlHUJuTR0-5z5B1hOX-dz_2F9ww-eb2bZsLxrXee2_4fOdWvLeVrgWA2HG6-CUygPwGp4N34pdk77xpZu12mjjgeqQBJo2M6-jJhMFWqKChkJksPdVg4NHGSPWl_TkYsp5imLexsWX2JppyHVivibfK_cT7VtPcaArZOxDEJmgIzoECSIvPtXZ8YO8udQbUDcGRF2onln9z0%3D)

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84c78f58f61149babcdffba34b9b4c1f&_e=zWVPsWN7IHMVJ7xPO1yYp8luxKufDAEq3N385ZgG5LIPg_LTB2KFvWupFsgWd9Ccxdiou6mfRqbr0fIRuy2hDuxAJ7LmfgIGrEwmtxYIKHEqDuZbXlIrDRmqiSSq_YY1WbZKt0JPQF1dmcPuPTxU5Sq8MDztdHD5Zo6-Y5O2MjVB6OA25B_lSMfsxaPBadKcx7fku-JWS3fg3HwSrNQ3_KY9j2M1NS7qwKG8SnthVPM736dUEMgbdktbcMG0YzbYacUcmHITyi2HzuKg89xmv_v5aaQQ-lGlAKXOiHhsli1BwO6lgcYVoQTDgPQLSIOSB0JQCkx8utgtOFVPtHWlh1W7jy7RzPRvq2q0ZAXkYvfbKBJW8gV0EMimde2aiyccca9MQwJ1KEjH3iRATBBhEWvQQIDmW6iSeKHrG9qwCet-mHNJ08xVYUBncTFSsZODA5Q1oNK4f3STHQlqCR4SPq1G-7T5igQ0cq-T50a8GgQ%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84c78f58f61149babcdffba34b9b4c1f&_e=zWVPsWN7IHMVJ7xPO1yYp8luxKufDAEq3N385ZgG5LIPg_LTB2KFvWupFsgWd9Ccxdiou6mfRqbr0fIRuy2hDuxAJ7LmfgIGrEwmtxYIKHEqDuZbXlIrDRmqiSSq_YY1WbZKt0JPQF1dmcPuPTxU5Sq8MDztdHD5Zo6-Y5O2MjVB6OA25B_lSMfsxaPBadKcx7fku-JWS3fg3HwSrNQ3_KY9j2M1NS7qwKG8SnthVPM736dUEMgbdktbcMG0YzbYacUcmHITyi2HzuKg89xmv_d_zMWa92t81eRWEuKUKEfQkuvJqBTLgAnChgMKa_GSFVu0DLTrMUhAUpJucjVhc4Oj_bMj8vs4vZrrRWz3f0eORwHxypH-Sx4hSAoTcTZm0r8n_afjVMWxME2d1HjSftSFi9ao-bdHbsQkOM1-HgeUQ0PPX8vP0rKi1vCEqcqkduQMyNrF8X-4f-kZCU9VjEp6LmtenI0jZ8W_iBvhGag%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84c78f58f61149babcdffba34b9b4c1f&_e=zWVPsWN7IHMVJ7xPO1yYp8luxKufDAEq3N385ZgG5LIPg_LTB2KFvWupFsgWd9Ccxdiou6mfRqbr0fIRuy2hDuxAJ7LmfgIGrEwmtxYIKHEqDuZbXlIrDRmqiSSq_YY1WbZKt0JPQF1dmcPuPTxU5Sq8MDztdHD5Zo6-Y5O2MjVB6OA25B_lSMfsxaPBadKcx7fku-JWS3fg3HwSrNQ3_KY9j2M1NS7qwKG8SnthVPM736dUEMgbdktbcMG0YzbYacUcmHITyi2HzuKg89xmv0Ji3hIfQ5GisU7DaH38wjuee6zGbJeX4H3J_ZmJVOXrUkhdZQdCQ7NKJmqDTuckwYLSTGgSgL73yq1JjiQ-5YjcQdQNnB0CTJ8hJTpK93T1WVjzEV9uzPeP-36FCy_KV_xzmWG9n4AygkVfoM_ZooxCn6TJMPjWKFoLF4Jz0BWyivKBsNyp9Wg9EGFChHCFEo2wGkS21HoqxDwue_b9oOo%3D)**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84c78f58f61149babcdffba34b9b4c1f&_e=zWVPsWN7IHMVJ7xPO1yYp8luxKufDAEq3N385ZgG5LIPg_LTB2KFvWupFsgWd9Ccxdiou6mfRqbr0fIRuy2hDuxAJ7LmfgIGrEwmtxYIKHEqDuZbXlIrDRmqiSSq_YY1WbZKt0JPQF1dmcPuPTxU5Sq8MDztdHD5Zo6-Y5O2MjVB6OA25B_lSMfsxaPBadKcx7fku-JWS3fg3HwSrNQ3_KY9j2M1NS7qwKG8SnthVPM736dUEMgbdktbcMG0YzbYacUcmHITyi2HzuKg89xmv5bojZz2x6YG8FGA3XOikNl6ntPJ-Zv68Z_NVzwEs2Lr3ebvmWCz1iFLESko6a1fbgfbExDjjHRVaN1g669d8LtpLegNLHVHyZI_Y_Nwa1iWzqjblIJAlt9LYU3uSZ6xP6fpgpoo6AvjZKhPJ1rw1MqrUwDLzV53qVu_VArPuy0BHlwGcRuY2O3MNqwdcwVpoTt6KFMHJWtCOfZo6sKICsk%3D)
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84c78f58f61149babcdffba34b9b4c1f&_e=zWVPsWN7IHMVJ7xPO1yYp8luxKufDAEq3N385ZgG5LIPg_LTB2KFvWupFsgWd9Ccxdiou6mfRqbr0fIRuy2hDuxAJ7LmfgIGrEwmtxYIKHEqDuZbXlIrDRmqiSSq_YY1WbZKt0JPQF1dmcPuPTxU5Sq8MDztdHD5Zo6-Y5O2MjVB6OA25B_lSMfsxaPBadKcx7fku-JWS3fg3HwSrNQ3_KY9j2M1NS7qwKG8SnthVPM736dUEMgbdktbcMG0YzbYacUcmHITyi2HzuKg89xmv3fUWN5rfowSUseNMYtKya5GFcqPH3NNsv6H42fIOGRnskN4akSlrNytqGIYmfplqz3EqDwhT4hpVUt88Rp24UAKKst7BdBPjlQQeDQB4nbJzM0oks3Cnc3ejd2INhHd7g07ix634JULesenMAry3ACvxfQ5OWT9eFQzd9NnobOYEmTB-uswmWgEzIkYkkCzcDGv5abz7JYrkY1SnfPLpvs%3D)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84c78f58f61149babcdffba34b9b4c1f&_e=zWVPsWN7IHMVJ7xPO1yYp8luxKufDAEq3N385ZgG5LIPg_LTB2KFvWupFsgWd9Ccxdiou6mfRqbr0fIRuy2hDuxAJ7LmfgIGrEwmtxYIKHEqDuZbXlIrDRmqiSSq_YY1WbZKt0JPQF1dmcPuPTxU5Sq8MDztdHD5Zo6-Y5O2MjVB6OA25B_lSMfsxaPBadKcx7fku-JWS3fg3HwSrNQ3_KY9j2M1NS7qwKG8SnthVPM736dUEMgbdktbcMG0YzbYacUcmHITyi2HzuKg89xmvyKy9An7YzDlURUxx6I4xVNo7LW3S4s5a2zX337GFNWIdyUojLvi4fwEwbnGTUJPoDAvumTaI8QnM5EtILXve9oy3szGGTgdZobPFQXHcSEcASSNVauzj9OIMjaed17tqnFehuexzFK8iQA8jxQn4YLFrJd9D8mzyAxuZn2ESRkxSbrxaW7sicKhDwSjN7wtVQy4RNewTfWb5qC3c2Q4eEU%3D)

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won’t you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84c78f58f61149babcdffba34b9b4c1f&_e=zWVPsWN7IHMVJ7xPO1yYp8luxKufDAEq3N385ZgG5LIPg_LTB2KFvWupFsgWd9Ccxdiou6mfRqbr0fIRuy2hDuxAJ7LmfgIGrEwmtxYIKHEqDuZbXlIrDRmqiSSq_YY1WbZKt0JPQF1dmcPuPTxU5Sq8MDztdHD5Zo6-Y5O2MjVB6OA25B_lSMfsxaPBadKcx7fku-JWS3fg3HwSrNQ3_KY9j2M1NS7qwKG8SnthVPM736dUEMgbdktbcMG0YzbYacUcmHITyi2HzuKg89xmvyigHOudizRCOnshG1NhqmP8nvTfAc7eN6PFDDzI3k4axIr1O8N4sQF6ODxIWH1LMuf8H0ZAWkJVgjBwR2XytjV5nF2qLjKChme_QJ8jbX1siMXXx_w2cdMTy-vORJ8M2eX4JnBMl8hvZJEElOIEahYHDge1DoTDc02VNbNTaxLpmxposEmLQXfZkkkNVr7wadFMuDPyzTGYL6A8d7DcADM%3D)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84c78f58f61149babcdffba34b9b4c1f&_e=zWVPsWN7IHMVJ7xPO1yYp8luxKufDAEq3N385ZgG5LIPg_LTB2KFvWupFsgWd9Ccxdiou6mfRqbr0fIRuy2hDuxAJ7LmfgIGrEwmtxYIKHEqDuZbXlIrDRmqiSSq_YY1WbZKt0JPQF1dmcPuPTxU5Sq8MDztdHD5Zo6-Y5O2MjVB6OA25B_lSMfsxaPBadKcx7fku-JWS3fg3HwSrNQ3_KY9j2M1NS7qwKG8SnthVPM736dUEMgbdktbcMG0YzbYacUcmHITyi2HzuKg89xmv3rdQiXrZQUEdQR6OZ1QgVMvH1KuZSyxqvLQCeqSUoPbI7ePqClrkBFSZ2a6LS6117L5aABRIkHOjkcjcYZNP8ucQIFYyE6AL-3cT46u1p5fhpgl6cYLkS9nn7Ib_K7QLzbNPMFhA3TXzMJfEWf7lSOTpf1gKlVRW5W-yH6OdOmozTPaMyASc1XBym0YlCEydtUEeFDd6OuSzD2A6eEQvSE%3D)**

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces. It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that. In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia Don't want to receive our emails?

| | Folks-

We are heading into the fight of our lives here in Virginia and we have current delegates that definitely are going to need your help. With everything at stake, we cannot risk to lose one seat, especially down in Virginia Beach with one of our favorite candidates, Kelly Convirs-Fowler.
[LET'S BEAT REPUBLICANS IN YOUNGKIN'S HOMETOWN](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=17383cf84f&e=76fc145c69)

She was one of the women who helped flip 15 seats back in 2017 in House of Delegates, a feat many people didn't think was possible that year. Delegate Convirs-Fowler helped us down the road to recovery during the Trump years and she is going to need our help now. With her in the legislature, Virginia has been able to deliver on so many Progressive promises and we know that she will be even more effective in years to come.
[Rush your contribution now!](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=54442e35cc&e=76fc145c69)
Since Republicans are focused on turning out so many voters in Glenn Youngkin's hometown down in Virginia Beach, Kelly is going to need our help now more than ever. They going to be writing big checks but we rely on people like you. [Can you help us out by contributing $10, $20, or even $100, to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=c7fdb326fe&e=76fc145c69)[ to protect Kelly in her re-election? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=ce20bfb6d6&e=76fc145c69)

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends — Right now, we are facing opposition on two fronts. Let me explain.
1. We’re going through a Republican recall attempt in California — one that is led by anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees.
2. Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have made it clear they will govern from the minority by using the filibuster.

So now you may be thinking, “Okay, well, what can we do?”
And the answer is that we have to fight hard and fight together. We have a few short weeks left to beat back the Republican Recall, and once we do that, we must shift our focus to eliminating the filibuster immediately.
Doing this will give us the best shot at delivering on our bold progressive agenda. And I refuse to let Republicans block our progress. But I can’t do it alone.
[**That’s why today I’m humbly asking you to make a $3 contribution to my Senate campaign. If we want to defeat the recall and eliminate the filibuster, we are going to need the resources to fight back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?source=em210810-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=230_159979_d3O3G_&akid=230%2E159979%2Ed3O3G_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

We absolutely cannot allow Senate Republicans to take back the majority. That’s why it’s crucial that we have the resources to defend our Senate majority and keep Mitch McConnell out of power indefinitely.
So thank you for your ongoing support, it means so much.
Warmly,
—Alex
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?source=em210810-1-subs&t=26&refcode2=230_159979_d3O3G_&akid=230%2E159979%2Ed3O3G_)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I need 8,000 signatures by midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We still need your signature on our petition if we're going to reach our goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts to flip the House We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=3012080a199842e49d38fbb562d9b215&_t=J2NX7NntqGOX0M1vxQ26nHMOdZW-u01_glrVzlHDHqAns9x_erOEd5HaJKObIgJbbqiunRWAvgHm_rHuTKIASyBFhtIkBqofZCc4zCZL16Obx_ShqaaJ9TS29ByXqdoQXU4JPxFQuGlUxiRS6RXbHV0r4-YR5T5BEE64eI2LyVo%3D)

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3012080a199842e49d38fbb562d9b215&_e=WpBoYnqJK7n7Rrhp0yU3YQ-rz2tOGMMxBX21K3SYwXlqRh2Aqz8ewN6VjkMteN_VScPjVTsfR53SAgdHgu12Z5TE_G-iWao3vhHx3xyDyXxhGZEtE7jJIOkbKVh_QD5X023fuLaT5t1ABk1EWMQALL7WdSFI0YrwJZNbOyC-fHWliiqhEO2K_u7o-_eJ4GfSIFGAfj4TE3gDT4sRLTBdOyQD6AWjvUTA19p3Wg1vEB0jV1fmbuu0wa3jh8KjomnlZqJ4Czm-OnXZp6NYAg4ojBRXcN2iMdGdKUnUTakqHMFsltvwSIeJmn4DCTMkZ9PSqeFSRXFQ9-8kYuJxTxIUdl-Ec5Ab-W53JjPHSa8-3XSFvgY6bi6EtPhV6kvuzRiLApbogzA9EdNljCm0GZoA7-gNxF0NV90kW_7BiJikpMCql9vh-ou-WfAi4vMwCCKjk96FgD_U6QFcY8vq4Enjw6P3jyyH6xOW8F04hB1SnXsflbwvwhsCEttx997gB3C10fdBg6l2tJ_voYmwpqSmJA%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3012080a199842e49d38fbb562d9b215&_e=WpBoYnqJK7n7Rrhp0yU3YQ-rz2tOGMMxBX21K3SYwXlqRh2Aqz8ewN6VjkMteN_VScPjVTsfR53SAgdHgu12Z5TE_G-iWao3vhHx3xyDyXxhGZEtE7jJIOkbKVh_QD5X023fuLaT5t1ABk1EWMQALL7WdSFI0YrwJZNbOyC-fHWliiqhEO2K_u7o-_eJ4GfSIFGAfj4TE3gDT4sRLTBdOyQD6AWjvUTA19p3Wg1vEB0jV1fmbuu0wa3jh8KjomnlZqJ4Czm-OnXZp6NYAg4ojBRXcN2iMdGdKUnUTakqHMFsltvwSIeJmn4DCTMkZ9PS5GUJs49tzPWCp7PRYeyHxN7ANFeS--rAiG2Nl3ToQFXRtPM0RGHlzyasqh872i32J-XdRHi0uPrVUbGY4XWogUFN2mSCCZAtNjrLopAjLnkDUbRMRIzNWO1ug5cZqBaiLo4QrUGKuxRnj1SelLLInw7uyxbqsvyREFa6yy5BZ3GG1qcfqoaU5xq7GIYT_3dX4y1SJadvBW1fl42OWjghPw%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

That's why before August 15th, **I’ve set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3012080a199842e49d38fbb562d9b215&_e=WpBoYnqJK7n7Rrhp0yU3YQ-rz2tOGMMxBX21K3SYwXlqRh2Aqz8ewN6VjkMteN_VScPjVTsfR53SAgdHgu12Z5TE_G-iWao3vhHx3xyDyXxhGZEtE7jJIOkbKVh_QD5X023fuLaT5t1ABk1EWMQALL7WdSFI0YrwJZNbOyC-fHWliiqhEO2K_u7o-_eJ4GfSIFGAfj4TE3gDT4sRLTBdOyQD6AWjvUTA19p3Wg1vEB0jV1fmbuu0wa3jh8KjomnlZqJ4Czm-OnXZp6NYAg4ojBRXcN2iMdGdKUnUTakqHMFsltvwSIeJmn4DCTMkZ9PSxIsa83nJzRwbdKWusk3jW_N6NFXAFJ3ozGV1sOVnEhhKx95irKLzDvxx6ZX1d_fyExbn1Sb97703tPUiw2PWr4dKhtk4NhaMwBN1EwSMNWpv-sZn7Ml1abHftO6MHCIRF1u3zB96YNQ8roU8dBEI8AASpo1OrVnuOgWxHDkrt6l0zgx22zE28P-No45nYl571N48Tjdt4AxMTd9Tc5jdJQ%3D%3D) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have SIX days until August 15th and so far have collected just 59,000 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 6,833 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by August 15th **

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3012080a199842e49d38fbb562d9b215&_e=WpBoYnqJK7n7Rrhp0yU3YQ-rz2tOGMMxBX21K3SYwXlqRh2Aqz8ewN6VjkMteN_VScPjVTsfR53SAgdHgu12Z5TE_G-iWao3vhHx3xyDyXxhGZEtE7jJIOkbKVh_QD5X023fuLaT5t1ABk1EWMQALL7WdSFI0YrwJZNbOyC-fHWliiqhEO2K_u7o-_eJ4GfSIFGAfj4TE3gDT4sRLTBdOyQD6AWjvUTA19p3Wg1vEB0jV1fmbuu0wa3jh8KjomnlZqJ4Czm-OnXZp6NYAg4ojBRXcN2iMdGdKUnUTakqHMFsltvwSIeJmn4DCTMkZ9PS0iYwJagmJDOPQP9hTn4emmXRfnsgNuT4PHsUWrgNXtjlLBT6eMBPU5rF5uKI9TDMRjE82AU6l_Ond1appc7HQ4t13ZvEbm89PbE037tPIpRebwB9dvrweo3GDgkKdfw3vXzljbMP_ZaLZHtTtKbggqv5C-A1uCHJA7SGFBQCtSjMbU4mCd5Z-8O4N187YlVIJgSi_LJrVjy8WgA4JSfhqQ%3D%3D)

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3012080a199842e49d38fbb562d9b215&_e=WpBoYnqJK7n7Rrhp0yU3YQ-rz2tOGMMxBX21K3SYwXlqRh2Aqz8ewN6VjkMteN_VScPjVTsfR53SAgdHgu12Z5TE_G-iWao3vhHx3xyDyXxhGZEtE7jJIOkbKVh_QD5X023fuLaT5t1ABk1EWMQALL7WdSFI0YrwJZNbOyC-fHWliiqhEO2K_u7o-_eJ4GfSIFGAfj4TE3gDT4sRLTBdOyQD6AWjvUTA19p3Wg1vEB0jV1fmbuu0wa3jh8KjomnlZqJ4Czm-OnXZp6NYAg4ojBRXcN2iMdGdKUnUTakqHMFsltvwSIeJmn4DCTMkZ9PSpmuOruqSjeZ70Bo5SeextAo9YLvZ4y-74JKRtJXPNmHVU-A7EjJ0XO674xcmgG9DcqTbB_mgTiZWEQWR_Mi3t4dLLwFPRft8IXcOgBGZ3zvZuwjRwjVc3AqKfA36noRq4SvV_nx0gQoy3qUjRGIajq85ow7ovN9Ug8lcv7q9j0r8fhFeciGcHnelbbxUHedXmddZmZf_ZDjGVOUGJ2Hj2Q%3D%3D)**.

Thank you for your support.

name: Karen Bass
subject: Three people a day die at the hands of police.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hello --

There are over 18,000 police departments in America. All 18,000 police the communities they serve differently. And team, **it shows.**

**Can you imagine doctors having no accountability, standards, or transparency in their profession? That 's how the policing system operates in the United States. **

On average, three people die at the hands of the police _every single day_. Prosecuting an officer is nearly impossible -- charges either aren't brought or they don't stick. So, when I think about the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, I think about accountability.

I introduced the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act in Congress to create a national standard in policing. It will ban no-knock warrants and deadly chokeholds and create a national registry for problem officers.

**[Will you sign your name now as a citizen co-sponsor of the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act? Stand with the American people demanding policing reform.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2HlKqMM8Y3TEEAHcEE1LdTvd4dfghyKZ7bc5-JiobJY=/86ib2Kb1EXuCi38j_GCCfa3JFPAZ1cRA12XVBkdWVe8=?gpsid=39_132_20108&ms=em21_210810_jipa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210810_jipa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210810_jipa_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act is about bringing policing into the 21st century and making police officers accountable to the people like any other profession. My goal is to send this historic bill to the president's desk for a signature as soon as possible, and I won't rest until transparency and accountability are guaranteed for every single American.

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.

We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2HlKqMM8Y3TEEAHcEE1LdTvd4dfghyKZ7bc5-JiobJY=/eDsh1gi4OidU10XSgiuE8-SE22B1qOl3C7PsHKLFnOY=).
clean_body: Hello -- There are over 18,000 police departments in America. All 18,000 police the communities they serve differently. And team, it shows. Can you imagine doctors having no accountability, standards, or transparency in their profession? That 's how the policing system operates in the United States. On average, three people die at the hands of the police every single day. Prosecuting an officer is nearly impossible -- charges either aren't brought or they don't stick. So, when I think about the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, I think about accountability. I introduced the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act in Congress to create a national standard in policing. It will ban no-knock warrants and deadly chokeholds and create a national registry for problem officers. The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act is about bringing policing into the 21st century and making police officers accountable to the people like any other profession. My goal is to send this historic bill to the president's desk for a signature as soon as possible, and I won't rest until transparency and accountability are guaranteed for every single American. In solidarity, Karen Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today. Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress Bass for Congress 918 Pennsylvania Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 United States We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please =.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends —
You’ve been hearing a lot from my team this month about the NSSF and their rise to power. I wanted to take a moment to reach out myself and shed some light on why this is so important. Will you give me a chance to explain?
As you may know by now, the group we are increasingly concerned with is the NSSF, the National Shooting Sports Foundation. They have been gaining influence lately and are actually outspending the NRA right now. They’ve been running TV spots in Maine and West Virginia to a total of $1 million to try and stop us from confirming David Chipman as the next ATF Director.
And the problem is their efforts seem to be working. They are employing the same fear mongering playbook as the NRA to bully vulnerable Senators to vote with them.
So as the NRA deals with its own problems, the “new NRA," the NSSF is stepping up to take their place and we have to be ready to go head-to-head with a new opponent. That is why today, I have to ask:
[**If you are able, will you chip in $3 today to help us go head-to-head with the NSSF? We are so close to enacting change — real change — for our communities and we can’t afford to lose that opportunity now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210810-1-15&t=1&refcode2=469_3935704_P4nC9I&akid=469%2E3935704%2EP4nC9I)

| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=20&refcode2=469_3935704_P4nC9I&akid=469%2E3935704%2EP4nC9I)**

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=22&refcode2=469_3935704_P4nC9I&akid=469%2E3935704%2EP4nC9I)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=23&refcode2=469_3935704_P4nC9I&akid=469%2E3935704%2EP4nC9I)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=24&refcode2=469_3935704_P4nC9I&akid=469%2E3935704%2EP4nC9I)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=25&refcode2=469_3935704_P4nC9I&akid=469%2E3935704%2EP4nC9I)**
---
****
Both the NRA and the NSSF will go to extreme lengths to prevent us from making real change. And they could be successful if we don’t intervene.
But we've gone toe-to-toe with groups like this before — the simple fact that the NRA is a shell of what it once was is a huge testament to the strength of our movement.
And we know that if all of us fight back, we will defeat them and end their influence over Washington for good.
So thank you so much for continuing to support the lifesaving work we’re doing here. It means so much to me and the entire team at Giffords.
My very best,
—Gabby
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210810-1-15&t=26&refcode2=469_3935704_P4nC9I&akid=469%2E3935704%2EP4nC9I)**

name: Team Kilmer
subject: BIG investment in affordable housing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Challenges with affordable housing and homelessness existed in our region well before the COVID-19 pandemic. In fact, the United States underproduced housing by 7.3 million homes between 2000 and 2015. Sadly, the pandemic has only exacerbated the housing crisis, and Derek is addressing this issue in Congress head-on.

Derek's working to get the resources we need to create more workforce housing, more senior housing, more homeless housing, and **_more affordable housing, period._**

He and his colleagues in the House passed critical affordable housing bills that included funding for local affordable housing projects in Tacoma, Bremerton, and elsewhere. These critical investments in our community will:
* Create hundreds of units of affordable housing;
* Fund commercial space for predominantly BIPOC-owned businesses;
* Invest in the revitalization of our communities;
* Generate new, local jobs;
* And so much more.

This bill is part of President Biden and Congress' promise to build our country back better -- not return to pre-pandemic normalcy. **[Join Derek in this fight and sign on to show your support for investing in affordable housing. Add your name today»](https://act.myngp.com/el/EQHffjVd0Qq8AC1FPvjMFp66dYpvoCEp_RaZwU9iWcA=/i3HMdr-1k6COQ2u2yFjWQUNT_qvbtp8OUeEOo9bWk9E=?gpsid=50_130_20106&ms=em21_210810_AffHsn_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx_v1&refcode=em21_210810_AffHsn_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx_v1&utm_campaign=em21_210810_AffHsn_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx_v1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

Friend, grassroots efforts win campaigns.
While our opponents rely on huge checks from special interests, we're building this campaign from the ground up with pure people-power.
It's one thing to be endorsed by big oil and pharmaceutical companies, or the AZ GOP's biggest donors. We want to prove who Kirsten's supported by -- the people on the ground right here in AZ-02.
[**It's easy -- click here to join Team Engel as an official grassroots endorser of our people-powered campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33838331/300101331/-1901044772?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2FkYjk3NS0xM2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=40tzD4TT70fDTiOckXGL0wddAIqOhnCxRqv9zeyO7Ic=&emci=8fc207a2-4ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c3adb975-13fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=12898431)
Kirsten has everything she needs to win this race and defend our Democratic majority. She has a proven track record of fighting for public schools, expanding access to healthcare, and finding new and innovative ways to address climate change. She understands the challenges everyday Arizonans are facing. And she'll use her experience as a University of Arizona professor, legislator, and working mom to fight for Southern Arizona.
We don't need huge checks that come at the expense of our values. _As long as we have you._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33838332/300101332/-1901044772?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2FkYjk3NS0xM2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=40tzD4TT70fDTiOckXGL0wddAIqOhnCxRqv9zeyO7Ic=&emci=8fc207a2-4ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c3adb975-13fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=12898431)

Team Engel

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Mitch McConnell GONE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)

[**I don 't have a second to waste. Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans just raised a WHOPPING $28 MILLION to defeat our Democrats and buy their way back into power. If I don't respond to their cash grab IMMEDIATELY, our hopes of protecting our Democratic Majorities will VANISH. Can you rush $3 before midnight to STOP a Republican takeover and PROTECT our House Majority? I'm calling for 2,OOO gifts to close the gap and defend our House Democrats >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)

I'm shocked.

**FIRST:** McConnell FUMED when our Democrats flipped his precious Senate Majority.

**THEN:** He admitted he would do ANYTHING to oppose President Biden and sabotage our progress.

**NOW:** McConnell and his Republicans just raised $28 MILLION to defeat our Senate Democrats and barge back into power.

**[I'm calling for 2,OOO gifts to respond to this Republican cash grab and protect our hard-fought House Majority. Will you rush $3 before midnight to protect my House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_aGxf2rq8Pf_)**

This is an all-hands-on-deck moment.

The last time McConnell's Republicans held the Majority...

...they voted to **REPEAL** our health care, **DESTROY** Social Security, and appointed right-wing judges for **LIFE**.

[**I cannot overstate the importance of this moment: I 'm calling for 2,OOO gifts within the next 13 hours to DEFEND our House Majority and prevent a total Republican takeover. Can I count on your $3 to elect House Democrats nationwide? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)

| | Peter, We knew this was going to happen. Senator Todd Young is back to speaking out of both sides of his mouth. This time, he's turning his back on Hoosiers and the opportunity to create a better tomorrow for our families. Just a few days ago, Todd Young called President Biden's infrastructure deal a "historic investment" for Indiana. Now, Young is so scared of Donald Trump that he's willing to betray Hoosiers like you who are asking for high-wage jobs, stronger roads and bridges, and further expansion for broadband internet. It was the end of the game when Hoosiers needed him the most, and Todd Young decided to sit on the bench. Hey Fellow Conservative,

It’s Brian Hawkins here and I have some astonishing news to share. The Democrats have taken notice of my race and are dumping millions into my district to defeat me.

_Why?_ **They can’t stand to see a free-thinking, black, conservative pastor threaten their House Majority. In fact, they can’t stand to see a black conservative AT ALL.**

Democrats think they own my vote simply because of the color of my skin. They think I need to support their radical-Left slush funds like the Black Lives Matter Organization just because of the color of my skin. **They are WRONG.**

Now, I am on a mission to break the chains Democrats have put black Americans like myself in for decades and encourage my black brothers and sisters to think freely immediately. [**But I need your help to succeed, Fellow Conservative.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e5200e3c2655488aaba492c98c729ee0&_e=ETtqVp4pNXuS_XkoY_Q55Y7SvNVcXtVunppy9UBq_HVySNZnJF8PvkdR_YjztFXVcJoRwsqYzOSN9kZGVn1fqOOJzcmoEmJLCGeGyx6hWtRQrcFS1aEld28iwY32sRO_M5h_FwQhOwAQ5Tm1u7I5IK2xYAZqvjmoynIpYatHQk96NrcsELZz-cA7UcXBIqL_ngZ0QDcdInd5Lid4a9vh-eN_VBRaxRdCKviBwUugnzxiS23XyaKz7-HGGshmVg5yxf_uY6JRVQdwUeicR7pXUc3LN3bsQIYtCJxrero6cuUaZdnCT3wnGkYYHu6vUX4ACtSl6Jogj5Gs_hNnca1KX6JRleS5-_k5YpCWtUKfiu5BWGysDk9sF9tFYRBuC2myi0QnTUpiFIcs2URavt14CmB1riQNig8iFjSKspPi-g9PLeDfW9zyLzzppvqcyvMa0jjjyrtcgRRkalo3CTZYwA%3D%3D)

**The average donation to the Black Lives Matter Organization in 2020 was $30. Radical Democrats fooled Americans into donating over $90 MILLION to this racist organization to fund their campaigns.**

[**I am asking every conservative tired of the Left’s race-hustling agenda to pitch in just $15 to my campaign immediately - that’s only HALF of the average donation to BLM.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e5200e3c2655488aaba492c98c729ee0&_e=ETtqVp4pNXuS_XkoY_Q55Y7SvNVcXtVunppy9UBq_HVySNZnJF8PvkdR_YjztFXVcJoRwsqYzOSN9kZGVn1fqOOJzcmoEmJLCGeGyx6hWtRQrcFS1aEld28iwY32sRO_M5h_FwQhOwAQ5Tm1u7I5IK2xYAZqvjmoynIpYatHQk96NrcsELZz-cA7UcXBIqL_ngZ0QDcdInd5Lid4a9vh-eN_VBRaxRdCKviBwUugnzxiS23XyaKz7-HGGshmVg5yO4GJ1BzujWaB9lQgWJCDrQG0nNJ82-eglI5jpczGVudPB9Qv-Sw8f6jUjM-Cj6VgEA2T0GUlLlcNigyE5ZUyH_kmCyMHVb9yiLYQKiX8s7BnXbY7WFWpBlYFARL5xi08MVSTDCONnQby7y__j9i9CDkt6EEXuYL0YVCKanzSEE1zXSYfHN8YvoGWwvR975VTHFd9y3R8ZLK7vr4N1otdgA%3D%3D)

I am running in one of the most winnable Congressional districts in the country. Republicans only need to flip FIVE House seats next year to put Democrats on the back bench, and my district is within reach.

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b7325700e794a4f9068d00aa2824d65&_e=EG03Tuw8rOeE6IYRCp43g9lriXSrWZv1yeE8Wl5i-ZI9eScNHX2J5PK0RRwyyMXDBesZ0nsc-ffEnq9hI9Hs0FFkNEj9mMYzDSHYwEQ0WAoqXhVAeXy3eAAYDZffQLeXp_tF7FvTyRdKhQSoQBq5ewmJyzXcEep2IU4sN6KOsMm5MVer9WmuOsmfS4QJzOY_AlwgR8kzAYqxuZJN9hJw22mgpvnJ0lWzd6tfGy5ppVanBspMbUQ5k4J8dTPoaoGVssTpharRG4_wchQu1eOSGx_7AQ6Ken4ZupKrH1pv65K0l4FKRU6V46mJ1eawobVjiA84Zon-10wFnXBCxrrJoJx0ySId6NW2XJ1XxBYPGpiwekkcQHThWDtiYOexjLzppTuj7a1Wff1axg50_26WLkcvjfCAVCZ_aHENqnmp7-oRFKUNd46JxHFenyo70rvDl9T0hEaE7lg57wiLA2-MROZkyz5oEvwedBQsNkIwgNHOlfG0paoYwYBxIAKtA_mk)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. clean_body: September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | Peter, Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party. My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this! Here’s my elevator pitch to you : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign. September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office. I’m the man I am today because ISIS (Islamic State) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012. I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a CIA conference focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country. | We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great. I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us! I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas. Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills. But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. . In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces. It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that. In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Mark Kelly
subject: humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I have an important request for you today. I want to ask you to make a donation to support this campaign. But before I ask, I first want to express my gratitude for all you’ve done to get us to this moment.
Thanks to your efforts last year, we brought real change to Congress. I’m amazed by the grassroots team we’ve built and the power we have to improve people’s lives.
But as we’ve known all along, last year’s election was just a beginning. The real work begins now, and it has never been more urgent for us to deliver change for Americans.
So far, we’ve delivered relief to millions of Americans during the COVID crisis, and worked to rebuild our economy. But former President Trump and National Republicans have made clear they’re still set on taking this seat.
**We have to do everything we can to defend this seat, and I’m going to need you with me, friend. That’s why today I have to ask:**
[**If you’re able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goals and fight for change.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210810-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1126_6688874_z74cyg&akid=1126%2E6688874%2Ez74cyg)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1126_6688874_z74cyg&akid=1126%2E6688874%2Ez74cyg)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1126_6688874_z74cyg&akid=1126%2E6688874%2Ez74cyg)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1126_6688874_z74cyg&akid=1126%2E6688874%2Ez74cyg)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1126_6688874_z74cyg&akid=1126%2E6688874%2Ez74cyg)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1126_6688874_z74cyg&akid=1126%2E6688874%2Ez74cyg)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210810-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1126_6688874_z74cyg&akid=1126%2E6688874%2Ez74cyg)**
---
****
I’m going to check back in over the course of the month to update you on our progress. I’m hopeful that with your support we can continue fueling this people-powered campaign to improve people’s lives.
I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you’ve put into this campaign. It means the world to me to have so many of you supporting us and the fight for our shared values.
Full speed ahead!
— Mark
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210810-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1126_6688874_z74cyg&akid=1126%2E6688874%2Ez74cyg)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1126%2E6688874%2Ez74cyg).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33839973/300110131/602283465?refcode=20210810_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2JkZTVjNC0xOGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVNlIVpgLDdhRrRCLA8qdvh6TfFf7G55e1_r28HrxJY=)
Folks, we’ll be honest: we weren’t expecting this. **One of our self-funding Republican opponents is blanketing the airwaves with $10 million in ads** \-- with a lot of that cash coming from his own pockets. It’s clear the GOP thinks they can buy Ohio’s open Senate seat. We didn't expect Tim’s opponents to spend this much money this early. They know this seat is one of the most competitive races this cycle -- so if we want to flip it blue, we need to match their early investments. [**Can you rush a $5 donation to our Rapid Response Fund to help us fight back against these ads? Your contribution will be split between Tim Ryan and Seth Moulton.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33839974/300110132/602283465?refcode=20210810_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2JkZTVjNC0xOGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVNlIVpgLDdhRrRCLA8qdvh6TfFf7G55e1_r28HrxJY=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33839975/300110137/-1665179247?refcode=20210810_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2JkZTVjNC0xOGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVNlIVpgLDdhRrRCLA8qdvh6TfFf7G55e1_r28HrxJY=)
We wish this weren’t the case, but this won’t be the last time we see a wave of GOP money try to distract voters from the real issues. **The GOP could spend up to $100 million attacking Tim this election.** It’s not going to be pretty. Tim was born and raised in Ohio. He’s been in union halls and on picket lines his whole life. He’s tough enough to face these attacks and come out on top -- but he’s gonna need a grassroots team to have his back. We need to be prepared for anything they throw our way. name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: It took 6 months, but Cuomo has resigned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friend, As you know, I requested a formal investigation in May 2020 and called on the Governor to resign last February following the tragic and unnecessary deaths of 15,000 seniors in nursing homes.

| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNEbWVzc2FnZSUyNnV0bV9jb250ZW50JTNEZW1haWwlMkJsb2dvJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNEQ3VvbW8lMkJSZXNpZ25lZA==&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=525A719A1A10448)
---
| | Dear, Friend,

Today’s resignation by Governor Andrew Cuomo is an important first step forward for our state and its citizens, following the state Attorney General’s report outlining the serial sexual misconduct he committed.

As you know, I requested a formal investigation in May 2020 and called on the Governor to resign last February following the tragic and unnecessary deaths of 15,000 seniors in nursing homes due to his decision to place COVID-positive patients with our most vulnerable.

While the Governor’s resignation does not heal the trauma and hurt felt by these women or the New Yorkers who lost loved ones in a nursing home due to his poor decisions, it opens the door for the healing process to begin.

The New York Assembly’s Judiciary Committee and prosecutors must go forward and continue their investigations into all aspects of Cuomo’s multiple scandals: the families of his nursing home victims and all sexual harassment victims deserve justice.

Resignation alone is not accountability.

I want to thank the more than 20k Americans who signed my petition that called on the Governor to resign. I will continue working to ensure that he is held accountable and the public’s trust is restored.

Sincerely,
Nicole 🇺🇸

---
| | |
---

| | Derek,

I have to be honest with you: the folks at the Democratic Party of Virginia and I are a little confused.

Over the last couple weeks Glenn Youngkin has made his extreme views and right-wing plans for Virginia very clear. He’s said over and over again just how proud he is to have Donald Trump’s endorsement.

Somehow, Derek, he’s virtually tied with me in _three consecutive polls._ And yet, **we're watching donations slow down!** I just don’t get why folks aren’t stepping up to help us take this guy down.

**[Will you help us turn this thing around? name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: I don't want to hear a blip from Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Florida fights Biden |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=125cca225b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

One question I always had: if Joe Biden was supposedly SO concerned with COVID spikes, why is he letting thousands of COVID-positive illegal aliens into the country?

DC just lacks common sense. That's the problem when you assemble hundreds of career politicians together.

Here in Florida, we are showing the country common sense.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9cf152f708&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who is a Biden lackey I can beat.**

I love Governor DeSantis. He speaks truth to power and governs with common sense- especially exposing the Left and the media for their LACK of common sense.

Last week, Gov. DeSantis called Biden out:

_Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis blasted President Biden on Wednesday telling him to do his job and secure the southern border and not say "blip" about the coronavirus until he does.

"Why don’t you do your job?" the Florida Republican said during a press conference Wednesday. "Why don't you get this border secure? _And until you do that, I don’t wanna hear a blip about COVID from you, thank you_."

"This is a guy who ran for office saying he’s going to shut down the virus," DeSantis added. "And what has he done? **He’s imported more virus from around the world by having a wide open southern border."**

Biden has been widely criticized on social media over reports that illegal immigrants who are carrying the coronavirus are being released into border communities, in some cases without notifying local law enforcement.

The Biden administration has been pressed on the issue multiple times and has sidestepped the question as to why it is pushing Americans to be vaccinated while allowing unvaccinated and sick migrants into the United States.

**Coronavirus cases among migrants have been surging at the southern border, and in one sector the number of infected migrants recently skyrocketed almost 900%.**_

So that's how it is. Biden uses the levers of the Federal government to attack Florida Gov. DeSantis, but he makes it harder for governors, especially in the South, to contain COVID because he's using Federal immigration policy as a super-spreader.

Open borders = more COVID.

**We clearly need to send people to Congress who will restrain Biden and force him to close our Southern border!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1551202c94&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Gov. DeSantis knows what he's doing and is leading Florida extremely well. It's Biden who doesn't know what he's doing.**

**Florida had one of the lowest transmission and death rates from COVID in 2020. It's still not in the top 20 in COVID rates per million, and our hospitals have plenty of room. **

"Granny Killer" Andrew Cuomo is the governor Biden likes best- and 70% of his constituents want him removed from office.

_The lesson? Biden needs to be fought, the American people want him to be challenged, and Florida is showing the way!_

But here's the thing: DeSantis can't do it on his own. The Dems control all of the Federal government. We need to send America First patriots to Congress so we can battle Biden! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ed038fef39&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=329ba708f2&e=afa21b7626)? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in last year. Florida is swinging red, and people want us to stop Biden's open borders policies!

All Biden has is scare tactics. DeSantis is delivering results. Help me get to Congress so I can bring DeSantis' policies to DC and force Biden to listen!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e9f5e950f3&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=dd8287927d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9af9497ba0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=988a6eef53&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=8e46a9b523) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=8e46a9b523).
