name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: It's Biden 🇨🇳 vs. America 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Our movement is growing |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=dfd78f4839&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the State Representative in Arizona responsible for kickstarting the Election Integrity movement in Arizona – with help from America First, grassroots people all across America like you and me! [_Donate now to join our movement!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e4c423615d&e=44b8c466b0)

**Want proof? It’s spreading like wildfire!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6bf9ae94a5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **We are seeing unprecedent numbers flock to the #ProveIt movement! **

_We’ve done the work, we have shown the evidence._

[_If you want the Democrats to prove there was no fraud, donate HERE!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d882209d8f&e=44b8c466b0)

**I have been fighting election fraud from the BEGINNING. And I want to continue the fight for YOU!**

The Secretary of State Races are going to be some of the most important in America in 2022.

**Why?**

Because they oversee the elections! This is why I am so proud to be the favorite, pro-Trump candidate to run for Secretary of State in Arizona!

**We need a strong Secretary of State in Arizona that will stand up to the bullies...**

Like the Biden administration...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=acfbe58ea0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Can you believe that the Biden administration is threatening to lock up Republicans who want them to #ProveIt?

**This is what silencing political enemies looks like.**

_Conservative Brief_ reports:

_The U.S. Department of Justice is now telling states that they should not pursue their own Arizona-style election audits._

_The DOJ’s new guidance document claims that undertaking “partisan” election audits could violate federal law, which seems like a clear statement directed at Republicans who support audits in states._

_“The guidance document explicitly warns against audits in which election officials are forced to turn over materials like ballots or voting machines to state lawmakers or third parties — as in Arizona, whose audit is being run by the private company Cyber Ninjas,” Forbes reported._

_“There are federal or criminal penalties attached,” the guidance asserts._

_Biden’s DOJ then suggests that those who carry out audits of the 2020 election “can face fines of up to $1,000 and imprisonment of up to one year for each violation.”_

**But I have been vocal, and I have been standing up and fighting against the Biden Administration and his cronies like Attorney General Merrick Garland.**

**The article continues:**

_Arizona Rep. Mark Finchem, who is now running for Arizona Secretary of State to replace Democrat Katie Hobbs, recently warned Attorney General Merrick Garland against getting involved in Arizona._

_“I got news for Merrick Garland, there’s this little thing called the Constitution,” said Finchem. “Article I, section IV, the times, places, and manner of holding an election for senators and representatives... it is the legislature that has responsibility for nominating and naming the electors for President.”_

_“I would advise Merrick Garland and his team of thugs that now occupy the Department of Justice: Tread very lightly,” he added._

_Finchem said: “Our attorney general, I spoke with their representative this morning, I’m not going to put him on the hook for anything, but you’re going to walk into a very surprising reception if you try to do anything in this state that interferes with legislative authority in handling our elections. Hard stop.”_

**To anyone who wants to mess with election integrity, to anyone who wants to stop the greatest grassroots movement in America, and to anyone who wants to interfere with America’s Audit in Maricopa County, I have exactly two words for you.**

__Tread lightly.__

_Help me stand up for you and election integrity by supporting my campaign for Secretary of State. [Please donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4c43a6e44f&e=44b8c466b0)_

**I’m reminded of Lee Greenwood’s famous lyrics today:**

_I’m proud to be an American, where at least I know I’m free._

I want you to ask yourself one question. _In a world where you can be incarcerated for up to one year for protecting the integrity of our elections, are you truly free?_

**If so, what is freedom? And if not, what will you do to defend it?**

_[Donate today to make these lyrics true again.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8ff64f660e&e=44b8c466b0) Let’s defend freedom together._
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7fd85e0ac4&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a7d9e95c3c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

This is what silencing political enemies looks like. Conservative Brief reports: The U.S. Department of Justice is now telling states that they should not pursue their own Arizona-style election audits. The DOJ’s new guidance document claims that undertaking “partisan” election audits could violate federal law, which seems like a clear statement directed at Republicans who support audits in states. “The guidance document explicitly warns against audits in which election officials are forced to turn over materials like ballots or voting machines to state lawmakers or third parties — as in Arizona, whose audit is being run by the private company Cyber Ninjas,” Forbes reported. “There are federal or criminal penalties attached,” the guidance asserts. Biden’s DOJ then suggests that those who carry out audits of the 2020 election “can face fines of up to $1,000 and imprisonment of up to one year for each violation.” But I have been vocal, and I have been standing up and fighting against the Biden Administration and his cronies like Attorney General Merrick Garland. The article continues: Arizona Rep. Mark Finchem, who is now running for Arizona Secretary of State to replace Democrat Katie Hobbs, recently warned Attorney General Merrick Garland against getting involved in Arizona. “I got news for Merrick Garland, there’s this little thing called the Constitution,” said Finchem. “Article I, section IV, the times, places, and manner of holding an election for senators and representatives... it is the legislature that has responsibility for nominating and naming the electors for President.” “I would advise Merrick Garland and his team of thugs that now occupy the Department of Justice: Tread very lightly,” he added. Finchem said: “Our attorney general, I spoke with their representative this morning, I’m not going to put him on the hook for anything, but you’re going to walk into a very surprising reception if you try to do anything in this state that interferes with legislative authority in handling our elections. Hard stop.” To anyone who wants to mess with election integrity, to anyone who wants to stop the greatest grassroots movement in America, and to anyone who wants to interfere with America’s Audit in Maricopa County, I have exactly two words for you. Tread lightly. Help me stand up for you and election integrity by supporting my campaign for Secretary of State. I’m reminded of Lee Greenwood’s famous lyrics today: I’m proud to be an American, where at least I know I’m free. I want you to ask yourself one question. In a world where you can be incarcerated for up to one year for protecting the integrity of our elections, are you truly free? If so, what is freedom? And if not, what will you do to defend it? Let’s defend freedom together. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Ron Kind
subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Kind for Congress, Brent Smith Treasurer [https://ronkind
body:
https://ronkind.org/ [https://ronkind.org/]
Friends —
This afternoon, in front of my old elementary school, Roosevelt Elementary – the same place where I first announced my candidacy for Congress 26 years ago – I announced that I will not seek reelection next year.
Representing the people at home has been the honor of my life – but I never intended it to be the honor of my entire life. For 26 years, I’ve flown to and from Washington, DC and traveled the 18 counties of the most beautiful Congressional District in the Nation almost every week. But 26 years is enough – it’s time for me to step back. My wife, Tawni, and I are looking forward to entering the next chapter of our lives.
If anyone had told me as a student at Roosevelt, the son of a telephone repairman from a low-income family, that I’d one day be able to represent my home area in the United States Congress, I would have thought that they were crazy. I thought then that a place like Congress was for people with political connections or wealth, the Kennedys, the Rockefellers.
But I’m living proof that you can come from humble beginnings and still have remarkable opportunities.
And I never forgot where I came from. I always tried to make decisions that I thought were in the best interest of the people at home here and not for powerful special interests or the political leadership of either party. For me, it was always about the next generation and not the next election. I believe I held true to that goal.
I’m very proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish.
But the truth is, I’m part of a dying breed in Congress, someone who tried to be reasonable, thoughtful, pragmatic and who worked to find common ground and seek solutions with Republican colleagues to get things done. That’s why I’m proud that I have consistently been ranked as one of the most bipartisan, independent members of Congress throughout the years, and, therefore, one of the most effective members in getting things done.
I hope that when it comes time to find my replacement, the wise people of this district will seek someone with similar qualities and who doesn’t view public service as a blood-sport, merely to attack and demonize the other side.
I look forward to serving out these remaining 16 months and working hard for the people of Wisconsin’s Third Congressional District.
We still have a virus to defeat, an economy to recover, a country to rebuild with good paying jobs, climate change to combat, and voters’ rights to protect. I look forward to carrying out those duties with the help of the people here in Wisconsin.
I want to thank my wife, Tawni, my family, my staff and team of advisors for all their support and help throughout these years.
Most importantly, I want to thank the people of this Congressional District for putting their faith, trust and confidence in me throughout these 26 years. It’s truly been the honor of my life.
I hope I represented you with the dignity and decency this office deserves.
Thank you for everything,
Ron
www.ronkind.org [https://ronkind.org/]

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Be fearless
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCMASTER-EVETTE '22
body:
Our focus must be on electing good, commonsense conservatives. Will you help? |
---
Fellow Conservative,

I've seen the difference good governors make.

They help grow our economy and protect human life. They make sure our men and women in uniform are properly supported, and they receive the respect they deserve.

Governor Henry McMaster is a guardian for what makes America great. He is our kind of man, and our kind of leader.

Henry McMaster's leadership in the governor's mansion makes South Carolina an effective model, which many states around this country can look toward to say how can we make life better for our people.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=78f041cdbef045bf8db375f31a6214e4&_e=B-z6V_BjzYHrUhsq_T7zY2CiyQe8ub2UnlheT8LajRIdXQSnMnjUySUxWfiZMGMtFu-EPI-_5d19Z45xrL3GhJxi98o3ErrlBYRwg68tb3kM6PswaVZOVJPRNqxs6kf7Bcjbj5jzug40DquB2usYd_XiRneZSosAjXgsA7ia5xxot6Cs39cnzovPJ8chQZNbrKAQ3ZmFaUx2mPlIlMN6KcxYLWE0dE5Ck7XkACXZIrjRWUcPvi4-k-6yvbrE26s4aiOQQnlfQTRLu3xS-h-3-CrQY40mj1AV8iAgIvjb-8Xd69Ti_4QmmLR1AuFcErgpJKygQQQjg6HRO5wBNpDIE4oUaSpBhz1IU4l-BPw6gRcD1QI0baDYkEWVIb9qBSb9eiLHqYUzhGQJQeco6rytIjgOpjkK1Xm8o3r5xX8cgsRGaaYYyQvlIZrqSuvLafgmgli7vF4wTyKhTbzudpd_up7BCc8Ivbz2QSVcxId6Y_8%3D)
America remains the greatest, most exceptional nation in the history of civilization. Our grandkids will live in that same country.

_**But if we don't support commonsense conservatives next year, everything we accomplished in the Trump White House could be undone.**_

We need to fight back against socialism, Big Tech censorship, and the Left's “wokeness” if we want to keep America great.

Fellow Conservative, my friend Henry McMaster already has three Democrat opponents. They know he's been one of President Trump's strongest supporters, so he's become a top target next year.

While his opponents are breaking South Carolina fundraising records, **[I am asking conservative folks just like you to step up and help us keep South Carolina red.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=78f041cdbef045bf8db375f31a6214e4&_e=B-z6V_BjzYHrUhsq_T7zY2CiyQe8ub2UnlheT8LajRIdXQSnMnjUySUxWfiZMGMtFu-EPI-_5d19Z45xrL3GhJxi98o3ErrlBYRwg68tb3kM6PswaVZOVJPRNqxs6kf7Bcjbj5jzug40DquB2usYd_XiRneZSosAjXgsA7ia5xxot6Cs39cnzovPJ8chQZNbrKAQ3ZmFaUx2mPlIlMN6KcxYLWE0dE5Ck7XkACXZIrjRWUcPvi4-k-6yvbrE26s4VDcopdSOPVQ_nNirY4aRfJF-oEVlBt2nAFXlwRV3PLgMWZkfI92BJF1gGfBJcBWcNE0jY70VBbSf9SSh8DeW3TqBiyIAd6OEfmoXK4lIgl4YyhYTBphjIACEUD_ZX1WPfKVP8WTaUDtGdahg_bDpEEDAUcgB3FHa-Pxvtn_Rbwq9UJYGrAz3NN3jTlOaJC8LHH6YHiu1pgofxXt7ybf0Nz1kqb5lcPkM2qmyNwKS0QE%3D)**

**[Will you join me in supporting Governor Henry McMaster? $25 or even $10 will help us build the network of commonsense conservative leaders we need to make sure we stop the Left's relentless attack on America's founding principles.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=78f041cdbef045bf8db375f31a6214e4&_e=B-z6V_BjzYHrUhsq_T7zY2CiyQe8ub2UnlheT8LajRIdXQSnMnjUySUxWfiZMGMtFu-EPI-_5d19Z45xrL3GhJxi98o3ErrlBYRwg68tb3kM6PswaVZOVJPRNqxs6kf7Bcjbj5jzug40DquB2usYd_XiRneZSosAjXgsA7ia5xxot6Cs39cnzovPJ8chQZNbrKAQ3ZmFaUx2mPlIlMN6KcxYLWE0dE5Ck7XkACXZIrjRWUcPvi4-k-6yvbrE26s4e7setXbf2Lr3MkbDs1NsYxd9Gq_eYo0W9P2YRnbfDHdcw4r9lPYm02k6VzEhOMi56sEjNzKSdAZ0T6-DF5tZepdQY7aNZeTG7pDvMN0TDNHIPJoArjLvZpzCnPwlf3JcrTxzrHfYQCO5zx6_KrzskZ1OauMnbBPkMEyNvUaEt3QUHzp7aXNiscbzi9tpCxB3omgAqFu1ENGNhr6jk71Z2KppaSWJtCPLXlUnzisc8HE%3D)**

I was proud to stand by Henry and endorse his 2022 re-election. _**Fellow Conservative, I hope you'll do the same!**_

Thanks,

Mike Pompeo

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: RESPONSE: PENDING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: the honest truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84hsJogPyQUuVwhekXtYFjuMMjbMV4zvopdLg-Xuwx5xObVBM1FsSAOd-SjexUKsWq4sMQcz2F9mMGCUsYgR-VMlLnpdyPPjnFME6-IHWUkiZFHzOLQdThA9ZHx4eNwtqsz8A5cvSFFOn14d1cIuFoRQ9qAg8c-Vu_VNyhkUh1KyIN3opNH-thAh0ojTiQbU_pfRnhHsLTouSN1nfAH2mq1HdRMjVFcvtkdtgN0yxLD0gGO1n0ADmdU7YcK_7S8voBQBCks_yhnwoB1n_cb_7A2Kk-6VY0W5zJD8GKcpGNMdK/3ec/nbpUvdt6TD2dWLiPvDD-ZQ/h0/pmYBHBV8HB9abX38-vV0bNi-E7Gl64OJNceU799-06g)
Derek: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our critical midnight deadline — so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it.**

My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for _everyone_ — not just those at the top.

Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Pass the For the People Act to defend voting rights and strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage and build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side — so I have to ask:

**[Will you split a $25 donation right now between our campaign and Common Good VA so we can hit our crucial midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84hsJogPyQUuVwhekXtYFjuMR9SuwFhUWXLGYFlV0vqbzlYqEIpg5Gf0MQEqM5fNJLaMnS4LG0kngEks4DrqjlvAEC7xNnUJzx9IN48We7-3bpey2hgQZ0iGOKeMjc2FWlaXiwuvPSonPvn1eRaJegiqCJmK04Dofcg_mm6BNVb9DiF4JczYqQgd41fUA_J3xOWdGBxJLawX2jCYeRt9hqh2vnzqfXUk6I5zTVesUwm1OENnHUpIGeJPAWsizhMuyW_qSXqTXBRutwZZl-TKaiUQRaFxtpazcAgllsEb9ICwT/3ec/nbpUvdt6TD2dWLiPvDD-ZQ/h1/e87-l-t4B1Yb98DqtheukbdJM-CQdyXzkeqLppau0lk)**

With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power — and election experts from _The Washington Post_ to _NBC News_ confirm that I'm one of the GOP's top targets for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue.

**But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with _your_ grassroots support, Derek.**

My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no _question_ that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. **We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking:**

[**Before our critical midnight deadline, will you split a $25 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA so we can win in Georgia, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue fighting for our progressive values?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84hsJogPyQUuVwhekXtYFjuPh9Xas8l7v7GoZfcDEdKkQ7GFyHrr3xuZx2CZhx3mz0tt3FrV70lyFCQ4qkx85mj73lIvwr1lDj5J_2AQdomBvH4ECrmPLNAguHHnGeJAWAQ-d_9Jz6kRxfIWAs8Gr1bg0RHexrLO50TLNCZGuPEY_i3QW-FA8gFOVht_Rg9LMCz2t9Eh_2QjeKZwcK7DpmcfaByILixJi5a5i64txpuRh7Ka4ZgBBbB6Vp1ocUXsrC5ejLDKY6sYon6lZLqFwpxbboaXoYl9xlib5la611x0L/3ec/nbpUvdt6TD2dWLiPvDD-ZQ/h2/x3jVoqY3pighys5jKquLON6UbJddkYIp554Xls79DiY)

Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these — I appreciate you.

— Raphael
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84hsJogPyQUuVwhekXtYFjuOmxuSUMwllGhMOAPi2TQSCNpmlObvLLB4vnX8NWdE5MJqiDGK-4kzPE9OEOlvGB9CwcT-Y6JG7bDYm-VqZikHBbTdPUIzgel3xiBV8zjMhbgYd16PAH_jx9EZrvitRXGZcg9wjeSCNaK-VOQpovABK9ytRZtAo2NuLgL7rJA7zW2sQ9weTq3qSBy8gZXDQznMHDwusg2X4MdE_FFvF7oKyrKDPwO5fnVaS5o4svEqEofQV3lwwSyaipzZxtZQfQcBIP9bFt0o4Q9QjTsAd5o7B/3ec/nbpUvdt6TD2dWLiPvDD-ZQ/h3/k_a3idzaYLJIq89VWrwxPTnNXJib4cLEPOYr5MOYZNo)

I'm going to say something that no politician ever will: The answer to our nation's problems isn't politics. _It 's affecting change in the hearts of people in our God-blessed nation._ That takes leaders of principle who won't put their finger in the wind of politics to make decisions, but will adhere to principle, even when it's not popular.

As Secretary of State in the Trump Administration, I was determined to demonstrate how my faith and our Judeo-Christian founding could improve our world. Shining our light and evangelizing are biblical requirements, not challenges to the so-called separation of church and state.

Leaders are in people-intensive lines of work. They appeal to hearts and minds to change behavior. And as believers, _we draw on the wisdom of God to help us get it right ...to be a force for good in the lives of human beings._

I know some people in the media will break out the pitchforks when they hear that I ask God for direction in my work. But that isn't a new idea. I really relied on God when I was a fifth-grade Sunday school teacher, and my job was to keep the boys in their seats. It was the best preparation for international diplomacy you can imagine!

I say all this because our nation is truly at a crossroads. It is up to people like you and me to lead in championing American values. If we're going to win this battle, we need you to step up, stay in the fight and defend the America we love. _If we don 't, we're going to lose it._

So, I'm personally asking you to renew our commitment to putting America and our values first--because when we put America and Americans first, we prosper and the whole world prospers. **When America leads from the front and not from behind, we are a better nation.**

I believe America has a bright future. Why?

Because of the promise in Jeremiah that God has a plan for us; a plan that will prosper and not harm us. A plan for hope and a future if we will follow Him.

_**That is why I believe in America --I believe we are a good and great nation.**_

Not a defeated nation.
Not a racist nation.
We are a God Blessed nation--and I want to keep it that way.

---

That takes leaders of principle who won't put their finger in the wind of politics to make decisions, but will adhere to principle, even when it's not popular. As Secretary of State in the Trump Administration, I was determined to demonstrate how my faith and our Judeo-Christian founding could improve our world. Shining our light and evangelizing are biblical requirements, not challenges to the so-called separation of church and state. Leaders are in people-intensive lines of work. They appeal to hearts and minds to change behavior. And as believers, we draw on the wisdom of God to help us get it right ...to be a force for good in the lives of human beings. I know some people in the media will break out the pitchforks when they hear that I ask God for direction in my work. But that isn't a new idea. I really relied on God when I was a fifth-grade Sunday school teacher, and my job was to keep the boys in their seats. It was the best preparation for international diplomacy you can imagine! I say all this because our nation is truly at a crossroads. It is up to people like you and me to lead in championing American values. If we're going to win this battle, we need you to step up, stay in the fight and defend the America we love. If we don 't, we're going to lose it. So, I'm personally asking you to renew our commitment to putting America and our values first--because when we put America and Americans first, we prosper and the whole world prospers. When America leads from the front and not from behind, we are a better nation. I believe America has a bright future. Why? Because of the promise in Jeremiah that God has a plan for us; a plan that will prosper and not harm us. A plan for hope and a future if we will follow Him. That is why I believe in America --I believe we are a good and great nation. Not a defeated nation. Not a racist nation. We are a God Blessed nation--and I want to keep it that way. | | I won't let the woke socialists replace our American values with the religion of Marxism! Don't complain about what's happening-- "let’s fight and defeat the other side and defend our American values." Fighting for our Future, Mike Pompeo | | Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC! Add info@email.cavpac.com to your address book! | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. PO BOX 2485 SPRINGFIELD, VA 22152 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

| Peter,

On Thursday night, the **Democrats tried to ram their wasteful, corrupt "infrastructure" bill** through the Senate...

...and **EVERY SINGLE SENATOR but me** was ready to **let them pass it without a fight.** (I couldn't believe what I was seeing, Peter)

So I stood up and fought it. _**By myself.**_

I've only been in the Senate a few months, but never in my wildest nightmares did I expect **_every single Senate Republican but me_ to _betray_ conservative values** like that.

It's clear: we have **TWO fights** to win in 2022:
1. Stop the bleeding... by **defeating the Democrats** and taking back the Senate.

2. Start rebuilding America... by electing a **tidal wave of principled conservatives** who aren't afraid to fight for this nation.

**I won last night 's fight by myself, Peter.** **[But I can't do it alone forever... not without the support of patriots like you.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58109947:6_hOrqlNF:m:1:3253819041:7234183B7161AA455A5607097AA09697:r "But I can’t do it alone forever... not without the support of patriots like you.")**

She understands what Wisconsin workers and families are going through. That's why she'll prioritize the kitchen table issues that matter most to Wisconsinites: **universal child care, lowering prescription drug costs, tackling the climate crisis, and creating good-paying union jobs all across Wisconsin.**

Sarah is no stranger to taking on the tough fights and getting things done. She’s the person we need to defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat. The problem is, he has Donald Trump’s full endorsement, which means right-wing megadonors won’t be shy about cutting massive checks to keep this seat red.

body:

Only hours after we announced our campaign for governor, we’ve already seen a _huge_ outpouring of support from across the state. **Ohioans are ready to move on from the one-party GOP control in Columbus and head in a new direction.** Together, we will write Ohio’s comeback story — by expanding access to health care, funding our public schools, repairing our failing infrastructure, and so much more. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: If you haven’t heard yet, I’m running for governor of Ohio! | I can hardly believe it, friend. Only hours after we announced our campaign for governor, we’ve already seen a huge outpouring of support from across the state. Ohioans are ready to move on from the one-party GOP control in Columbus and head in a new direction. Together, we will write Ohio’s comeback story — by expanding access to health care, funding our public schools, repairing our failing infrastructure, and so much more. But that starts by winning this critical race for governor – and to do that, we need YOU on our team. We’re building this grassroots movement from the ground up. In the first week of our campaign, we need to raise $50,000 from at least 500 Official Founding Donors. = = Look, I’ll always be straight with you. We’re going to be asking for your support a lot over the coming days, weeks, and months. Folks like you are the backbone of Team Cranley. Your support will make or break this movement. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks so much, John = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

Friends -
Last time we checked in, we brought you up to speed with all the work Nuestro PAC accomplished in the 2020 General Election and 2021 Special Elections in Georgia. But we haven't stopped working.
We want to take a moment to update you on what we've been up to since the spring and why it is crucial for us to count on your support in 2022.
If you support our work and are ready to chip in, use this link:
[**Make a contribution -- of any amount you can afford -- to Nuestro PAC.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33844101/300123778/-1551089125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMTE5NjU1LTI2ZmEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SJ6t9BtA2_rbXXYuR1MGR8EdXeRaUhdVbtELTtCkHf8=)
**NUESTRO AD**
Democrats need to let the Cuban people know that we support them, not dictators. The peoples' demands are the result of over 60 years of oppression, so we must support their right to make their voices heard. That is why we're airing [_Libertad_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33844102/300123779/-803653937?v=vbvlMMA3JCU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMTE5NjU1LTI2ZmEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SJ6t9BtA2_rbXXYuR1MGR8EdXeRaUhdVbtELTtCkHf8=&emci=51c01766-07fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5f119655-26fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7684583) in South Florida to make sure our Cuban friends know about the efforts President Biden is making in their fight for freedom.

**NUESTRO ENDORSEMENTS**

Nuestro PAC is getting ready to announce a slate of candidates we will be endorsing in 2022 to continue the fight for equitable representation of Latinos in Congress and help Democrats retain control of both the House and Senate.

**NUESTRO PARTNERS**

We are happy to announce that Nuestro PAC is part of the Equis Core Partners group which is hosted by Equis Research! With this partnership, we are going to be able to stay in touch and up to date with our closest allies and the best way to prioritize our partners' needs moving forward.
**ONE LAST THING**

Arizona will have a critical Senate election soon and we know a thing or two about who may be in the running. Stay tuned!

**[If you're able, please consider chipping in $10 to Nuestro PAC. Anything you contribute today will go a long way in supporting Democrats running for office up and down the ballot in 2021, 2022 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33844103/300123780/-1551089125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMTE5NjU1LTI2ZmEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SJ6t9BtA2_rbXXYuR1MGR8EdXeRaUhdVbtELTtCkHf8=)**

[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=9239c0cb15f74d8a8b7fb973f66806a7&_e=8rD14NqdvVtiSBz6HueQmQ7mVoTdifXIkQzKJ-HEtT1X8ybdBrgh6fKBifZvAg8czBnEZXNWQIf8R8vVonhpseId6XqXs2TyP3cV56gDYLZ4LtbJnFT-aokD7KPl2kQqxFLEMlF1GwIVlVzWKtqcMn6n0HmsOT93GA3ZZPLmHJiv24yhIeRbqcVaxKtZPRodHtGS66FRNsXKHLotvR0kXUhGrfnuEf7EOVLrE-fK8zhMk3yoB6-WhBUcwBrwiOCwyW0PhjDHt-zDmBm9d8Nl_EemKc0sV1z2RGdghrwdOfvvK6IwbVhHcfhUKF49CZWzZ5UTydbI15cop3iwL69s2Q8SeMewU9Ndgq5SKudvl-n7DoBR9wyYa1nX67xdaay6Sb8AsKSaYJjCAnGjUwoL9wrIU4wD7dC265n0y7mFQlPrDbhYSl_5qo3F9Iqo7n33) | |

Peter, my wife, Sarah Sanders, has had a busy schedule lately.

She’s been busy campaigning for Governor, fighting for our future, and being an amazing mom to our 3 great kids.

She’s had so much on her plate that I think she might have even forgotten a special day is just around the corner — **HER BIRTHDAY! **

I want to make sure her day is one of the best ones yet!

Will you help me surprise her by signing her birthday card today?
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=9239c0cb15f74d8a8b7fb973f66806a7&_e=8rD14NqdvVtiSBz6HueQmQ7mVoTdifXIkQzKJ-HEtT1X8ybdBrgh6fKBifZvAg8czBnEZXNWQIf8R8vVonhpseId6XqXs2TyP3cV56gDYLZ4LtbJnFT-aokD7KPl2kQqxFLEMlF1GwIVlVzWKtqcMn6n0HmsOT93GA3ZZPLmHJiv24yhIeRbqcVaxKtZPRodHtGS66FRNsXKHLotvR0kXUhGrfnuEf7EOVLrE-fK8zjuA9gfS_WhhLJkvaWpLQF_w0Gqv-EDmmEdZYRTvWf1year2KaEhLi8gmM-FZ3jONcuHK3yJIxDWWPzjc274Tjjg8uc3rYW4as5ZIACkJ2t9U6vvV1g-K_RP6nTn5U_bAuoXFhd-B5myISolfu3Q9niaAXXjr8uZ-F04WZN3buH2QaQQ5_XIHgb96-vKbEyaGt5q6pzM9B4HVfGdfURd4rs)
Like many working moms, Sarah is often pulled in a lot of directions, but she crushes it on all fronts.

That’s what she always does. At home, at the White House, and she’ll do it as Governor too.

**_That's just who she is._**

I hope you'll join me in celebrating a woman who leads with passion in everything she does: **[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/birthday-08102021/](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=9239c0cb15f74d8a8b7fb973f66806a7&_e=8rD14NqdvVtiSBz6HueQmQ7mVoTdifXIkQzKJ-HEtT1X8ybdBrgh6fKBifZvAg8czBnEZXNWQIf8R8vVonhpseId6XqXs2TyP3cV56gDYLZ4LtbJnFT-aokD7KPl2kQqxFLEMlF1GwIVlVzWKtqcMn6n0HmsOT93GA3ZZPLmHJiv24yhIeRbqcVaxKtZPRodHtGS66FRNsXKHLotvR0kXUhGrfnuEf7EOVLrE-fK8zh6x7px9paE3TYxpGQ8ZqAeLrKHq9A9kA6d7lfxNpC2MHnlBFnzHzRs-LqOe9owIw4rA_GqnTp_O1-RMVbdQGV-OhxS2UYiHcnDlCY-xmTf-LrsFuAdZOBMqca-49acpahOj8E9vZofC_mysVuOsIESYBJnf8N4f_E01XFPu10Mv_sqYHkPmz3uz3cvEkczcfP8300A1Jr0JY4lIhOXUZr4)**

Let’s make this a great birthday for Sarah!

\- Bryan Sanders

Friend --

_We have our work cut out for us, but that does NOT mean it will be easy._
Democrats have an army of Trump-hating donors, the Liberal Media on their side, swarms of attack ads on the way, and more cash in the bank than EVER BEFORE.

Peter,

With Republicans only needing to flip FIVE SEATS to win back control of the House, the RNC (Republican National Committee) is already identifying potential top races to invest in. **My race in Nevada’s 3rd District is one they’re looking at seriously.**

My team and I have been putting in extra time working the phones, writing emails and keeping you up to date of where our campaign stands. This summer-time push is not for nothing, Peter: **[We need to show the RNC that my campaign has the necessary infrastructure to raise $50,000 online in the first two months following the relaunch of my digital campaign.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=09f682b8104f4f2a9f999a27cef44d87&_e=nuq4OmUE7zuYH4rzUmT07S2acs2RPl0xsPc4OWCEKr-wzq4yt0eJpXmlt1CCf9PqGrue7AcR-KDT2FT5Zt75P1CcUucmhvpeJuuuv5yNv0BklPJstHyVWo3n8F2rHer-QOIIYUICoB-DS8iATZxBD-8423ilWMsAMEL3EOpEtHSEQiJksi7TCNRwj5jjVBDnGdU-gMhiKK6HNCdyFla4I3yFOdTPAMZEJc25SngsPkkaFnILVWzWl_U0-rDIt5C1sOpo-Fa4FCIFg_PlHyR5i5KRsdvJKz54bXiX6qSlM9CPrk4N4mufYzC7mwxKuiQ4bVdXJsZa3PHjXp8bTYuQ76XInQLeV1gBPPcjWnsThRpvI0-0FVeGrY5r5dgGRJRJdPDhRYnYeXMjzOLH6GS_Acu7NEPpipXYFNuxX4mZLWUEaI0Ikt4ew4GofhaE_eAXf0cBYE2lHHWQiVNEpIJ3Lf4rA6W1zsuC2KODAoJpQM4%3D)**

body:
A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f36d172a67a45249e9e1be0fa789db8&_e=tq-Za-qL3D6bKS7GQ_7kF_EK-S8XCgVCzSr2Y3PUefDUkA7x-gsijRmHev_ExpqEqa6ZsrHqYvZSu2P2wuknAqDhSpHx3uWyudOoqX169wcUhUNJMpvma0MHOVJQBhyClof6NP907pJ5RdEylF2XYHAByJCsBdkoHRUT8mLWOJop5YbPxjykHJqxtwFkKu-1UL4tFT2SQyCWDMgDfYWH7c-OGrhjFz_0NHyayt6JKdXg_6ppyOE_n2uk_3CRmEO-3mf1cWrvTkXNb0Jt8cDKUSo7grdIrWbHLGYrEOtK8arXHfyQm4e9P-_CF7nJuL4WZ6hQB0PeQQBlLJV2faSs5pzeiOOI6aCoeW4c9mMg6V-21z8vo3279vv5c-3ugBciwds7Q_MvVFvILUjXFpWSmvkmLSQJgSFo5EC0DIa-MlSfKRhEqWxIOaAfZH2EOB5w)
Get this, Fellow Conservative...

A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves.

That's right, California has moved forward with reparations plans for African Americans. As a black, conservative female, I find this move to be disturbing - not to mention, unconstitutional!

**Reparations divide our country. Opportunity brings us together.**

[**That's why I hope you will support my campaign to become the FIRST black female Republican elected to the House from the state of California right now by joining my team.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f36d172a67a45249e9e1be0fa789db8&_e=tq-Za-qL3D6bKS7GQ_7kF_EK-S8XCgVCzSr2Y3PUefDUkA7x-gsijRmHev_ExpqEqa6ZsrHqYvZSu2P2wuknAqDhSpHx3uWyudOoqX169wcUhUNJMpvma0MHOVJQBhyClof6NP907pJ5RdEylF2XYHAByJCsBdkoHRUT8mLWOJop5YbPxjykHJqxtwFkKu-1UL4tFT2SQyCWDMgDfYWH7c-OGrhjFz_0NHyayt6JKdUtWSY7AX_2weFyZ8K6lNnqFgmuMbnva_pao2YKdMT59jEP1-pcQP1BFYfd2nasp3hqirqptHUL7KBOvRVL0kUjX9-2sZ7ZgOgpUlkiLvvJhqZ4LsVGHOh6UvG2oaSNmcjYUVADRRLPQxCbZM606Dxz0IG89ShXZEAcz7QYVNnqDAHblpU_-gLdhYizDByc5hWHRt3Oq8IdG6Ut8KFR_WKn)

[**SEND A BLACK CONSERVATIVE TO CONGRESS -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f36d172a67a45249e9e1be0fa789db8&_e=tq-Za-qL3D6bKS7GQ_7kF_EK-S8XCgVCzSr2Y3PUefDUkA7x-gsijRmHev_ExpqEqa6ZsrHqYvZSu2P2wuknAqDhSpHx3uWyudOoqX169wcUhUNJMpvma0MHOVJQBhyClof6NP907pJ5RdEylF2XYHAByJCsBdkoHRUT8mLWOJop5YbPxjykHJqxtwFkKu-1UL4tFT2SQyCWDMgDfYWH7c-OGrhjFz_0NHyayt6JKdWxr-KoTiMywmdu8r-0Fr-CCnrH710KY2VLVkQor36OkotMZgKhowIK0k0w-Dp_nS_mV5yxPjGmuNsmwOCjnK0Zif27jwjAlejJHpnKjuykXE9teGRj3_SaFzCwRK0KGbebCwub3ANGDLEitXDHMc_ufhakgqVNoIhts2sLdsd6sN8wzXhOkRtOt0KEjCDSKN9RWZQYpQcbCdEXPbPBu6cC)
This is our opportunity as conservatives to bring diversity to the Republican Party and dismantle the racist narrative Democrats have held over conservatives for decades.

I have never asked for a handout and I have never seen myself as a victim because of the color of my skin. **Despite what the Democrats peddle through my minority community, I am a free thinking American who has been blessed with opportunity in this country.**

**If I was a victim like the Democrats thought I was, then I wouldn't be here, running for Congress for a SECOND time with the support of thousands of grassroots conservatives.**

[**So today, I am asking you to make a donation of $5 or more to my campaign to help me win in 2022.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f36d172a67a45249e9e1be0fa789db8&_e=tq-Za-qL3D6bKS7GQ_7kF_EK-S8XCgVCzSr2Y3PUefDUkA7x-gsijRmHev_ExpqEqa6ZsrHqYvZSu2P2wuknAqDhSpHx3uWyudOoqX169wcUhUNJMpvma0MHOVJQBhyClof6NP907pJ5RdEylF2XYHAByJCsBdkoHRUT8mLWOJop5YbPxjykHJqxtwFkKu-1UL4tFT2SQyCWDMgDfYWH7c-OGrhjFz_0NHyayt6JKdXwA2ODfPfhIV17QO5IxOPhpfa3oz4dGwicZkHf147OdRoZYbcIA5V6xkM3Ug0T33HGWjZJ95ZJipmCR-bcD3ysXs3Ev-UmGcALtVvsaVaUwDQRD3CnkaBkiI16mT9DEaJkJ_pSOsdVifvRcD39GYbAJCgUHnKrh68JFdkNx6NSJF_ri15iOBgqmFop2cnftFhVxsH7OQTEMaJGJwmD2tUC) With your help, I can change the narrative and prove that all black Americans need in this country is opportunity, NOT reparations!

Thank you and God Bless,

Aja Smith

clean_body: A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. | Get this, Fellow Conservative... A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. That's right, California has moved forward with reparations plans for African Americans. As a black, conservative female, I find this move to be disturbing - not to mention, unconstitutional! Reparations divide our country. Opportunity brings us together. This is our opportunity as conservatives to bring diversity to the Republican Party and dismantle the racist narrative Democrats have held over conservatives for decades. I have never asked for a handout and I have never seen myself as a victim because of the color of my skin. Despite what the Democrats peddle through my minority community, I am a free thinking American who has been blessed with opportunity in this country. If I was a victim like the Democrats thought I was, then I wouldn't be here, running for Congress for a SECOND time with the support of thousands of grassroots conservatives. With your help, I can change the narrative and prove that all black Americans need in this country is opportunity, NOT reparations! Thank you and God Bless, Aja Smith United States Air Force Veteran Republican for Congress | Aja is a United States Air Force veteran. She was deployed to Qatar in 2007, where she proudly participated in Operation Enduring Freedom. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Aja Smith is a retired member of the United States Air Force. Friend,

I hope you know how much your support means to me.

Day after day, I know I can count on you. So, when I scheduled my upcoming **Trump Rally on Saturday, August 21st,** I knew exactly who I wanted to invite: YOU.

**In addition to attending what will be an EPIC Rally, I’ve asked my team to set aside some time so we can meet backstage and take a PHOTO together that I’ll even sign for you.**

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65829%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NkfTG3c82xTkVj1%2b52rKzw&sysid=1)

If you win:
* **We’ll cover your flight.**
* **We’ll make sure you have a very nice place to stay.**
* **You’ll get to bring a guest of your choice.**
* **You’ll get VIP BACKSTAGE PASSES.**

* **And, so much more.**

I’m going to pick a winner soon - make sure your name is on the entry list.

**[Contribute RIGHT NOW to win a trip to meet and take a photo with yours truly at my upcoming rally.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65821%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QblpqSGUgee81Yom9Vqjcw&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

clean_body: Did you have a chance to add your name? Derek needs your help to oppose government mask mandates, vaccine mandates and vaccine passports. Friend, Did you have a chance to add your name? Derek needs your help to oppose government mask mandates, vaccine mandates and vaccine passports. Joe Biden and Laura Kelly have been a complete failure on the COVID response and recovery. Their constant flip-flopping on guidance and mandates is harming our families, not helping them. Sign Now To Oppose More Mandates. Instead of their overbearing policies and restrictions, we should be focused on helping Kansans make the best choices for their families without imposing more government control over every aspect of their daily lives. Be sure to add your name quickly to show your opposition. We need to show Joe Biden and Laura Kelly that Kansans won’t tolerate any more mandates! Thanks, Team Schmidt \-----------Forwarded Message Below-------- Friend, As we continue to navigate COVID, we need consistent and calm leadership, not constantly changing guidance and fear mongering. I oppose government mask mandates, vaccine mandates and vaccine passports because our government needs to trust its citizens to do the right thing. The Legislature has blocked state-level mandates, and I’m currently fighting in court to protect your right to challenge local mandates. I believe we MUST respect individual liberties and trust Kansans to make decisions for themselves and their families. I’m tired of Joe Biden and Laura Kelly’s lack of leadership on this issue. I’m sure you are too. Kansans need a leader who understands our values and respects our personal liberties. I want to be that leader for our state, but I need Patriots like you to help get me there. Sincerely, Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

For those of you who don’t already know me, my name is John Quaye Quartey. (But you can just call me Quaye like everyone else.) I’m the son of an immigrant father from Ghana and a mother raised in the Jim Crow South.
I’ve spent nearly all of my adult life in the service of others, including 20 years serving as a U.S. Naval Intelligence officer. I spearheaded counterterrorism and cyberwarfare operations all across the globe, helping combat ISIS-inspired terrorists and protecting American interests abroad.
Now, I’m an appreciative husband to my wonderful wife, Nancy, and the father to our two beautiful children. I’m also a small business owner whose mission is to help grow other small businesses that serve working families in our communities.
But that’s not why I’m running for Congress.
I’m running to serve California’s 25th District because I spent two decades taking down so-called “strongmen” who abused their power to destroy democracy — and now we’re seeing many of those very same tactics used here at home.
I took an oath to protect this country, its values, and the lives of the American people long ago. My Republican congressman Mike Garcia betrayed his oath — caving to far-right domestic terrorists in hopes of overturning your vote for President.
But the good news is we can beat Mike Garcia. Our district will be one of the most closely contested House races in the country, yet it’s one that we, as Democrats, should expect to win.
But I won’t be able to win on my own.
**[That’s why I’m asking for you to join our movement today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33846568/300131447/-1764821881?contactdata=BcdI1wtxAN2jPzV5ckEE9okLuE1kAuCSvpsoefKvFR3P12AXE1bssA%2BcM0MYEY%2FSDwWqcMh9QOXeCspehWUuI5NOe1VCcHrR2zBgpegcDV0xJTzIhq4ld3TRQ6OD8ytbf%2FNqQycilu2BIv7axmbisg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWY1ZDFiNS0yZWZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft_iXf2EzOdEc7Vn0Sxrj1WN2Ac668WkmAyHTAQRpyY=&emci=c1ec834a-12fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=eaf5d1b5-2efa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=14505483) We can win back this seat and stand up for an America that’s possible for all of us. subject: Help us make up for lost time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
#
We have a lot of ground to make up.
Right now, Henry Cuellar has more than **$1.74 million** in the bank for his campaign.
Our campaign only launched a few days ago, so Cuellar has had a _massive_ head start. But we're already making up for lost time thanks to grassroots supporters like you.
[**_If you can, please help us close the gap further by making a gift today. Every dollar we raise will help us spread the word and grow our movement for change._**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=215068a3e9&e=ed416558ef)
[Donate »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=80e7041580&e=ed416558ef)
Unlike Henry Cuellar, our campaign is fueled by grassroots donors — regular folks chipping in what they can, when they can.
Last election cycle, only about **1%** of Cuellar's campaign contributions came from small dollar donors.
And this election cycle looks to be more of the same. In fact, out of all of the money Henry Cuellar has raised for his campaign this year, 61% of that came from PACs. **61%!**
It's clear that Henry Cuellar has a lot of big, powerful, wealthy interests in his corner. **But we have something better: we have you. We have the people.**
We know that our people power can beat Cuellar's corporate donors. Last election we fell just 2,746 votes short of winning, and that was _after_ being outspent by $700,000.
**We can make up that difference and more this election.** And the more we close the fundraising gap with Henry Cuellar, the wider our path to victory will be.
Because Jessica isn't accepting _any_ corporate PAC money or contributions from lobbyists, we need your help to close that gap.
[**_If you can, will you please make a gift today? If you give now you'll become one of our Founding Donors._**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=0c3a910a18&e=ed416558ef)
[Donate »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=e287043b08&e=ed416558ef)
We're building our power directly from the people — because in Congress, Jessica Cisneros will work for the people. Not PACs or corporations.
Thanks,
Team Cisneros
Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=7873097058&e=ed416558ef&c=cc26a923ca). Mail us: PO Box 660, Laredo, TX 78042.

Friend,
---
The radical Left wants to rewrite our nation’s history...

They’re trying to force their agenda and ideology onto our children by implementing Critical Race Theory into our schools’ curriculums.
---
__But let me be frank -- coming from a family that went from slavery to West Point in just 5 generations, I know that Critical Race Theory is wrong. Plain and simple.__
---
**America is NOT a racist country. I put my life on the line for this country in the Army because I’m proud to call America my home.**
---
That’s why I’m asking YOU to join me in demanding that Critical Race Theory be kept out of our schools to prevent the Left from indoctrinating our kids with their radical agenda.
---

## No Ohio Republican Party Primary Endorsements Press Conference
On Tuesday, August 17 at 4:30 PM, Mark will be part of a press conference in front of the Governor's Residence (358 N. Parkview Avenue, Bexley, OH). The press conference is in response to Governor Mike DeWine having a picnic "celebrating" the Ohio Republican Party State Central Committee members, one hour later, while shamelessly seeking their endorsement eight months before the Primary (he wants them to endorse him on September 10) and far before even the filing deadline. We need to Stop Ohio Republican Party Primary Endorsements. Mark is working with other candidates who believe in a FAIR Ohio Republican Primary in 2022 and beyond. Peter - [**I want to be sure you have seen my new campaign video.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=07aaa4667f83489bab94e2576dcbddc1&_e=J7htjQ1603dEbmxHqZBVFeoEXsVp1dFQ3UmWq7YCVu0GDpUGQ5-opouQUEWTd0CxLnj9PXdsHrTYw6AQENWdsXgy-hXsu1J-FF3Ia-5j6l32FVyIQXsdfK5mK29j4QWS5lBPWK-xYQVRgyiRmVb2k_q9UBXOSo_jX5nrO8LvFjyK9y3M6BoPkSFEx9IUNbsipgkWtoCalhBmLIFh-JbauQ0RaN9kS9C1s14LmtIRrjkM0hNTPMKJI702QLsD-T_aqtCVghiAnRqlmgNwE1vWlaYYI3XhSiWVQ5vewgJ90rcUmtMy9fQBlOhFSweU0PKT9H0UTby1gUfqDQ0YOaJfub_2kZ4lYvmGr3EJurenk5JZWE4gbGJKWFF9AYdZ4QMCeXJQbc2PjuMvuW-QIuFqqJU3d1a2XvK-4V-xSsSXAbUz9WZxPs4Qymd6BBXpywBNxrxzY73OAq8OPiFEnz2-BA%3D%3D)

For those that don't recognize me, My name is Aja Smith. I am a proud America, United States Air Force veteran and I am running to become California's FIRST black female Republican elected to the House from California.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=07aaa4667f83489bab94e2576dcbddc1&_e=J7htjQ1603dEbmxHqZBVFeoEXsVp1dFQ3UmWq7YCVu0GDpUGQ5-opouQUEWTd0CxLnj9PXdsHrTYw6AQENWdsXgy-hXsu1J-FF3Ia-5j6l32FVyIQXsdfK5mK29j4QWS5lBPWK-xYQVRgyiRmVb2k_q9UBXOSo_jX5nrO8LvFjyK9y3M6BoPkSFEx9IUNbsipgkWtoCalhBmLIFh-JbauQ0RaN9kS9C1s14LmtIRrjkM0hNTPMKJI702QLsD-T_azahqFjxtrrGNxc_g3CH3xyBbLv_fTEJnClDTMArnS3EmtD-mNf-eyOSzQlTSRaHZxxFiEVzeg4oLEnNWbPjbKQNitBSmLMjTEvs9rKCpNIaYc-Ozwj6mEY1MTRKRZq3275QgO9bcTBgbt3-JvxUq7_aSLxHQOJKvD726HGNOfuaaqFXO2ATMD5s9SkHLtn2wCASiyqBT8yeRcn5BYbnNLg%3D%3D)
I made the decision to launch my campaign for California's 41st Congressional District due to the course Democrats have set during their first six months in total control of the federal government, and [**I need to know if the reasons I decided to move forward with another campaign resonate with you and fellow conservatives throughout the nation. Will you watch my video immediately?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=07aaa4667f83489bab94e2576dcbddc1&_e=J7htjQ1603dEbmxHqZBVFeoEXsVp1dFQ3UmWq7YCVu0GDpUGQ5-opouQUEWTd0CxLnj9PXdsHrTYw6AQENWdsXgy-hXsu1J-FF3Ia-5j6l32FVyIQXsdfK5mK29j4QWS5lBPWK-xYQVRgyiRmVb2k_q9UBXOSo_jX5nrO8LvFjyK9y3M6BoPkSFEx9IUNbsipgkWtoCalhBmLIFh-JbauQ0RaN9kS9C1s14LmtIRrjkM0hNTPMKJI702QLsD-T_ag0BauDV2ssUp6_pgM2rtkCp9HBCJ4pcKAkfsIhVSJX1XQ2jsjIdeMW83reLl156FOJPdP4JwoRrhdnQTDuC6Ya_l3UoWtuQzmc3tQjiQYKt1vNjvfo0P4QyezxVymTZJQQZxiTLRgt7nWgvdSTOV8XgFeigs4qUwvG5e4JY9OsAoaT7IKMK1n9xvEh-WGarZ6jIPkx9x_CJh9Do4Cj1lFg%3D%3D)

As a veteran, I took an oath to defend and protect our nation from all enemies foreign and domestic, so I can't sit on the sidelines as our country is being brought down from within by culture wars, rampant spending, and incompetent leaders who have stayed in office long past their prime.

**I need help from every conservative across the nation, including you, to defeat my incumbent Democrat opponent and take back the House for Republicans.** [**Can I count on you to pitch in just $5 or more right now to help me reach Republicans with my winning message?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=07aaa4667f83489bab94e2576dcbddc1&_e=J7htjQ1603dEbmxHqZBVFeoEXsVp1dFQ3UmWq7YCVu0GDpUGQ5-opouQUEWTd0CxLnj9PXdsHrTYw6AQENWdsXgy-hXsu1J-FF3Ia-5j6l32FVyIQXsdfK5mK29j4QWS5lBPWK-xYQVRgyiRmVb2k_q9UBXOSo_jX5nrO8LvFjyK9y3M6BoPkSFEx9IUNbsipgkWtoCalhBmLIFh-JbauQ0RaN9kS9C1s14LmtIRrjkM0hNTPMKJI702QLsD-T_aCpWh5VRBJK3mwJjsJT3oGPMaVk_67wce06znr8Q2-KzYCmMeklJkH5Z0SyjUaS4fM2f57Eg7TBugreL6hfcF_c-Kon93nsvcvuddWARA_ehghpKcvF8O8GP9LFzT_LiZlawfCi6pwq1sIZXF1olT7RDEjKYeiwxVmhzlsJbTX3_NSkiwIkKxZkqSN8ha_M1LAXjadt10btvSmIO4HD82NQ%3D%3D)

[**HELP AJA WIN ✈ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=07aaa4667f83489bab94e2576dcbddc1&_e=J7htjQ1603dEbmxHqZBVFeoEXsVp1dFQ3UmWq7YCVu0GDpUGQ5-opouQUEWTd0CxLnj9PXdsHrTYw6AQENWdsXgy-hXsu1J-FF3Ia-5j6l32FVyIQXsdfK5mK29j4QWS5lBPWK-xYQVRgyiRmVb2k_q9UBXOSo_jX5nrO8LvFjyK9y3M6BoPkSFEx9IUNbsipgkWtoCalhBmLIFh-JbauQ0RaN9kS9C1s14LmtIRrjkM0hNTPMKJI702QLsD-T_adxR1uEGII2dktXdomogNmEe-vfHJ6BG6X8TDvlCr1IHfqj1qO6_Up4LIHCun2jX6huiqY6ICf6m1DWHfZmYXOZyhq1DfwkdsnX8VOhGj62yu8BVZ5z7-FubJLTpR3DGaBGK67puaGFyJM-eygdZ9UL_XXRFhA2jDJKy2Xo8gZJOeWzMbqBw80U7a74T_MLkpoJZxKY77x5to07X6Chdviw%3D%3D)
You have to know why I am the right person for the job, Peter - and [**why I am recruiting you to help spread the word about my historic campaign to become California's FIRST black female Republican elected to the House.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=07aaa4667f83489bab94e2576dcbddc1&_e=J7htjQ1603dEbmxHqZBVFeoEXsVp1dFQ3UmWq7YCVu0GDpUGQ5-opouQUEWTd0CxLnj9PXdsHrTYw6AQENWdsXgy-hXsu1J-FF3Ia-5j6l32FVyIQXsdfK5mK29j4QWS5lBPWK-xYQVRgyiRmVb2k_q9UBXOSo_jX5nrO8LvFjyK9y3M6BoPkSFEx9IUNbsipgkWtoCalhBmLIFh-JbauQ0RaN9kS9C1s14LmtIRrjkM0hNTPMKJI702QLsD-T_aZfjE09EY5LakrcSV89Fhsa_EgaQUhKGu9vo44fYWVAEkA6OmMb6UCVUgU-Eo5xC8WSonoi-QybYkAu9YctM5kdGZXf6aWLe2LE4ak_G5TK3ZM4Vv6_j32B-ZhWjH2mL6b9Tckf0NUi_KnuHiyWED9Hjd7eFqOdHFmu2WSYtxzyurc9pGfYXZoM-7jlzqWCTT7pLqcM1pRedqREiS4EhqWg%3D%3D)

I come from a long line of military service. Both of my grandparents served in the armed forces - my grandfather fought in World War II, the Korean War, and in Vietnam. **My great uncle was a Tuskegee Airman pilot.**

After our nation was attacked on September 11, I enlisted in the United States Air Force Reserve. **I was deployed to Qatar in 2007, where I participated in Operation Enduring Freedom.**

Simply put: service to our great nation is in my blood. Now, I am ready to serve and fight for our freedoms against the radical-Left in Congress.

[**But I need you on my team, Peter. Will you pitch in $5, $10 or even $15 so I can have the resources to reach every corner of the nation with my campaign video?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=07aaa4667f83489bab94e2576dcbddc1&_e=J7htjQ1603dEbmxHqZBVFeoEXsVp1dFQ3UmWq7YCVu0GDpUGQ5-opouQUEWTd0CxLnj9PXdsHrTYw6AQENWdsXgy-hXsu1J-FF3Ia-5j6l32FVyIQXsdfK5mK29j4QWS5lBPWK-xYQVRgyiRmVb2k_q9UBXOSo_jX5nrO8LvFjyK9y3M6BoPkSFEx9IUNbsipgkWtoCalhBmLIFh-JbauQ0RaN9kS9C1s14LmtIRrjkM0hNTPMKJI702QLsD-T_abS1EsBjhPk6o6OUL9Qb9J5NyOu4n0FuMn3ecptWDGpg2xKwEZ_fIq7lW_ED1rR7xLRgw4tQ7uFl4IDChwc4DD6LMtWCcR9oaT7jAQyZ8Tp3dH0kyZyVKR89LQ6EWbzBVgYQmIjuAuX1M91a-pzYCGO04R_ug4vgmlCeuog4QWm7APrePrISb_sN7dD8tYm5OffU4K6DWsqD4AWmDqNh4Kg%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Aja Smith
United States Air Force Veteran
Republican for Congress

P.S. Peter, with your help, I can be the first Black Republican female to be elected to the House of Representatives from California. [**You can be a part of history by joining my team today!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=07aaa4667f83489bab94e2576dcbddc1&_e=J7htjQ1603dEbmxHqZBVFeoEXsVp1dFQ3UmWq7YCVu0GDpUGQ5-opouQUEWTd0CxLnj9PXdsHrTYw6AQENWdsXgy-hXsu1J-FF3Ia-5j6l32FVyIQXsdfK5mK29j4QWS5lBPWK-xYQVRgyiRmVb2k_q9UBXOSo_jX5nrO8LvFjyK9y3M6BoPkSFEx9IUNbsipgkWtoCalhBmLIFh-JbauQ0RaN9kS9C1s14LmtIRrjkM0hNTPMKJI702QLsD-T_aEWJ9GpPJAM9Z3AA5wALHL4QSEKfxB00_WDkIbaqrk7Dj74FGPFglG5MtaTl9b4EWSW4xXT5VtFZtid6j8IR_FhIU2nkhJHfWmW2teRtGsLCz1VZJtw182xwaw63Vts-29c1_h7wGTvePbsH2yax_dQfdiLaYPioN1cSCOPVfmMgvSPBj6qe79TYdtZMmJ4HWuO4NFfgecPigpyJI14g4Aw%3D%3D)

[**HELP AJA WIN ✈ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=07aaa4667f83489bab94e2576dcbddc1&_e=J7htjQ1603dEbmxHqZBVFeoEXsVp1dFQ3UmWq7YCVu0GDpUGQ5-opouQUEWTd0CxLnj9PXdsHrTYw6AQENWdsXgy-hXsu1J-FF3Ia-5j6l32FVyIQXsdfK5mK29j4QWS5lBPWK-xYQVRgyiRmVb2k_q9UBXOSo_jX5nrO8LvFjyK9y3M6BoPkSFEx9IUNbsipgkWtoCalhBmLIFh-JbauQ0RaN9kS9C1s14LmtIRrjkM0hNTPMKJI702QLsD-T_av6gk5S-kpptOo_JH6Y6r6wpcnWFcYlUUQCJe055h1eOHnkzrhPdzLEUZK6mzdzZtBHeeZbp6jmg7o4yzmBoyRgwBfg7q5dUpwNF9KKP51SBxHjaIh-kHrANXMJgpPv6xZ1ljeTb4J5tkiEe1UgNEUPIR18TrfsVdzSio4SG49fI45Zo0dLNcoVdONgEg8h8nILdnPF-bWwjwh-2036ulRw%3D%3D)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: HELP ME END 120 years of Democrat dominance, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)
---
Peter,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left's game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we're seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what's on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)
[ THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKE
HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)

Will you please **[chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)** to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for?

I encouraged Monica to try again - a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. **[Monica has my endorsement, but she won 't be able to pull off a win for Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)**.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before June 30th, and I've pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a Latina Republican to Congress?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)**

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)
We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica 's race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I'm asking you to give generously](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)** - whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she'll make us all proud.

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)

Respectfully,
Senator Ted Cruz

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110000:JXlVyqlN5:m:1:3253819041:BB4233F80F0F24BCDE19F6C70041FF88:r)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before June 30th, and I've pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas. We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community. Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica 's race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED! On behalf of my friend Monica, - whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she'll make us all proud. Respectfully, Senator Ted Cruz | Paid for by Monica for Congress This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. body:
Senate passes $1 trillion infrastructure bill in bipartisan win. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33848109/300135386/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBjNjY1Zi0zNmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72mzMdFxTCr6urh2CGIqObqnL1KPlvBtJnO9SUoMdR8=)
**Senate Passes $1 Trillion Infrastructure Bill, Handing Biden a Bipartisan Win**
_\- The New York Times_
* * *

This is big, friend.

President Biden kept his promise of bipartisanship. Democrats along with 19 Republicans in the Senate just passed the $1.2 trillion infrastructure bill that rebuilds roads and bridges, fixes lead pipes, and works toward solutions for the climate crisis.

This infrastructure bill will help working families, but there's much more to do:

**Now, Senate Democrats must pass the $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill.** This legislation makes the historic child tax credit permanent, institutes tuition-free community college, paid family and medical leave, and Medicare expansion. It also funds new climate initiatives and offers a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and other immigrants working on the front lines.

This is crucial because while billionaires and the ultra-wealthy are doing better than ever, working people continue to struggle, and evictions are still happening for many families across this country. These initiatives take pressure off families trying to make ends meet, which is precisely why I believe they're the right solutions for our country.

**[We need Congress members to deliver on solutions like these. Will you chip in $3 to my campaign so we can grow our Democratic majority in the House? We need to send a strong advocate for Austin to Washington DC.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33848111/300135387/77586780?refcode=em-08102021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBjNjY1Zi0zNmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72mzMdFxTCr6urh2CGIqObqnL1KPlvBtJnO9SUoMdR8=)**
| **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33848116/300135388/77586780?refcode=em-08102021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBjNjY1Zi0zNmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72mzMdFxTCr6urh2CGIqObqnL1KPlvBtJnO9SUoMdR8=)**

Both of our Texas Senators refused to vote for this bill! That's unacceptable.

**This bill is a huge win and exactly the type of thing I'll fight for when in Congress:** It has a direct, tangible impact on Austin and the state of Texas, and it shows that Democrats fight for our collective best interests and deliver for working people across the country.

I'm making the case for Senate Democrats to pass this bill, but I need to know you're with me.

clean_body: Senate passes $1 trillion infrastructure bill in bipartisan win. | = Senate Passes $1 Trillion Infrastructure Bill, Handing Biden a Bipartisan Win \- The New York Times This is big, friend. President Biden kept his promise of bipartisanship. Democrats along with 19 Republicans in the Senate just passed the $1.2 trillion infrastructure bill that rebuilds roads and bridges, fixes lead pipes, and works toward solutions for the climate crisis. This infrastructure bill will help working families, but there's much more to do: Now, Senate Democrats must pass the $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill. This legislation makes the historic child tax credit permanent, institutes tuition-free community college, paid family and medical leave, and Medicare expansion. It also funds new climate initiatives and offers a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and other immigrants working on the front lines. This is crucial because while billionaires and the ultra-wealthy are doing better than ever, working people continue to struggle, and evictions are still happening for many families across this country. These initiatives take pressure off families trying to make ends meet, which is precisely why I believe they're the right solutions for our country. = | = Both of our Texas Senators refused to vote for this bill! That's unacceptable. This bill is a huge win and exactly the type of thing I'll fight for when in Congress: It has a direct, tangible impact on Austin and the state of Texas, and it shows that Democrats fight for our collective best interests and deliver for working people across the country. I'm making the case for Senate Democrats to pass this bill, but I need to know you're with me. = Thanks for your support, Donna =** | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for Congress in Austin, Texas. Right now Austin is represented by three right-wing GOP members due to gerrymandering. But since Texas is gaining two new districts in 2022, this is our best chance to change that. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website here: Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: It took 6 months, but Cuomo has resigned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal)
body:
\---

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=57677570c0f24f6081d54b3a0a03f786&_e=j13CswowUVdBVR83IPGeBy3IpNwmTQBoAlxyjKT-vu6Dfotude4LjevitdtrfmdhKpB2JoN-Yjwarpp1vZxWs4xU3fV01tQB2dMFjYkilJqXXNw2yZxKjrEDztjt4VXp6iRnFXjdFrfBjN3uFp5ra5l-MHPiTsHh8p0ZE8s-oJdNVfRRRJjqEMaxD2M8cOMW94M8IkV9U87s8Fpq2rj9Uvl0myrEqmcqn0UzPGPuBIPU6fXzRrBQD7knKM4on01Aq-qyP1pCqy-xtydbYLkJNQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,

Today’s resignation by Governor Andrew Cuomo is an important first step forward for our state and its citizens, following the state Attorney General’s report outlining the serial sexual misconduct he committed. As you know I requested a formal investigation in May 2020 and called on the Governor to resign last February following the tragic and unnecessary deaths of 15,000 seniors in nursing homes due to his decision to place COVID positive patients with our most vulnerable.

While the Governor’s resignation does not heal the trauma and hurt felt by these women or the New Yorkers who lost loved ones in a nursing home due to his poor decisions, it does open the door for the healing process to begin.

The New York Assembly’s Judiciary Committee and prosecutors must go forward and continue their investigations into all aspects of Cuomo’s multiple scandals: the families of his nursing home victims and all sexual harassment victims deserve justice.

Resignation alone is not accountability.

**I want to thank everyone who signed my petition calling on the Governor to resign. I will continue working to ensure that he is held accountable and the public’s trust is restored.**

Sincerely,

Nicole
| [**VISIT NICOLEMALLIOTAKIS.COM**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=57677570c0f24f6081d54b3a0a03f786&_e=j13CswowUVdBVR83IPGeBy3IpNwmTQBoAlxyjKT-vu6Dfotude4LjevitdtrfmdhIUA3i3LpuWSA4H7l_WfJO5wa2oMCwR4vDTaRny0lmOLK-45HjpuoZJq1R9R0GF5f47tY9X79txlOZHLDMM9g-Alun_GNIP4FdG2z7nfP3i84nK4q-6L3869O2rXGAoCUpUL56xs_iSLe_sMDBqw-5jVkTvoAUqm_WLFcBlHQynqYG-II42zKkORXwOgrKtZwR9hwqjyAUjN0S1envTHEWg%3D%3D)

name: John Fetterman
subject: a quick note about Pat Toomey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m your guy.
Hey, it’s John Fetterman again with a quick note on my email from yesterday —
I just found out that Senator Pat Toomey (R-PA) was a "NO" vote on President Biden’s bipartisan infrastructure bill that just passed the Senate today.
Let me be very clear, Peter: If you want a senator that turns their back on working families like Pat Toomey just did, then I’m *not* your candidate.
**But if you want a senator that will proudly vote like a Democrat + ALWAYS stand with working families, then I’m your guy.**
[**_Will you please consider making a donation of $5 or more to our campaign today to send me to the U.S. Senate where I’ll fight for you and your family every day? It's time for us to flip this seat blue and replace Pat Toomey with a Democratic senator who will always fight on the side of working families._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27688?refcode=em20210810-2250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2250%2E434096%2EcHHinE)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27688?refcode=em20210810-2250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2250%2E434096%2EcHHinE)**
Thanks for everything!
— John
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: John Fetterman <info@johnfetterman.com>
Date: Mon Jul 9, 2021
Subject: Trump’s BS
By all reports, it looks like Congress is *finally* moving forward with legislation to enact President Biden’s infrastructure plan.
So here’s an idea for you, Peter: **We should make a _huuuuuge_ down payment on the infrastructure package with the BILLIONS of dollars we’d save by repealing Donald Trump’s GOP Tax Scam.**
[**_If you like that idea, trust me when I say that I’ve got plenty more like it. Can you donate your first $5 or more today to support me and our campaign for U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27688?refcode=em20210810-2250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2250%2E434096%2EcHHinE)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27688?refcode=em20210810-2250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2250%2E434096%2EcHHinE)**
Look, I don’t want to dwell in the past. But back in 2017, Trump and his Republicans voted to slash TRILLIONS in taxes for the rich and corporations.
Trump claimed that his tax cuts would "pay for themselves." But that was a lie. More than half of Trump’s Tax Scam savings went into the pockets of the wealthiest 20% of Americans.
The bottom line is that I will ALWAYS fight on the side of working people to deliver President Biden’s agenda to the American people.
And when I talk about making a _huuuuuge_ down payment on Biden’s infrastructure plan with the money we’d save by repealing Trump’s GOP Tax Scam, I’m not joking around.
**Let me be very clear. Send me to Washington, and I will *actually* vote and behave like a Democrat.**
[**_If I sound like someone you want to see in the U.S. Senate, will you please make your very first donation of $5 or more to our campaign today?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27688?refcode=em20210810-2250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2250%2E434096%2EcHHinE)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27688?refcode=em20210810-2250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2250%2E434096%2EcHHinE)**
It’s gonna take a team effort to win our primary, so thanks for hearing me out.
More soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210810-2250-footer&t=25&refcode2=2250_434096_cHHinE&akid=2250%2E434096%2EcHHinE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

**_FIRST_** , Governor Cuomo put COVID infected patients back into nursing homes and attempted to cover it up.

**_THEN_** , the NY Democrats pretended for the media that they would check his power but failed to actually hold him accountable.

**_NOW_** , the New York Attorney General has corroborated the harassment allegations against Andrew Cuomo.

**Enough is enough. It’s time for action. **

**GOVERNOR ANDREW CUOMO** _**MUST RESIGN OR BE IMPEACHED!**_

If Governor Cuomo doesn’t resign, then he must be impeached. There’s no other option. _**And we must hold Democrats' feet to the fire to ensure it’s done.**_

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: A victory for Washington state and the country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Today, after weeks of bipartisan negotiations, the U.S. Senate passed an infrastructure bill that will make direct investments in communities here in Washington state and across the country.
#
Peter,
Today, after weeks of bipartisan negotiations, the U.S. Senate passed an infrastructure bill that will make direct investments in communities here in Washington state and across the country.
This infrastructure package is a big win. Not only are we going to clean up the air our children breathe and ensure that everyone has access to high-speed broadband internet, we’re going to build and repair our infrastructure and create good-paying jobs all across Washington state.
When President Biden signs this deal into law, our country will finally make long overdue investments in our physical infrastructure, like transit, roads, highways, waterways, and bridges. We will also take important first steps to address the climate crisis and protect our planet and our future with investments in clean energy transmission, electric vehicles and more. And we won’t stop there, we’ll work hard to deliver a landmark investment in climate action through a national Clean Energy Standard, a Civilian Climate Corp, and more bold steps to tackle the climate crisis.
Now that this historic investment in our physical infrastructure is almost over the finish line, Democrats will be turning our attention to making the equally critical investments we need to make in American families and workers -- from affordable child care to national paid leave.
More to come -- and thank you, as always, for your continued support,
Patty

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33848975/300144382/-858609527?refcode=pm_em_210810_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmQyOWUyYy0zYWZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43NWp715hwnxq2-ygYIiekCNLazKMXKZnz0YJUMuwkQ=)**

We need your feedback, Friend. Nick is a **FIRM and UNAPOLOGETIC defender of our Second Amendment** right to keep and bear arms. **Democrats are on a** _**POWER TRIP**_** and are considering ** _**VIOLATING**_**your Constitutional rights.** President Biden wants to go on a nationwide **Gun Grab** to steal _legally_ obtained firearms from law-abiding citizens. This would be a **DIRECT BREACH** of the _sacred_ _contract_ between Americans and our government. Nick is staunchly opposed to this possibility. He believes that the criminal actions of some should **NOT** affect the rights of the many to **protect** themselves and their families. _Take our survey NOW to tell Nick what you think about_** subject: New Hampshire GOP candidate could cost us our Congress
