body:
|

| | Peter, Mitch McConnell has singled out New Hampshire as the GOP's top target in the upcoming midterm elections. McConnell has tapped right-wing favorite Gov. Chris Sununu to unseat progressive champion Senator Maggie Hassan. The Republican electioneering machine is throwing all its weight behind Sununu to make sure he launches a formidable insurgent bid. Vicious attack ads are already flashing on every family's television in New Hampshire, attempting to warp the public's perception of Maggie Hassan, absurdly labeling her bold progressive record as a “Washington power grab.” Here's the deal, Peter: If Chris Sununu runs for Maggie Hassan's Senate seat, and progressives across the nation don't defend her from the GOP propagandists, we will forfeit our fragile majority in the Senate. **Our historic opportunity to govern with a real liberal vision from the Biden White House to the Capitol will be lost.** | **[PROTECT OUR MAJORITY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33849190/300146967/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210810_GEN_FDR_D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5MjNlMjQyLTNiZmEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=x3fWQf9XmXuxWLTVBSyelPlPzgK2qBDTAbgnY74czcE=)**

Our aggressive digital and ground campaign is firing up Democrats across the country to launch a blue wave in next year's midterm elections. We don't just want to protect our majorities in the House and Senate \-- we want to strengthen our lead. But with Mitch McConnell and GOP House boss Kevin McCarthy working harder than ever to suppress the vote, we need progressives to take a stand. **That's where you come in, Peter.**

**[This can't wait, Peter: Our critical $1,250 fundraising deadline expires tonight at midnight, and we're still $368 short of hitting our goal. clean_body: | | | Peter, Mitch McConnell has singled out New Hampshire as the GOP's top target in the upcoming midterm elections. McConnell has tapped right-wing favorite Gov. Chris Sununu to unseat progressive champion Senator Maggie Hassan. The Republican electioneering machine is throwing all its weight behind Sununu to make sure he launches a formidable insurgent bid. Vicious attack ads are already flashing on every family's television in New Hampshire, attempting to warp the public's perception of Maggie Hassan, absurdly labeling her bold progressive record as a “Washington power grab.” Here's the deal, Peter: If Chris Sununu runs for Maggie Hassan's Senate seat, and progressives across the nation don't defend her from the GOP propagandists, we will forfeit our fragile majority in the Senate. Our historic opportunity to govern with a real liberal vision from the Biden White House to the Capitol will be lost. | = When Democrats Turn Out is fighting every day to make sure that never happens. Our aggressive digital and ground campaign is firing up Democrats across the country to launch a blue wave in next year's midterm elections. We don't just want to protect our majorities in the House and Senate \-- we want to strengthen our lead. But with Mitch McConnell and GOP House boss Kevin McCarthy working harder than ever to suppress the vote, we need progressives to take a stand. That's where you come in, Peter. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Mitch McConnell thinks he can invent a right-wing majority out of thin air, Peter. body:
This is starting to feel a lot like 2016. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGsKw547BUiFNpjLWqdpeefhSAaV9O6ZAIpeNxoK5BKKqhLi-hRpthPlrXD43WsE9YPOKt21DmslKPGmy2osE4hESJutvMwGka20Por8Xvg-Fzv7t3l90FALk5EJuPwUFy4Psu0VOcVA7GTOn6u82cxzAJo_Xab7VcUHV3wwta9iLHzd6Rike77tpmcJFCk546y3otJteYTwLBf2xh5C4dOHEYHIThrdfdowH3hdrnK8MW9xd-kjglnefKj0r3o6Vw054xZ54vXyX_atptDs9TJiMpuEjzFRL5u30FJUfO97q/3ec/wgGw8MXQQjWF5MYDRfZcdw/h0/HbvQ8m7j2YwZ5wgqXeIQ2TytCmX11GQFSiC91zYt8nI) Derek, This is incredibly important, so I wanted to personally reach out. **My midnight deadline is just hours away,** and I’m still short. I'm hoping you can help us make up the gap before it's too late, but first I'll explain why reaching this goal is so critical.

Mitch McConnell and the GOP will stop at nothing to flip the Senate. They only need _one_ seat to do it, and with CNN naming me one the most vulnerable Democratic senators, Nevada is one of their top targets. Now, McConnell's handpicked candidate (a Trump-supporting extremist who election forecasters say _could win_) is _this close_ to entering the race against me.

The GOP and outside spending groups have _already_ spent nearly $1 million to defeat me. This is starting to feel a lot like 2016, when nearly _$50 million_ was spent to buy this seat. I managed to win by a slim two-point margin, and here's what that tough race taught me: **your grassroots support makes a critical difference.**

**That's why I'm urgently asking for your help before tonight's midnight deadline, Derek. This is our chance to show the GOP that our team has what it takes to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate._Please, will you split a donation between my team and Common Good VA?_**

**[Split a donation $20 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA before the midnight deadline to meet this critical goal, protect Nevada's Senate seat, and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGsKw547BUiFNpjLWqdpeefiUipw7IusXI6n7_L25ncBlJ8qh4Ezim8ZwRueOJJkgZOh_6OLKyU_d-7TS5QHSDfK5Oevx_sq0zW4PyZhB8yW_Oq4VqJUP0BNCotPqpvd3mTaC5I-kTz7paGom7w2rghw-OB9LlknF6WlTJ4w9fk4HDGmNJ1JkxKzIpT_g3CsWRCJfNIYrPa47P4j5zsC3hvqfM-6RGDJoqmLU8D5UTCie35biVWDg6xkJIxcqAikPJ1wWSQrWgd4-yztgznyV8rieIxSea5dM7uyWLdy6CHi0/3ec/wgGw8MXQQjWF5MYDRfZcdw/h1/k6KXyR1_G3N8Hw_b5Pat76lNcMCRAzW4cqlCTW0Ui0E)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGsKw547BUiFNpjLWqdpeefhzTTobaOJweWnH0XqplAQOiFo1s7HpA-Hu5CQzs5qwriDS_KRxpw38WrJLZy_Z05MmvQ9iVoDf8jjmlDJ_6yBBAAIraE8egjD98lT6ofeVKOBHak7Rvco-lBFtZirQvoTr393_2RO6oy5-AjyjW21fjy3cFGANqYvbQJGtUrB_A4j6uZxB2ukps1zkXLzJag36I0ZsOa38IfeM1f5rUGGGyhf3dJ6Y9rbhCtD-j8pxXocU7J8HTXZm2Vpzfr6hCH_vJF0IvU_iQ6jycjNVbmfq6wc47yr0hsgOmSrjspMCww/3ec/wgGw8MXQQjWF5MYDRfZcdw/h2/OOw3ZIQ2eyYGJyC_82Xtj9Gxd5C9Q2R7__6fmISU28U)

clean_body: | | | | | \-- we agree with Harry Reid: Nevada is the second state in the country to adopt a public health insurance option, which is a MAJOR accomplishment! Steve Sisolak is sending a message to Nevadans that their health and safety is a top priority. Nevada’s public option will offer a lifeline to families by expanding access and affordability of healthcare. Gov. Sisolak is determined to make sure every person in Nevada has access to the care they need, without the fear that they won’t be able to afford it. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Harry Reid said it best, “access to health care, at its core, is about delivering a better quality of life for all Americans.” Gov. Sisolak believes that no one should go broke or into debt because they get sick and he’s fighting for a future where no one has to choose between paying a medical bill or paying their rent. Gov. Sisolak is facing four Republican opponents who plan on rolling back the progress he’s made on health care for Nevadans, which is why we need your help. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Josh Harder
subject: A surprising win?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/dPT_jzH7TtqmdUSlakjAncuY0A79sV-JuC7H3rJ-8SY=/arVcx8E29vxYl2pYjxD1p_nyaryLq3J5NykACs5JLUk=?refcode=E10640-20210809-Attacks-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Hey Peter, I'm a big fan of celebrating wins along the way, so I didn't want to miss the opportunity to drop a note about the bipartisan infrastructure deal passing through the Senate today. It will be the largest investment in our nation's infrastructure in a decade, including much-needed funding for roads and bridges, broadband, and water infrastructure projects that we desperately need. I won't lie, I've been pessimistic that Republicans would work in good faith with us on it, but I'm incredibly happy to see that (at least for today) politics was set aside for the good of the country. I'm thankful to be able to supply a critical vote to get this infrastructure bill passed through the House and I wouldn't be here without your support! **If you want Congress to keep making more meaningful progress like this, then we need to keep the House majority in Democratic hands and I 'm the Republicans' #1 target in California.** [**Will you chip in as much as you can so we can keep my seat blue and continue passing critical legislation to help our communities get ahead?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dPT_jzH7TtqmdUSlakjAncuY0A79sV-JuC7H3rJ-8SY=/arVcx8E29vxYl2pYjxD1p_nyaryLq3J5NykACs5JLUk=?refcode=E10640-20210809-Attacks-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/dPT_jzH7TtqmdUSlakjAncuY0A79sV-JuC7H3rJ-8SY=/arVcx8E29vxYl2pYjxD1p_nyaryLq3J5NykACs5JLUk=?express_lane=true&refcode=E10640-20210809-Attacks-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

name: Team AOC
subject: IPCC Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Climate change is here, it’s a crisis, and it’s caused by fossil fuels.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210810-2331-header&t=1&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u)
Yesterday, the top climate scientists in the world released a brand new report that confirms what we already knew:
Climate change is here, fossil fuels are responsible, and it will require deep, rapid cuts in greenhouse-gas emissions to stay below 1.5°C of warming.
The findings in the UN's Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) report were difficult to hear – especially as we witness the second-largest fire in California’s history and rampant fires in Turkey and Greece.
The fossil fuel industry wants us to believe that all hope is lost. But here’s the good news: **We have the technical capacity and solutions to rapidly transition our economy. All that’s missing is the political will.**
**We must grow our movement for a Green New Deal and keep Alexandria fighting for climate justice in Congress – there’s no time left to wait.[If you’re able, will you please chip in $3 to help us fight the fossil fuel industry and pass bold climate legislation in Congress? Every dollar supports our on-the-ground and online organizing efforts.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210810?refcode=em20210810-2331-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2331_2526796_rB4B4u&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u)**
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210810?refcode=em20210810-2331-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2331_2526796_rB4B4u&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u)**
Together we can cut our emissions while creating millions of good-paying jobs, supporting working families, and ensuring that everyone has access to clean air and water.
It won’t be easy, but as we learned last week with the eviction moratorium win: I _t always seems impossible until it’s done_. There is no doubt that if we rise up together we can end the era of fossil fuels and build a green economy that protects our communities and our planet for decades to come.
[If you agree that there’s no time to waste – please chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to help Alexandria continue to lead the effort for a Green New Deal.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210810?refcode=em20210810-2331-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2331_2526796_rB4B4u&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u)
Thank you for all you do.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210810?refcode=em20210810-2331-P&t=23&refcode2=2331_2526796_rB4B4u&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210810-2331-P&t=24&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2331%2E2526796%2ErB4B4u)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: Help us do our part to take back the Senate….
body:
If we’re going to take back the Senate, we’re not just taking on Chuck Schumer and his leftist Senators - we have to take on every millionaire... Friend, If we’re going to take back the Senate, we’re not just taking on Chuck Schumer and his leftist Senators - we have to take on every millionaire and billionaire in Hollywood and Silicon Valley who’s bankrolling their campaigns.

**They have some of the wealthiest, most powerful allies in the world, and if we’re going to win our fight for America, we have to do something huge.**

I’m working to build the LARGEST grassroots team in history, and I want you to be a part of that record breaking team.

name: Harold Earls
subject: Read this before you buy school supplies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Earls for Georgia |
body:
If you feel like you’ve got to take out a second mortgage to afford school supplies this year, you’re not alone. | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=dbbae00462594c02a08146bfeadf7027&_e=L8PGOj2sfmXztGxsTUQFZ2Sfu2NoNAgYLxFtT4DnEsVHc8YJYJQw1_a9my7gZ8nF-3qivTKK8GSPaPz8-KyGsKRVkVYbYTfx6AJE62RmsMs22jgx7lLxJhG-cuzq8UwyUbUa19N6AuwAK7PNoZprK9pVx7r-SPxaSefkhmBsWPdIQnSn4LDsHCDRCPC3i3ODDShvQWbsopchI0Rgb3U6uzs1oaecyE3JKzkW3qFmyMWf5ftlZtpkjfJCPjo1FPIphct6GpUZn_36uB1laouGlce6-CD0kYfft040UbMDNNsq2cArG5-aSf9ifuBwEfNcArEQq9hBf-HUhB5HDf0CzE9SK8IuVddK_ek96gbRIvRFBZ38Ev3Jd7OIBCzvkwKIa-ojPG21zGIlPuApKUIFLIo5tnqylHNK6ivjoGiFPQpHP5CeDocOL0WrtoJ9zrm503cIHXI67Wv_ZpA447ohjyIxhldy5KNs1qAVaMwRInJm67arVPmtBdxbEU_gL_AI)
|
---
Hey Peter,

Inflation is hitting American families hard. In fact, Rachel and I got a taste of it ourselves last weekend.

Our oldest son starts pre-school this year, so we just stocked up on a bunch of school supplies and it cost us a FORTUNE! Have crayons always been this expensive?!

[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=dbbae00462594c02a08146bfeadf7027&_e=L8PGOj2sfmXztGxsTUQFZ2Sfu2NoNAgYLxFtT4DnEsVHc8YJYJQw1_a9my7gZ8nF-3qivTKK8GSPaPz8-KyGsKRVkVYbYTfx6AJE62RmsMs22jgx7lLxJhG-cuzq8UwyUbUa19N6AuwAK7PNoZprK9pVx7r-SPxaSefkhmBsWPdIQnSn4LDsHCDRCPC3i3ODDShvQWbsopchI0Rgb3U6uzs1oaecyE3JKzkW3qFmyMWf5ftlZtpkjfJCPjo1FPIphct6GpUZn_36uB1laouGlce6-CD0kYfft040UbMDNNtmfMvpI2cIBEJ0iMRysqPCeCze3eHjFokrhK85Vn-9PndM48VxsxZ_23oOoI9Zp2zewJgCjB_jjx3rt-x3dlbWYkXAIoEEK9MGzLg9nTiW2kuos1dteEBGzM_6NoP-mSWPcKDzc6Fxf6GwBK1VzAojPGfpmyJhuWYt-x_am40d1-bWS2CJCNqf3l5FZES1lBZ35vgRQ3yekn8vuYuXwGj_)

You shouldn’t have to take out a second mortgage to afford your children’s school supplies, but it certainly feels that way this year. Joe Biden is driving our economy into the ground, and it’s hurting middle-class families most.

**Well Peter, I’m not going to sit back and take it.**

I’m on a mission to end Biden’s out-of-control spending and get our economy back on track before we end up in breadlines. But to make that happen, I’ve got to make it to Washington.

_Peter, can I count on you to chip in and help me get there?_
[**CHIP IN $10 NOW**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=dbbae00462594c02a08146bfeadf7027&_e=L8PGOj2sfmXztGxsTUQFZ2Sfu2NoNAgYLxFtT4DnEsVHc8YJYJQw1_a9my7gZ8nF-3qivTKK8GSPaPz8-KyGsEnMuqxo6kvgZQf68RvsVI44yC97auviwyk2C7xDIsmEL79DtSzz-f674CQK8ASRWlBhPG_l3gclczdsJLmry5_Eg2Tk6fpWcOubiTEiLTPxmu7ootfEF7_N2ynXxlLHGHnoh_LS_DbQtP9ve77Ns6gJQItVZyZFsmLb8S572Z9SRH4UVgIyaEwdB_hIQ9Hiof629xxYhReXIhKouUqc04-jCHihl4RqFWAsN-CANFhebgCJZzQw_d6If2Pt0XAjQjPayxQPPM6Xy_-pOn4J1uFB_S4wwKvUG4PvFEUnWxzWEch1Lg6uojaJb2OHHH2O4D9pF9LwrMpRMO-xhxQeXKL1IBaCeHNPp6pmvSf_qrJYYpOneLmhmSGQa3fQvA4YsZXRumHhq7nr7LAQpAqm63YNkQBdB9IPrgbZStJksUGc)
I know it’s asking a lot for you to chip in this time of year, but a $10 donation to my campaign now could mean saving $100 on your back-to-school shopping once I make it to Congress.

**So what do you say, Peter - will you chip in to my campaign so I can fix Biden’s broken economy?**

**[Click here to make a secure donation right now. >>>](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=dbbae00462594c02a08146bfeadf7027&_e=L8PGOj2sfmXztGxsTUQFZ2Sfu2NoNAgYLxFtT4DnEsVHc8YJYJQw1_a9my7gZ8nF-3qivTKK8GSPaPz8-KyGsKRVkVYbYTfx6AJE62RmsMs22jgx7lLxJhG-cuzq8UwyUbUa19N6AuwAK7PNoZprK9pVx7r-SPxaSefkhmBsWPdIQnSn4LDsHCDRCPC3i3ODDShvQWbsopchI0Rgb3U6uzs1oaecyE3JKzkW3qFmyMWf5ftlZtpkjfJCPjo1FPIphct6GpUZn_36uB1laouGlce6-CD0kYfft040UbMDNNuVTxn1_sntJjiTE64Q87_ly6unhNL8LS0Y5StIXNMBY6_1VgqxJE6Pgi0SVkes568_sBIeqoejCvhjpOzLhILRQWcTSYYLqKsvpAI_TOUwr1VcmZXhefxgBj0CJq9ki57jFUm9ZUaSUGOlQvgpKUvZwbGxDIeRGrLjT3PZ_TSHfwrrwOkkxhpgE2m4A_QedMCYTvkGsAWXmpRbuGiFYhLl)**

Thanks and talk soon,
Harold

Fellow Conservative,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=627e0d26d9d5471287c07c6a6627a2ca&_e=gDKKRzN5i2OZuWxFQngQQZwh9YsLq3IC_S8zm7eqU223N59WtzVGBfJL6oBvViBiq_e0doORVWKDwB1XVvB6IRVA5wh-A8nYkzaLLIV4wcxsMEIlXB-nFQpxPgcH0qESzOd7yGdwG4NY3YtA4mO414TqOjXp_VjvrtlTEQJoKy60xpkQiDkII6xsc4ZcplFS22AsRO3kWlWLqTzdRVCGz4Y2JzrTs31deCg5lXDrrkcqGZelHlMrqXwAm9GhTaMgbYcTGkEdPpHcGupdMF2GqQg2D1A07CplzUSfyFTwXVhDIx6p9xswfZgdGktHKbUiNqZfzac1MsHoBS14B2WYIgauU7TFcWbqHBTSLfUZ1ENQe8Fft66AspcZyQtbdlL83zT2NGn6e7vWLYOdQHz6Eg87KogT2mr0IUMIEjz49NqkOds-KqqZLTnDmRgCYppkjob7DfK3dHraARNH6C7HuUzl2PybxBBnvi_7ID8z8IUibrwUXaWPsY4nsUvwgfa_4Zn99vxSIpfFrGeDCcLxGQ%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

That's why before August 15th, **I’ve set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=627e0d26d9d5471287c07c6a6627a2ca&_e=gDKKRzN5i2OZuWxFQngQQZwh9YsLq3IC_S8zm7eqU223N59WtzVGBfJL6oBvViBiq_e0doORVWKDwB1XVvB6IRVA5wh-A8nYkzaLLIV4wcxsMEIlXB-nFQpxPgcH0qESzOd7yGdwG4NY3YtA4mO414TqOjXp_VjvrtlTEQJoKy60xpkQiDkII6xsc4ZcplFS22AsRO3kWlWLqTzdRVCGz4Y2JzrTs31deCg5lXDrrkcqGZelHlMrqXwAm9GhTaMgbYcTGkEdPpHcGupdMF2GqQg2D1A07CplzUSfyFTwXVhDIx6p9xswfZgdGktHKbUiGyVm_0PqI7QnXMhkTIRppR4YrPP-5CKpw6ZPeu6miGDf96MqcZtU3cuZcwSs2RSwPJC55pU-QVchT3dSCi-WDtDnbig63JA2k47lgGRe2z2grG_AB2GSqWozG3zPrpWCYCw9ZSMxQ_xfcJTlesW2jHqEUMFf1va7nK4hDyxSg7T6H4uo4MhceosvMPfxI5MkOPGpn-MZy1DqRcWHDWF7FQ%3D%3D) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have FIVE days until August 15th and so far have collected just 72,000 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,600 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by August 15th **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=627e0d26d9d5471287c07c6a6627a2ca&_e=gDKKRzN5i2OZuWxFQngQQZwh9YsLq3IC_S8zm7eqU223N59WtzVGBfJL6oBvViBiq_e0doORVWKDwB1XVvB6IRVA5wh-A8nYkzaLLIV4wcxsMEIlXB-nFQpxPgcH0qESzOd7yGdwG4NY3YtA4mO414TqOjXp_VjvrtlTEQJoKy60xpkQiDkII6xsc4ZcplFS22AsRO3kWlWLqTzdRVCGz4Y2JzrTs31deCg5lXDrrkcqGZelHlMrqXwAm9GhTaMgbYcTGkEdPpHcGupdMF2GqQg2D1A07CplzUSfyFTwXVhDIx6p9xswfZgdGktHKbUis-9fAJd8DBZmi7TDizT-3Bg4ZAD6as_mYOMLRwBDb7s8uUrrI9KEoIKrr-vhFpSjYmLLkbprjCVzhf_HeJcOJgMtADmb4cqgqr2fjLwj7lGO5EKQl5U_ggoVTV_SLFP8G_mYWegGfIaX7hEZL6IhPU_eCM_55arn3D8Fseqw7Z4rTuQAssFx-NrD2EPaBmBnfMk-cZlh1CNdKQGUSwalqg%3D%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=627e0d26d9d5471287c07c6a6627a2ca&_e=gDKKRzN5i2OZuWxFQngQQZwh9YsLq3IC_S8zm7eqU223N59WtzVGBfJL6oBvViBiq_e0doORVWKDwB1XVvB6IRVA5wh-A8nYkzaLLIV4wcxsMEIlXB-nFQpxPgcH0qESzOd7yGdwG4NY3YtA4mO414TqOjXp_VjvrtlTEQJoKy60xpkQiDkII6xsc4ZcplFS22AsRO3kWlWLqTzdRVCGz4Y2JzrTs31deCg5lXDrrkcqGZelHlMrqXwAm9GhTaMgbYcTGkEdPpHcGupdMF2GqQg2D1A07CplzUSfyFTwXVhDIx6p9xswfZgdGktHKbUi0cC0Nx0TFa7hDZ2URMVKVHEZrdQIgQeL4MhettFLOO6rwGNNe-WkrJJedmle8kObek1eoZLjhv5nBQ5yA4I1LwK7nhmxNnSMja9GmAN_zOVjmnT25jyQlHtX7-yZG2W0yW-FW2RPX3s-5-yOveqOGM1S3E9LYYx1YifQB8DG5urHghqb0ruIx8Auac0htHmi2jgu47NDUdTIgNNO29Qi3w%3D%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=627e0d26d9d5471287c07c6a6627a2ca&_e=gDKKRzN5i2OZuWxFQngQQZwh9YsLq3IC_S8zm7eqU223N59WtzVGBfJL6oBvViBiq_e0doORVWKDwB1XVvB6IRVA5wh-A8nYkzaLLIV4wcxsMEIlXB-nFQpxPgcH0qESzOd7yGdwG4NY3YtA4mO414TqOjXp_VjvrtlTEQJoKy60xpkQiDkII6xsc4ZcplFS22AsRO3kWlWLqTzdRVCGz4Y2JzrTs31deCg5lXDrrkcqGZelHlMrqXwAm9GhTaMgbYcTGkEdPpHcGupdMF2GqQg2D1A07CplzUSfyFTwXVhDIx6p9xswfZgdGktHKbUihVxgnxrNFnOqr7cMaVjfBWzSpTbOpGmJZLqmi0xrtSrydcGff1aLI5n65cTmpoG_tnQiUDzzPRcYWfYYL_OgyLm5X0w1s7fKZD3QVr2u8tFRnRv6F__vb1SU5_4HKPbSB95WAdldp-9D8sRw-VJuHB4qm513rbKTCZNcUDYQo4GmI9SFUSj4py7QwrzKJHL6upzD7Gnqk5PXOSsfRylnIA%3D%3D)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=627e0d26d9d5471287c07c6a6627a2ca&_e=gDKKRzN5i2OZuWxFQngQQZwh9YsLq3IC_S8zm7eqU223N59WtzVGBfJL6oBvViBiq_e0doORVWKDwB1XVvB6IRVA5wh-A8nYkzaLLIV4wcxsMEIlXB-nFQpxPgcH0qESzOd7yGdwG4NY3YtA4mO414TqOjXp_VjvrtlTEQJoKy60xpkQiDkII6xsc4ZcplFS22AsRO3kWlWLqTzdRVCGz4Y2JzrTs31deCg5lXDrrkcqGZelHlMrqXwAm9GhTaMgbYcTGkEdPpHcGupdMF2GqQg2D1A07CplzUSfyFTwXVhDIx6p9xswfZgdGktHKbUiS48p4xeIrM12fHd4iUcTJnkQNf_4D5c9MN_ob8I27ATXMz7n4Qwvshb_xq0wamCeALzhodf1XjsWBwy_qSOe3tmXvG8RwMRoKk_EMZUVTe9jEw1h6pBph0q48CTDHz0b4ugUvSldbiqyCqAj75RMaqwIEdWe4vvb_nelzC3QVZlrkKIxpMy3A130aAmtBT1_tloKde6qmc1MAd8o8dQ8Ig%3D%3D)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress
body:
Lockdown the border, not our economy

| [](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=c4024594f4e0464eab9e93b6a375f5ae&_e=OL2Nlu4EAEJhjEZtRwUUOqtRYrEcfevMLXJJ6OBiJ1Rz5z2c8bk16NjJfy-ODqU-ao8b2BrMlrt6zwEFOy6Y4ftVkWZGOCst9VAq6XJerZU7X4a1Bb2RjgOauG_rBz3j8NyETdhfC-I5r-sMFF3TcvAgvafeh0KWKBVxzmRc0MJfffXGTwSXdHLX5WCfcaN-mU57ySkctI4SmcjZFQp3BAR-g_YL0w8Oi48X4a6Srhu-SNoYlt4EHXh7GAa6i1Kw3pTfoD1tu0-XgbbNxRwqoYRhGC1XYwr33AarGy74HuhfqYFY89QlU7hK4eJUhjDRnxSXALvAII75uiUxXdTU3ZVecn_NLTOAhCu2VYbsYnbOjmNOSWWfgbbwhUZ3Y434tk_Gi81dQsOQ1FrCeYRFF5vJW56kFmR-TCRCHDvMBD5MKnowSzO66c6M5vdxM28A-r7n9tAg7QGafZp7kzzGaPbEa05TnaVh8OP2Jm4U5dHb5Dvgfc8rm9E0TXrs9cdjleb-nYxRDYYtG_0Dh5WJdA%3D%3D)
---

Fellow Patriot,

Over the last month, illegal alien encounters at the Southern Border have reached a 20 year high. To make matters worse, the busloads of illegal aliens crossing into the United States are not required to pass COVID testing.

name: =?utf-8?Q?House=20Freedom=20Fund?=
subject: More Censorship of Conservatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Twitter has suspended Marjorie Taylor Greene for one week. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/more-censorship-of-conservatives?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

Twitter announced today that it has suspended the account of U.S. Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA) for one week for her post stating her opinion that the FDA "should not approve the covid vaccines."

_**This is yet another dangerous example of Big Tech censoring conservatives.**_ Regardless of what anyone believes about the safety or efficacy of the vaccines, Rep. Greene is entitled to her opinion and should be free to express it.

The CDC has now acknowledged that the vaccines do not stop infection or the spread of the virus as they initially claimed, which is certainly something that should be considered going forward.

Twitter's suspension of Rep. Greene's account and many other efforts to cancel conservative voices show that their opponents are either unable or unwilling to debate the issues on the merits.

Make no mistake: liberal elites are extremely threatened by Rep. Greene and will do whatever it takes to discredit, defeat, and silence her – _**so we need to fight back in her defense!**_

[**Please make a split contribution to the House Freedom Fund and Majorie Taylor Greene's campaign today.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=5881ed16be&e=b2c16e6198)

Your support will help defend her against the endless liberal attacks!

Thank you for being part of our team and for doing so much to help us support the members of the House Freedom Caucus.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
House Freedom Fund

---
| [SUPPORT MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=6cd440820f&e=b2c16e6198 "SUPPORT MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE")
---
| | | |
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

[Donate Online](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=dff6ce3df7&e=b2c16e6198) | [Donate By Mail](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=a463a96a3e&e=b2c16e6198)

name: Erica Smith
subject: I will be the final vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I want you to hear this directly from me.
#
It’s Erica. In a moment, I’m going to sincerely ask you to **[chip in $5 to our campaign for U.S. Senate today.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9156?refcode=em20210810-331&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=331%2E3698%2ExkKqsN)**
Before I do, I want you to hear this directly from me:
**Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I promise you I won’t be a senator like Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema. I will actually vote like a Democrat, and I will always fight for working people.**
I will unapologetically be the final vote Democrats need in the Senate to deliver bold, progressive change to the people of North Carolina and across our country.
That means when it comes to ending the filibuster, raising the minimum wage to at least $15 an hour, expanding voting rights, and passing the Green New Deal and Medicare for All, I won’t make weak excuses to protect the corporate status quo — **I will get the job done.**
[**With this in mind, will you chip in your first $5 donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina’s open seat and build progressive power in the U.S. Senate?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9156?refcode=em20210810-331&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=331%2E3698%2ExkKqsN)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9156?refcode=em20210810-331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=331%2E3698%2ExkKqsN)**
Together, we’ll ensure the votes of Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema don’t determine the fate of the transformative policies our communities deserve and urgently demand.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
For ALL of us,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210810-331-footer&t=22&refcode2=331_3698_xkKqsN&akid=331%2E3698%2ExkKqsN)**
